ast.name: description
ast.source: It takes 10 fire damage; OR one piece of its non-magical equipment (something useful, but player’s choice) melts or burns up. Adjust skill checks or stats accordingly.
ast.target: 它受到10点火焰伤害；或其一件非魔法装备（有用的东西，但由玩家选择）融化或烧毁。相应调整技能检定或属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round an aerial spore in the battle drops to 0 hp, it explodes and 1d3 nearby non-fungus non-construct creatures are covered in spores and begin to choke. Until the end of the battle, when a choking creature rolls a natural 1-5 on an attack roll, it takes damage equal to the natural roll. If a creature is affected twice by this attack, the damage it takes on a natural 1-5 doubles; if affected three times, it triples, etc.
ast.target: 战斗中每回合第一次有空中孢子降至0 hp时，它会爆炸，附近1d3个非真菌、非构装生物被孢子覆盖并开始窒息。直到战斗结束，当一个窒息的生物在攻击检定中掷出自然1-5时，它受到等同于该自然骰的伤害。如果某生物被该攻击影响两次，则其在自然1-5时受到的伤害翻倍；影响三次则三倍，依此类推。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aerial spore floats upon air currents, but it prefers to stay within 5 to 7 feet of the ground so it can use its tendrils to keep it in place or propel it. A free-floating spore too far away from the ground to use its tendrils can easily be blown about from strong winds or similar magical effects.
ast.target: 空中孢子随气流漂浮，但它更喜欢保持在离地5到7英尺之内，以便用触须固定自身或推动自己。若漂浮得离地过远以至无法使用触须，它很容易被强风或类似的魔法效果吹动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a non-spell attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次非法术攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is swallowed whole if it's smaller than the worm (see below)
ast.target: 若目标比蠕虫小，则被整吞（见下文）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm and any creatures it has swallowed take 8d6 damage (but it still deals miss damage on a 2)
ast.target: 蠕虫及其吞下的所有生物受到8d6伤害（但在掷出2时仍造成未命中伤害）

ast.name: description
ast.source:
While a creature is swallowed whole, it takes 10d12 acid damage at the start of its turn and is stuck, hampered, and unable to attack or affect anything outside the worm’s stomach (and vice-versa). Most teleport abilities don’t work because you’re hampered and you can’t see the location out of the worm you want to teleport to. There are two ways out.

  • Cut your way out: Deal 80 damage to the worm with a single attack and you can cut your way out. All edged or bladed weapons are reduced to d6 damage dice (at most) inside the worm’s gullet, so good luck. At least you’ll be damaging the worm attacking it from within.
  • Get upchucked: While the worm is staggered, you can use a standard action to try and crawl out of its mouth. Roll a hard save (16+); on a success, the worm vomits you out and spits you somewhere nearby. The worm also vomits out all creatures it has swallowed when it drops to 0 hp.
ast.target:
当一个生物被整吞时，它在其回合开始时受到10d12酸性伤害，并处于卡住、受阻状态，且无法攻击或影响蠕虫胃外的任何事物（反之亦然）。大多数传送能力无效，因为你受阻且看不到要传送到的蠕虫外的位置。有两种脱身方式。

  • 切开逃出：用一次攻击对蠕虫造成80点伤害即可切开逃出。所有有刃或刀刃武器在蠕虫喉道内的伤害骰（最多）降为d6，祝你好运。至少你能从内部攻击蠕虫并造成伤害。
  • 被吐出来： 当蠕虫处于踉跄时，你可以用一个标准动作尝试从它的口中爬出。进行一次困难豁免（16+）；成功则蠕虫把你吐出，并把你喷到附近某处。当蠕虫降至0 hp时，也会吐出它吞下的所有生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm's stomach also includes a mob of larval mook (purple larvae or parasitic lightning beetles). Feel free to add this nastier special if a PC acts dismissive about the possibility of being swallowed by the worm.
ast.target: 蠕虫的胃里还包含一群幼体杂兵（紫色幼虫或寄生雷甲虫）。如果某个PC对被蠕虫吞下的可能性不以为意，可放心加入这个更恶心的特殊效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Purple worms generate weird energy resistances thanks to underworld radiation and their odd diets. Roll a 1d8, in secret, to determine what energy types the worm is not resistant to. The PCs probably have to find out what energy works best against the worm the hard way, though you might have mercy and allow a DC 35 Wisdom skill check to figure out what energy types work against the worm.

1: acid; 2: cold; 3: fire; 4: lightning; 5: thunder; 6: holy; 7: negative energy; 8: poison.
ast.target:
紫色蠕虫因地底辐射与其怪异的饮食而产生奇特的能量抗性。秘密掷一次1d8，以确定该蠕虫不具抗性的能量类型。PC们多半得用“硬办法”弄清哪种能量最有效，不过你也可以发发慈悲，允许进行一次DC 35的感知技能检定来找出对该蠕虫有效的能量类型。

1: 酸性; 2: 寒冷; 3: 火焰; 4: 闪电; 5: 雷霆; 6: 神圣; 7: 负能量; 8: 毒素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is small, the ankheg grabs it. While the ankheg is grabbing a creature, the only legal target for its mandibles attack is the grabbed creature.
ast.target: 如果目标体型较小，蚁穴虫会抓住它。在蚁穴虫抓住某个生物期间，它的颚钳攻击唯一合法的目标就是被抓住的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the end of the ankheg’s turn, roll a d6. If it’s equal to or less than the escalation die, the ankheg can move again as a free action.
ast.target: 在蚁穴虫回合结束时，掷一个d6。若结果等于或小于升级骰，蚁穴虫可以以自由动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die does not increase the round after an apex zorigami is staggered or drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 巅峰折纸怪陷入踉跄或降至0 hp后的下一回合，升级骰不会提升。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The archer shade can use its *earthen assault* ability this turn.
ast.target: 该弓手影灵本回合可以使用其*earthen assault*能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One stirge ally engaged with the target can make a melee attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 一个与目标缠斗的蚊蝠盟友可以以自由动作对其进行一次近战攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The archer stirge flies faster and higher than a normal stirge, but on louder wings.
ast.target: 弓手蚊蝠飞得比普通蚊蝠更快、更高，但翅膀更吵。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每回合1次，作为快速动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target must start making last gasp saves as they are slowly absorbed. Absorbed creatures can’t be resurrected by normal means.
ast.target: 目标被缓慢吸收时必须开始进行濒死豁免。被吸收的生物无法以常规手段复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gibbering mouthers can’t be ambushed or sneaked up on.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gibbering mouther is immune to opportunity attacks.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gibbering mouther is immune to effects. When an attack applies a condition to a gibbering mouther (dazed, hampered, weakened, ongoing damage, etc.), that condition doesn’t affect it.
ast.target: Gibbering mouther免疫效果。当攻击对Gibbering mouther施加状态（目眩、阻滞、虚弱、持续伤害等）时，该状态不会影响它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A gibbering mouther that also has the insane terrain nastier special slowly turns the softening terrain to flesh, then absorbs it. When the escalation die becomes 6, the die flips straight back to 1 and the gibbering mouther heals up to half its full hit points.
ast.target: 具有“疯狂地形”更凶特性的Gibbering mouther会慢慢把软化的地形变成血肉，然后将其吸收。当升级骰变为6时，骰子直接翻回1，Gibbering mouther回复至其最大生命值的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attached eidolons can fly, but not well. If their current shape doesn’t have wings, it can grow some as a move action.
ast.target: 附着的灵体可以飞行，但不擅长。如果其当前形态没有翅膀，它可以用一个移动动作长出翅膀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The eidolon splits the party into different realities. Each player rolls a d4 for their character. That PC can only perceive and interact with the eidolon and with other characters who rolled the same number. That means PCs in different realities can’t communicate or affect each other in any way. For the rest of the battle, each player rolls a d4 at the start of the round to see which reality their character is now in. At the start of each round, the eidolon can choose which version(s) of reality its allies are in.
ast.target: 灵体将队伍分裂到不同的现实中。每位玩家为自己的角色掷一个d4。该PC只能感知并与灵体及掷出相同点数的其他角色互动。这意味着处于不同现实的PC无法以任何方式交流或相互影响。在战斗的剩余时间里，每位玩家在每回合开始时掷一个d4，以确定其角色现在处于哪个现实。每回合开始时，灵体可以选择其盟友处于哪些现实版本中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each round two combatants swap places in the initiative order as determined by the eidolon. Alternately, the eidolon warps the momentum of the battle and the escalation die value is determined at the start of the round with a d6 roll.
ast.target: 每回合开始时，由灵体决定先攻顺序中两名战斗者互换位置。或者，灵体扭曲战斗的势头，每回合开始时掷一个d6来决定升级骰的数值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 3 ongoing psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到3点持续的心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The avenging orb takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 复仇之球在豁免检定上承受-5惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 12+ to all damage except fire damage and melee weapon damage, which damages it normally.
ast.target: 该生物对除火焰伤害和近战武器伤害以外的所有伤害具有12+抗性，这些伤害对它正常造成伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack crits the azer but doesn’t kill it, the azer can heal 4d6 hp.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击对阿泽造成暴击但未杀死它时，阿泽可以恢复 4d6 生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然 18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The badger can make a *kicking claw* attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 獾可以对目标进行一次 *kicking claw* 攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the badger is staggered, it deals 2 extra damage, hit or miss.
ast.target: 当獾处于受挫状态时，无论命中与否都额外造成 2 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The badger ignores the first 4 damage dealt to it each turn.
ast.target: 每回合獾会忽略其受到的前 4 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the balor adds the escalation die to its attack rolls.
ast.target: 当巴洛处于受挫状态时，将升级骰加入其攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Critical hits with the abyssal blade deal triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 深渊之刃的暴击造成三倍伤害，而非两倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the barbarous bugbear is staggered or the escalation die is 2+, it acts twice per round. Roll initiative once at +12. It takes its second turn when the initiative count is seven less (minimum 1).
ast.target: 在残暴的熊地精进入踉跄状态或升级骰为 2+ 之前，它每轮行动两次。先攻只掷一次，数值为 +12。当先攻计数少 7 时（最低 1）进行第二次回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barbed devil can make a whirling barbs attack as a free action.
ast.target: 倒钩魔鬼可以以一个自由动作进行旋转尖刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 poison damage and is hampered until the end of its next turn as it chokes on sulphurous fumes.
ast.target: 目标还会受到 20 点毒素伤害，并因被硫磺烟雾呛住而处于受阻状态，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰上掷出自然 13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Barbed vines can’t move and can’t be moved, at least not until they’re dead and chopped down.
ast.target: 倒刺藤蔓不能移动，也不能被移动，至少在它们死亡并被砍倒之前如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They can move, but they still can’t be moved.
ast.target: 它们可以移动，但仍然不能被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death can cause fluid-filled sacks inside the barbellite to explode. When the attack roll that kills the barbellite is a natural even roll, each nearby creature takes 10 cold damage.
ast.target: 死亡会导致刺珠怪体内充满液体的囊袋爆炸。当击杀刺珠怪的攻击掷骰为自然偶数时，每个附近的生物受到 10 点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each barrier beasts has one of the following wild abilities.
ast.target: 每只屏障兽拥有以下一种野性能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast can swim underwater swiftly and indefinitely.
ast.target: 屏障兽可以在水下迅速且无限期地游动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As amphibious, but instead of travelling underwater the barrier beast can “swim” through the earth.
ast.target: 与两栖类似，但障碍兽不是在水下移动，而是可以在大地中“游泳”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast can fly very quickly, if not very gracefully.
ast.target: 障碍兽能飞得很快，虽不算优雅。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a standard action, the barrier beast can gain a +4 to all defenses until it makes an attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，以标准动作，障碍兽在进行攻击前获得所有防御+4。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a standard action, the barrier beast can regain 100 hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，以标准动作，障碍兽可恢复100点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At-will and basic attacks do not deal miss damage to a barrier beast, and when an attack against AC or PD targets this creature it deals half damage unless the natural attack roll is 16+. This ability does not work against attacks it is vulnerable to, and ends when the escalation die is 6+.
ast.target: 随意攻击和基础攻击对障碍兽不会造成未命中伤害；当针对其AC或PD的攻击命中时，除非自然攻击检定为16+，否则只造成一半伤害。此能力对其易伤的攻击无效，并在升级骰为6+时结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast ignores damage that’s less than 10.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The barrier beast has two (or even three!) wild abilities instead of one. Choose which additional effect is used each time beast surge is triggered.
ast.target: 障碍兽拥有两个（甚至三个！）狂野能力而非一个。每次触发野兽激增时选择使用哪一个附加效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even the barrier beast can make a breath weapon attack as a quick action once per round, or use it as the additional effect when beast surge is triggered. Pick or roll a random energy type that is different from the vulnerability of the barrier beast. Breath weapon does that type of damage.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，障碍兽每回合可用快速动作进行一次吐息武器攻击，或在触发野兽激增时将其作为附加效果使用。选择或随机掷出一种与障碍兽易伤不同的能量类型；吐息武器造成该类型的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标承受5点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 25 poison damage as its blood turns to poison.
ast.target: 目标因血液化为毒液而承受25点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body liquefies and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体液化并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 15 fire damage, and each of the target’s nearby allies takes 5 fire damage as the target’s blood boils under their skin and sprays outward in gouts of liquid fire.
ast.target: 目标受到15点火焰伤害，目标附近的每个盟友受到5点火焰伤害，因为目标的血液在皮下沸腾，并以股股液态火焰向外喷射。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s blood begins to coagulate and harden, and dust puffs out of their lungs through their mouth.
ast.target: 目标的血液开始凝结并硬化，灰尘从其肺部经口喷出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body turns to stone and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体石化并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target begins to evaporate. The target must make an immediate normal save (11+) or it loses a chunk of flesh or a limb, whatever is dramatic but will allow the creature to survive (perhaps with minuses until healed).
ast.target: 目标开始蒸发。目标必须立即进行一次普通豁免（11+），否则它会失去一块血肉或一条肢体，取最戏剧化但仍能让该生物存活的结果（可能会有减值直到被治疗）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s body explodes into a fine red mist and they die.
ast.target: 目标的身体爆成细密的红雾并死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with the basilisk at the end of the basilisk’s turn takes 10 poison damage.
ast.target: 在蜥蜴怪合结束时，每个与其交战的生物受到10点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes +1d6 damage from a claw swipe.
ast.target: 目标因一次爪击额外受到+1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bearded devil gains a +4 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 髯魔在其下一回合开始前所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a bearded devil, the devil or one of its nearby allies can roll a save against a save ends effect.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对髯魔的攻击时，该魔或其附近的一名盟友可以进行一次豁免，以对抗“豁免终止”效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the bearded devil makes an opportunity attack, it can also make a filthy beard attack against the same target as a free action.
ast.target: 当有须恶魔进行借机攻击时，它还可以对同一目标进行一次肮脏胡须攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target of the bearded devil’s filthy beard attack now takes 10 ongoing poison damage and is weakened (save ends both) instead.
ast.target: 有须恶魔的肮脏胡须攻击的目标改为承受10点持续毒素伤害并陷入虚弱（豁免结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is weakened and hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标陷入虚弱并受限，直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only when the beautific gargoyle starts its turn flying and ends its turn engaged on the ground.
ast.target: 仅当美貌石像鬼以飞行状态开始其回合，并以在地面缠斗结束其回合时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beautific gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 美貌石像鬼对以AC为目标的攻击具有12+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hallowed gargoyles have some ability to sense intentions and a larger capacity to react appropriately! PCs with a negative or conflicted relationship with the Religious Icon are vulnerable to all the hallowed gargoyles’ attacks.
ast.target: 受祝圣的石像鬼具有感知意图的能力，并更能作出恰当反应！与宗教圣像关系为负面或矛盾的PC易受所有受祝圣石像鬼的攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Because they look so much like statues, and because most of the things that look like hallowed gargoyles are statues, hallowed gargoyles are capable of springing a surprise on inattentive PCs. When there’s a chance of such an ambush, give the PCs a normal skill check (DC 20 at champion-tier, DC 25 at epic tier) to notice the gargoyles waking and avoid being surprised (13th Age core rulebook, page 164).
ast.target: 由于它们看起来很像雕像，而大多数看起来像受祝圣石像鬼的东西确实是雕像，受祝圣石像鬼能够对不专心的PC发动突袭。若有此类伏击的可能，让PC进行一次常规技能检定（勇士阶DC 20，史诗阶DC 25），以察觉石像鬼苏醒并避免措手不及（《13th Age》核心规则书，第164页）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While battling one or more frost giants, there is only a 50% chance that the escalation die increases at the start of the round.
ast.target: 在与一个或多个冰霜巨人战斗时，每回合开始时升级骰只有50%的几率上升。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, the raider can make a knockdown attack as a quick action (once per round).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，掠袭者可作为快速动作进行一次击倒攻击（每回合一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is staggered, it is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标处于踉跄状态，它将晕眩直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonuses from shifts are cumulative, but each category of bonus maxes out at 4 bonuses.
ast.target: 位移带来的加值可叠加，但每一类别的加值最多叠加至4个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 4d6 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸和其目标都受到4d6伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a zombie drops it to 0 hp.
ast.target: 对僵尸的重击会使其生命值降至0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The binding bride can make a biting kiss attack as a free action.
ast.target: 束缚新娘可以以自由动作进行一次噬吻攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A black pudding sticks to ceilings and walls when it wishes, sliding along as easily as on the floor.
ast.target: 黑布丁在需要时会附着在天花板和墙壁上，滑行起来如同在地面上一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 该生物无法进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target moves down 1d3 points in initiative order, to a minimum of 1.
ast.target: 目标在先攻顺序中下移 1d3 点，最低为 1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blackscale light-killer gains a darkness token (see below).
ast.target: 黑鳞灭光者获得一个黑暗标记（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸性攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然 16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blackscale light-killer gains a darkness token on odd misses too.
ast.target: 黑鳞灭光者在奇数未命中时也获得一个黑暗标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of a quick action to use darkness spreads, it’s a free action. Wait and use it just before a PC attacks.
ast.target: 使用“黑暗蔓延”不再需要一个迅捷动作，而是一个自由动作。等待并在 PC 攻击前使用它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d8 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对一个被其近战攻击未命中的目标额外造成2d8点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each turn, roll a d6. If the result is less than or equal to the escalation die, the dragonic gains flight as a move action during its turns thanks to a pair of wings it unfurls from its back. The flight tends to be more power-flapping or gliding from one place to another rather than hovering. Flamewings who also have limited flight prefer to use their burning wings to fly in combat wherever possible, resorting to their physical wings only if needed.
ast.target: 每回合开始时，掷1d6。若结果小于或等于升级骰，龙裔因从背后展开的一对翅膀而在其回合中获得飞行（移动动作）。这种飞行更偏向有力扑翼或从一处滑翔到另一处，而非悬停。拥有有限飞行能力的焰翼更倾向在战斗中尽可能用燃烧的翅膀飞行，只有在需要时才动用实体翅膀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This dragonic displays traits of its forebears, the mighty wyrms. Roll a d10 and consult the random dragon ability table, or choose one of the first ten options that looks likely to shape the story or battle.
ast.target: 该龙裔展现出其先祖——强大巨龙——的特征。掷1d10并查阅随机龙能力表，或从前十个选项中选一个最可能影响故事或战斗的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hit or miss, the nearby area around the shadow dancer is filled with shadowy vapors until the end of the battle that make it difficult to see. Other creatures besides shadow dancers in the vapors take a –2 penalty to attacks and defenses.
ast.target: 无论命中与否，暗影舞者周围的近处区域都会充满阴影迷雾直到战斗结束，导致难以视物。除暗影舞者外，在迷雾中的其他生物攻击与防御都受到–2罚值。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每战斗1次，作为快速动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸性攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The battle shade can use its *earthen assault* ability this turn.
ast.target: 战斗阴影本回合可以使用其 *earthen assault* 能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use as a free action when a creature in the battle scores a critical hit.
ast.target: 当战斗中的某个生物打出重击时，作为自由动作使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blizzard dragon can make a blizzard breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 暴雪巨龙可以作为自由动作进行一次暴雪吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing cold damage instead of 5.
ast.target: 目标承受10点持续寒冷伤害，而非5点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A blizzard dragon can use blizzard breath as its standard action during the round after it uses the breath as a free action. Blizzard breath doesn’t deal miss damage to the dragon when used as a standard action.
ast.target: 暴风雪巨龙在其将暴风雪吐息作为自由动作使用后的下一轮，可以用标准动作再次使用暴风雪吐息。暴风雪吐息作为标准动作使用时不会对巨龙造成失手伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature makes a melee attack against the blood rose, that creature takes damage equal to its natural attack roll.
ast.target: 当生物对血玫瑰进行近战攻击时，该生物受到等同于其自然攻击掷骰点数的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the blood rose drops to 0 hit points, it is destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a death blossom or lich flower that lacks the red-yellow resurrection ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当血玫瑰降至0生命值时，它会被摧毁直到其下一回合开始。在其下一回合开始时，它会以死亡之花或巫妖花的形态复活，失去红黄复生能力，但在其他方面完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a bloody shade dies, one random nearby non-mook ally regains 2d6 hp.
ast.target: 当一名血影死亡时，附近一名随机的非小兵盟友恢复2d6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorcerer gains one use of the target’s racial power, if any. It must use that power by the end of the battle or lose it, and it can’t use the power this turn.
ast.target: 如果目标有种族能力，巫师获得一次使用该能力的机会。它必须在战斗结束前使用该能力，否则将失去该机会，而且本回合不能使用该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the blue sorcerer starts its turn and it didn’t gather power the previous turn, choose whether it will gather power or cast a spell this turn. When it chooses to cast a spell, roll a 1d20 to see if it uses a minor spell or a major spell: 1–10: minor spell; 11–20: major spell.
ast.target: 当蓝色巫师开始其回合且上一回合没有 gather power 时，选择它本回合是积蓄力量还是施放法术。当它选择施放法术时，掷1d20确定使用次级法术还是高级法术： 1–10： 次级法术； 11–20： 高级法术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the sorcerer’s power-monger rolls and attack rolls.
ast.target: 将升级骰加到巫师的 power-monger 检定和攻击检定中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack misses the sorcerer, the attacker takes the miss damage from that attack, if any, and the sorcerer takes no damage
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击未命中巫师时，攻击者承受该攻击的未命中伤害（如果有），而巫师不受伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the salamander is in an area with flames, lava, or that it has set on fire, it gets to use the escalation die, adding it to its attack rolls. Even when not fighting in such an environment, a salamander attacked with a spell or attack that deals fire damage gets to use the escalation die until the end of its next turn, or longer if it’s a powerful or lingering spell. Avoid casting fireball in battle with a salamander!
ast.target: 如果火蜥蜴处在有火焰、熔岩或由它引燃的区域，它可以使用升级骰并将其加到攻击检定中。即使不在这种环境中作战，被造成火焰伤害的法术或攻击命中时，火蜥蜴也可以使用升级骰直到其下一回合结束；若该法术强力或持续时间长，则可更久。与火蜥蜴作战时避免施放火球术！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks against the salamander must roll a natural 16+ attack roll or the attack does half damage. Whether or not such an attack hits, see *escalating inferno!*
ast.target: 对火蜥蜴的火焰攻击必须掷出自然16+的攻击检定，否则该攻击只造成一半伤害。无论此类攻击是否命中，见*escalating inferno!*

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target rolled an even save against the ongoing lightning damage, the target’s nearest ally takes 10 ongoing lightning damage.
ast.target: 若目标对持续闪电伤害的豁免掷出偶数，目标最近的盟友承受10点持续闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time this battle that the bluescale orb-bearer is hit by a magic spell or spell-like power it has no effect—the attack hits but does no damage, imposes no conditions, etc. Each time it’s hit this way thereafter, the bluescale takes no damage and can make an *arcane discharge* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 本场战斗中蓝鳞持球者第一次被魔法法术或类法术能力命中时没有任何效果—该攻击命中但不造成伤害、不施加任何状态等。此后每次以这种方式命中时，蓝鳞不受伤害并可作为自由动作进行一次*arcane discharge*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d10 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 该 dragonic 对被其近战攻击未命中的目标造成 2d10 额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make the bonded’s special attack (one of the below) as a quick action.
ast.target: 以一个快速动作进行 bonded 的特殊攻击（以下之一）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *storm gaze* attack against a new target.
ast.target: 对一个新的目标进行第二次 *storm gaze* 攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded’s crit range expands by a cumulative 1 (to a maximum of 16+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: bonded 的暴击范围累计扩大 1（最高至 16+），持续到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a *whirling steel* attack as a move action, unless you have already used the bonded’s move action this turn.
ast.target: 以一个移动动作进行一次 *whirling steel* 攻击，除非你本回合已经使用了 bonded 的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This bonded’s attacks ignore any sort of damage reduction or avoidance. You can’t make it re-roll the attack, teleport away to avoid damage, take half damage due to an ability, etc. If it rolls well enough to hit you then you take the full damage, end of story.
ast.target: 该 bonded 的攻击无视任何形式的伤害减免或规避。你不能让它重掷攻击，不能传送离开以避免伤害，也不能因某个能力而只受一半伤害等。如果它掷骰足够命中你，你就承受全部伤害，就这么简单。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of taking 50 damage, the target heals 30 damage. Each ally can only benefit from this healing once per battle.
ast.target: 目标不再承受 50 点伤害，而是恢复 30 点生命值。每个盟友每场战斗只能从此治疗中获益一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the attack beat the PD of a dead ally, instead of taking damage the ally returns to life with 20 hp (or their maximum hp if it is lower than 20). Each ally can only be targeted by eerie radiance once per battle. This effect only works on allies who have died during the battle.
ast.target: 如果该攻击超过一名已死亡盟友的 PD，则该盟友不再承受伤害，而是以 20 点 hp 复活（若其最大 hp 低于 20，则以其最大 hp 复活）。每个盟友每场战斗只能被 eerie radiance 作为目标一次。此效果仅对在战斗中死亡的盟友生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded’s eerie radiance also works against long-dead creatures, even returning corpses that are no more than dust and bones to full life. GMs beware, this is a very nasty special if the bonded prophet happens to be standing in a graveyard at the time.
ast.target: bonded 的 eerie radiance 也能作用于早已死亡的生物，甚至能让只剩尘埃与白骨的尸体恢复到完全生命。GMs 请注意，如果 bonded 先知恰好站在墓地里，这会是一个非常可怕的特殊效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded prophet’s mighty smite is even mightier if the PC has violated some taboo, broken a sacred law, or transgressed into a holy place. The attack deals an additional 20 force damage, hit or miss, even on a 1.
ast.target: 若PC违反了某种禁忌、破坏了神圣律法或擅闯圣地，誓契先知的强力猛击将更为强大。该攻击无论命中与否（即使掷出1），都会额外造成20点力场伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded pops free and flies until the end of its turn as a free action. It must land at the end of its turn, or take falling damage.
ast.target: 誓契者以自由动作脱离并飞行直到其回合结束。它必须在回合结束时落地，否则承受坠落伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes weakened and vulnerable (save ends), and the bonded can fly until the end of its next
ast.target: 目标变为虚弱且易伤（豁免结束），并且誓契者可以飞行直到其下个

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded makes this attack as a free action on somebody else’s turn.
ast.target: 誓契者在他人回合以自由动作进行此攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the bonded is hit, it has a +4 bonus to all defenses.
ast.target: 在誓契者被命中之前，其所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is teleported to the far side of the battlefield, and hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被传送到战场的远端，并被阻碍（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a *violent dispelling* attack as a quick action against the target, if it hits it does no damage but does dispel spells and spell-like effects.
ast.target: 以快速动作对目标进行一次*暴力驱散*攻击，若命中则不造成伤害，但会驱散法术及类法术效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed (easy save, 6+, ends).
ast.target: 目标陷入迟缓（容易豁免，6+，结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when a spell not granted by a talent hits the bonded, it has no effect. Later in the battle as a quick action the bonded can cast the spell that hit it, using the original caster’s attack and damage bonuses.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一个非由天赋授予的法术命中誓契者时，该法术无效。战斗后续，誓契者可用快速动作施放命中它的该法术，并使用原施法者的攻击与伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When one of the bonded’s attacks misses all targets, the bonded teleports as a free action.
ast.target: 当誓契者的一次攻击未命中任何目标时，誓契者以自由动作传送。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bonded’s violent dispelling attack "dispels" all manner of useful conditions, such as a rogue having momentum or a fighter having a higher crit range. In particular, this higher-strength version of the attack shuts down that really irritating effect that’s always being used by that one character.
ast.target: 缚誓者的猛烈驱散攻击会“驱散”各种有用的状态，比如盗贼拥有势头或战士拥有更高的重击范围。尤其是，这个更强版本的攻击会终止那个总是被某个角色使用、非常恼人的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a bone devil, one bone devil in the battle can teleport to a nearby location it can see as a move action once later this battle. Multiple attacks accumulate into multiple possible move action teleports for any bone devils in the battle.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对骨魔的攻击时，本场战斗中一只骨魔可以在之后的某个时刻以移动动作传送到它能看见的附近地点一次。多次攻击会累计为战斗中任意骨魔可进行多次移动动作传送的机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The devil’s doom venom sting attack also negates one spell effect created by the target until the target is able to use recoveries again. (The effect isn’t canceled, only suppressed until the target saves.)
ast.target: 恶魔的末日毒刺攻击还会使目标施放的一个法术效果失效，直到目标再次能够使用恢复为止。（该效果并未被取消，只是被压制，直到目标成功豁免。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: On rounds when the escalation die is odd, the imp may move as a quick action once on its turn, flapping its wings madly as it dashes about.
ast.target: 在升级骰为奇数的回合，小魔鬼在其回合中可以进行一次快速动作移动，疯狂拍动翅膀四处疾奔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 13+ to all damage from magic sources (even magic weapons). When a magic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 该生物对所有来自魔法来源的伤害具有13+抗性（包括魔法武器）。当魔法攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰上投出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On rounds when the escalation die is odd the imp may move as a quick action once on its turn, flapping its wings madly as it dashes about.
ast.target: 在升级骰为奇数的回合，小魔鬼在其回合中可以进行一次快速动作移动，疯狂拍动翅膀四处疾奔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 13+ to all damage from magic sources (even magic weapons). When a magic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 该生物对所有来自魔法来源的伤害具有13+抗性（包括魔法武器）。当魔法攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰上投出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this imp resists magic while the escalation die is odd, it takes no damage instead of half damage, and the crit range for all bone imp mage-eaters’ attacks expand by 1 (to a maximum of 6+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数且该小魔鬼抵抗魔法时，它不受伤害而不是只受一半伤害，并且所有骨小魔鬼噬法者的攻击重击范围扩大1（最多到6+），持续到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the tormentor imp hits with a natural even attack roll it does an extra 2d6 ongoing acid damage (easy save 6+ ends).
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当折磨者小魔鬼以自然偶数的攻击掷骰命中时，会额外造成2d6持续酸性伤害（容易豁免6+结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the boombug hits with gnawing teeth, the target takes a -5 penalty to disengage checks until it’s no longer engaged with the boombug.
ast.target: 当爆虫用啃咬之牙命中时，目标在脱离检定上受到-5惩罚，直到其不再与爆虫纠缠为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses a recovery, OR it must immediately roll a save; if it fails, it’s confused (save ends) (target’s choice).
ast.target: 目标失去一次恢复，或者它必须立即进行一次豁免；若失败，则陷入混乱（豁免结束）（由目标选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the brain-absorber xombie can take no actions during its turn to allow 1d4 nearby lower-level allies to take an extra standard action during their next turns.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，吸脑僵尸可以在其回合不采取任何动作，使1d4名附近的低等级盟友在其下个回合获得一次额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf assassin can green walk as a move action instead of a standard action this turn.
ast.target: 荆棘精灵刺客本回合可以以移动动作而非标准动作进行 green walk。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle make a barbed arrows attack as a quick action
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，以快速动作进行一次倒钩箭攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Once per battle when this monster reappears after its green walk it does triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[plant]。每场战斗一次，当该怪物在其 green walk 后重新出现时，它造成三倍伤害而非双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Once per battle when the escalation die is 4+ and this monster green walks it immediately gets another turn.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[undead]。每场战斗一次，当升级骰为4+且该怪物 green walks 时，它立即获得另一个回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this monster green walks it heals 1d4 x 20 hit points
ast.target: 当该怪物 green walks 时，它恢复1d4 x 20点生命值

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ongoing poison damage can’t be saved against while the briar elf that inflicted it still lives and is in the battle.
ast.target: 只要施加该效果的荆棘精灵仍然存活并在战斗中，这个持续性毒素伤害就无法被豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the briar elf is targeted by an opportunity attack, it makes a thorn claws attack against the creature that is targeting it first.
ast.target: 当荆棘精灵成为借机攻击的目标时，它会先对将其作为目标的生物进行一次荆棘利爪攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf can make the Bramble bow attack
ast.target: 荆棘精灵可以进行荆棘弓攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. This monster has resist weapons 16+ (weapon attacks that roll less than a natural 16 deal only half damage).
ast.target: 该怪物的类型是[植物]。该怪物具有武器抗性16+ （武器攻击的自然骰结果低于16时只造成一半伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Provided it is next to a tree, this monster can teleport to a different nearby tree as a move action.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型是[亡灵]。只要它在一棵树旁，该怪物就可以用一个移动动作传送到附近的另一棵树旁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker misses this monster with a melee attack, the attacker takes 12 damage.
ast.target: 当攻击者用近战攻击未命中该怪物时，攻击者受到12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to flesh to bark until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标直到战斗结束前对“肉身化树皮”变得易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target must make 4 last gasp saves, as it struggles to avoid turning into a tree.
ast.target: 目标必须进行4次濒死豁免，以挣扎避免变成一棵树。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, for one turn; storm of thorns becomes a quick action to use.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，持续一回合；使用“荆棘风暴”变为一个快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Every time the briar elf sorcerer misses with its flesh to bark attack, its crit range with that attack expands by 1.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[植物]。每当荆棘精灵术士以“血肉化树皮”攻击未命中时，该攻击的暴击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. This monster can phase through solid objects and creatures, but cannot end its turn inside another object or creature. The monster automatically disengages when it moves, and cannot be intercepted (unless the creature intercepting it is also phasing)
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[亡灵]。该怪物可以穿相通过固体物体与生物，但不能在另一个物体或生物内部结束其回合。该怪物移动时自动脱离，且不能被拦截（除非拦截它的生物也在穿相）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On turns when the escalation die is even, the briar elf sorcerer uses the escalation die, and each staggered adventurer does not.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数的回合，荆棘精灵术士使用升级骰，而每个被重创的冒险者不使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 80 ongoing damage. Aftereffect: When the target saves against the poison damage it becomes dazed (-4 attack) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 80点持续伤害。后效：当目标通过对毒素伤害的豁免时，直到其下回合结束前陷入恍惚（攻击-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle the target’s saves against poison damage all become hard saves (16+).
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，目标对毒素伤害的豁免均变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Whenever the briar elf sovereign is standing on soil and doesn’t move on its turn it heals 14 hit points.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[植物]。每当荆棘精灵君主站在土壤上且该回合未移动时，恢复14点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Other undead refuse to fight this monster (sorry necromancers). Cleric attack spells that target this monster only deal half damage on a hit.
ast.target: 该怪物的类型为[亡灵]。其他亡灵拒绝与该怪物战斗（抱歉，死灵法师）。牧师对其施放的攻击法术命中时仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf sovereign is no longer capped at three rerolls per round from the sovereign’s orders—it gets four when the escalation die is 4, five rerolls when the escalation die is 5, and can order six allies a round to reroll their attacks once the escalation die reaches 6.
ast.target: 荆棘精灵君主不再受限于君主的命令每轮仅三次重掷——当升级骰为4时有四次，升级骰为5时有五次重掷，而当升级骰达到6时，每轮可命令六名盟友重掷一次其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf can green walk as a move action instead of a standard action this turn.
ast.target: 本回合，荆棘精灵可以用移动动作而非标准动作进行“绿行”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provided the briar elf stalker is next to a tree, as a standard action they can step into the tree and disappear. At the start of their next turn they reappear next to another nearby tree, and hit or miss their attack does double damage.
ast.target: 只要棘精灵潜行者在树旁，它们就可以用一个标准动作踏入树中并消失。在它们下回合开始时，它们会出现在附近另一棵树旁，无论命中与否，其攻击都造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, make a barbed arrows attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，用一个快速动作进行一次倒刺箭攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. Once per battle when this monster reappears after its green walk it does triple damage instead of double damage.
ast.target: 该怪物类型为[plant]。每场战斗一次，当该怪物在其绿行后重新出现时，它造成三倍伤害而非双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [undead]. Once per battle when the escalation die is 4+, this monster green walks it immediately gets another turn.
ast.target: 该怪物类型为[undead]。每场战斗一次，当升阶骰为4+时，该怪物进行绿行后立即获得另一个回合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this monster green walks it heals 1d4 x 10 hit points.
ast.target: 当该怪物绿行时，它回复1d4 x 10生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster’s type is [plant]. This monster has resist weapons 16+ (weapon attacks that roll less than a natural 16 deal only half damage).
ast.target: 该怪物类型为[plant]。该怪物具有武器抗性16+（掷出自然16以下的武器攻击仅造成一半伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker misses this monster with a melee attack, the attacker takes 24 damage.
ast.target: 当攻击者用近战攻击未命中该怪物时，攻击者受到24点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The briar elf warrior has +4 to all its defenses against attacks by creatures suffering ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 棘精灵战士对承受持续毒素伤害的生物的攻击，其所有防御+4。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a briar elf next to a briar tree takes damage, half that damage is dealt to the tree instead.
ast.target: 当荆棘树旁的荆棘精灵受到伤害时，其中一半伤害改为由树承受。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They can move, but they still can’t be moved.
ast.target: 他们可以移动，但仍然无法被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there is at least one non-mook ally of the broken shade still in the fight, add another broken shade to the mob.
ast.target: 如果破碎幽影仍有至少一名非杂兵盟友在战斗中，则向该群体再加入一名破碎幽影。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Broken shades do not take miss damage from weapons.
ast.target: 破碎幽影不会受到武器的未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All taranar are resistant to physical damage as a result of their stony nature. If an assailant fails to make a natural roll of 16+ when using a weapon against a taranar, the attacker deals only half damage. The resistance also applies to negative energy damage, which tends to fizzle ineffectively against the ancient stones.
ast.target: 所有塔拉纳因其石质本性而具有物理伤害抗性。若攻击者用武器攻击塔拉纳时未掷出自然16+，则仅造成一半伤害。该抗性也适用于负能量伤害，负能量对这些古老石体往往会无效消散。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Being made of stone has its benefits. The taranar are immune to almost all effects—they cannot be dazed, weakened, confused, or made vulnerable to anything beyond those energies they are already vulnerable to (fire and cold; see below). Taranar are also immune to ongoing damage.
ast.target: 由石头构成自有其好处。塔拉纳几乎免疫所有效果—它们不会被眩晕、虚弱、混乱，也不会被赋予除其已易伤能量之外的任何易伤（火焰与寒冷；见下文）。塔拉纳也免疫持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bronze errants are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage one, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 青铜游侠免疫效果。他们不会被眩晕、虚弱、混乱、赋予易伤，也不会受到持续伤害影响。你可以伤到他们，但也仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bronze kingsguards are immune to effects. They can’t be dazed, weakened, confused, made vulnerable, or touched by ongoing damage. You can damage one, but that’s about it.
ast.target: 青铜王卫对效果免疫。他们不能被迟缓、虚弱、迷惑、易伤，也不会受到持续伤害。你只能对其造成伤害，仅此而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If both claws hit during the same turn, the bulette can make a terrible bite attack during its next turn as a standard action.
ast.target: 如果两次爪击在同一回合命中，掘地虫可以在其下一回合以标准动作进行一次可怕的啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bulette’s crit range expands to 16+ while the escalation die is 4+.
ast.target: 当升级骰为4+时，掘地虫的重击范围扩大至16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker scores a critical hit against the bulette and it survives, the bulette can make a terrible bite attack as a free action against one target engaged with it.
ast.target: 当攻击者对掘地虫造成重击且其存活时，掘地虫可以以自由动作对一个与其交战的目标进行一次可怕的啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cambion becomes cloaked until it’s hit by an attack against MD or until it misses with a natural odd attack roll.
ast.target: 半魔变为隐蔽状态，直到其被针对MD的攻击命中，或其以自然奇数的攻击检定未命中为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion dirk automatically succeeds on all disengage checks.
ast.target: 处于隐蔽时，半魔匕首所有脱离检定自动成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn, or if the cambion was cloaked when it attacked, the confusion is save ends.
ast.target: 目标陷入迷惑状态直到其下回合结束；若半魔在攻击时处于隐蔽状态，则迷惑为“豁免结束”。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 攻击者受到15点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cambion hellblade starts every battle cloaked. As a quick action, the hellblade can drop its cloaking to make a spiky headbutt attack as a free action.
ast.target: 半魔裔地狱刃每场战斗开始时处于隐身状态。作为快速动作，地狱刃可以解除隐身，并以自由动作进行带刺的头槌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion hellblade automatically succeeds on all disengage checks, gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against close and ranged attacks, and can drop its cloaking as a quick action to teleport to a nearby location it can see (instead of making an extra attack).
ast.target: 处于隐身状态时，半魔裔地狱刃自动通过所有脱离检定，对抗近战与远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值，并且可以作为快速动作解除隐身，传送到其可见的附近位置（替代一次额外攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 攻击者受到5点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion katar automatically succeeds on all disengage checks and gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against close and ranged attacks.
ast.target: 处于隐身状态时，半魔裔卡塔尔自动通过所有脱离检定，对抗近战与远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While cloaked, the cambion sickle automatically succeeds on all disengage checks and gains a +2 bonus to all defenses against ranged attacks.
ast.target: 处于隐身状态时，半魔裔镰刀自动通过所有脱离检定，对抗远程攻击的所有防御获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its caustic breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 若其腐蚀吐息已耗尽，巨龙将恢复使用，并可在下个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in the haze, the target is dazed from choking or blinding.
ast.target: 处于雾霭中时，目标因窒息或致盲而昏眩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in the haze, the target takes a -5 penalty to all saves against acid damage.
ast.target: 处于雾霭中时，目标对抗酸蚀伤害的所有豁免检定-5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A catacomb dragon flies reasonably well, powerful and fast in a straight line though it’s not as maneuverable as more agile flyers. It can also burrow quickly and effectively due to the acidic coating on its skin.
ast.target: 墓穴巨龙飞行尚可，直线飞行时强劲迅速，但不如更敏捷的飞行者灵活。由于皮肤上的酸性涂层，它也能快速而有效地掘地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸蚀攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the DC to sneak past cave orcs silently by +5.
ast.target: 潜行无声地绕过洞穴兽人的DC提高+5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the battle is at night (or in darkness), the orc gains a +2 attack bonus. If the battle is during the day (or in daylight) it takes a -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 若战斗在夜间（或黑暗中），兽人获得+2攻击加值。若战斗在白天（或日光下），其所有防御承受-2惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cenotaph dragon can make an infused ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 墓冢巨龙可以以自由动作进行一次灌注寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing holy damage (in addition to double damage for crit).
ast.target: 目标还会受到5点持续圣光伤害（此外暴击仍为双倍伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷或负能量攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each of the champion’s centaur allies in the battle gains a +5 damage bonus with ranged attacks.
ast.target: 战斗中冠军的每个半人马盟友，其远程攻击获得+5伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标还会陷入恍惚状态，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur lancer can make a kick attack as a free action.
ast.target: 半人马枪骑兵可以以自由动作进行一次踢击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur lancer gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 人马枪骑兵获得对借机攻击的 +4 AC 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur raider can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 人马掠袭者本回合可以进行一个额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur raider gains a +4 AC bonus against opportunity attacks and only takes half damage from opportunity attacks that hit it.
ast.target: 人马掠袭者获得对借机攻击的 +4 AC 加值，并且仅承受命中它的借机攻击一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur ranger can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 人马游侠本回合可以进行一个额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The centaur ranger can make a second (but not a third) longbow attack this turn as a free action.
ast.target: 人马游侠本回合可以以自由动作进行第二次（但不能第三次）长弓攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (save ends) instead of hampered.
ast.target: 目标变为被缠住（豁免结束），而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 7 damage, and the chaos beast can make another bestial chaos attack as a free action.
ast.target: 造成7点伤害，并且混沌兽可以以自由动作再进行一次兽性混沌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once a chaos beast is staggered, it can combine with another chaos beast next to it as a quick action to become a full-strength chaos brute acting on this beast’s initiative. Replace the other beast with a chaos glorp mook.
ast.target: 一旦混沌兽陷入踉跄，它可以以快速动作与相邻的另一只混沌兽合并，成为满强度的混沌蛮力兽，并按该混沌兽的先攻行动。将另一只兽替换为一个混沌黏液兽杂兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die reaches 6, the chaos glorp rolls a normal save. If it succeeds, it transforms into a chaos beast with full hit points.
ast.target: 当升级骰到达 6 时，混沌黏团进行一次正常豁免。若成功，它会变形为一只混沌野兽并恢复至满生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the attack, this head may shift into a new head; roll 1d6 to determine the new (or maybe repeated!) head.
ast.target: 攻击后，这个头可能会变成一个新头；掷 1d6 来决定新（或可能重复！）的头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll 1d4; 1: Later this turn, hydra can teleport somewhere nearby as a quick action, 2: Hydra gains flight until the end of its next turn, 3: The next attack which hits the hydra must be rerolled with a -2 attack penalty, 4: GM: roll on the High Weirdness Table and apply the result in the most amusing way possible.
ast.target: 掷 1d4；1：本回合稍后，九头蛇可以以迅捷动作传送到附近某处，2：九头蛇获得飞行直到其下个回合结束，3：下一次命中九头蛇的攻击必须在 -2 攻击减值下重掷，4：GM：在“高度怪异表”上掷骰，并以最有趣的方式应用结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On its turn, the chaos hydra can use any of its teeth attacks against nearby creatures it can see and get to, but has a -2 attack penalty when using teeth attacks against creatures it not engaged with.
ast.target: 在其回合中，混沌九头蛇可以对附近它能看见且能到达的生物使用任意牙齿攻击，但对未与其交战的生物使用牙齿攻击时有 -2 攻击减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chaos hydra’s attacks deal full damage against creatures it has not already hit this turn. If the chaos hydra attacks a creature it has hit earlier in the turn, the attack only deals half damage, hit or miss or crit.
ast.target: 混沌九头蛇对本回合尚未命中过的生物造成全额伤害。若混沌九头蛇攻击本回合早些时候已命中过的生物，则该次攻击只造成一半伤害，无论命中、未命中或暴击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the chaos hydra would suffer any of the following conditions, it ignores the condition and takes 10 damage instead: confused, dazed, hampered, stunned, or weakened.
ast.target: 当混沌九头蛇将遭受以下任一状态时，它无视该状态并改为承受 10 点伤害：困惑、恍惚、妨碍、昏迷或虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 70 hit points and a random fifth head. Roll 1d6 to determine which head. The chaos hydra is considered undamaged at its new hit point total. Using the hydra’s current hit points as a new baseline, the hydra will be staggered again when it drops below 50% of that total.
ast.target: 九头蛇第一次进入重伤时，作为自由动作获得 70 点生命值并长出一个随机的第五个头。掷 1d6 决定是哪一个头。混沌九头蛇在其新的生命值总量下被视为未受伤。以九头蛇当前生命值作为新的基准，当其降到该总量的 50% 以下时会再次进入重伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The second time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 70 hit points and a random sixth head, etc. Use a new hit point baseline as before, but there is no seventh head waiting to sprout.
ast.target: 九头蛇第二次进入重伤时，作为自由动作获得 70 点生命值并长出一个随机的第六个头，依此类推。像之前一样使用新的生命值基准，但没有第七个头会再长出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of the chimera’s next turn from a headbutt.
ast.target: 目标被撞击致晕，直到奇美拉下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing damage from raking claws.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续伤害（撕裂利爪）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature misses the chimera with a melee attack, the chimera’s multiple sharp bits deal 3d10 damage to that attacker.
ast.target: 当生物以近战攻击未命中奇美拉时，奇美拉的多处尖锐部位对该攻击者造成3d10伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attacker scores a critical hit against the chimera and it survives, its attack rolls on its next turn deal the effects of the lower rolls as well as their own results.
ast.target: 当攻击者对奇美拉造成重击且其存活时，奇美拉下个回合的攻击骰除了正常结果外，还会产生较低骰的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered and weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标受阻且虚弱（豁免结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is instead helpless (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 改为目标无助（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a psychic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当心灵攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击骰必须掷出自然16+，否则仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Chuuls swim well and can breathe underwater, though they prefer not to.
ast.target: 丘尔游泳能力强，也能在水下呼吸，但它们更不喜欢这样。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when the chuul misses with an attack, its next attack that battle deals 4d6 extra poison damage on a hit.
ast.target: 每轮一次，当丘尔一次攻击未命中时，它在该场战斗中的下一次攻击命中会额外造成4d6点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuulish slave can make a writhing tentacles attack against that target as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 楚尔奴隶本回合可以对该目标以快速动作进行一次扭动触手攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The slave gains a +2 AC bonus.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The writhing tentacles attack also deals 10 acid damage on a hit.
ast.target: 扭动触手攻击命中时还会造成10点酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack hits the chuulish slave, the attacker takes 10 poison damage.
ast.target: 当一次近战攻击命中楚尔奴隶时，攻击者受到10点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The slave is a large blob-like mess. It has 72 HP but takes a -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 奴隶是一大团胶状的糟物。它有72点生命值，但所有防御承受-2减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm can make a sharp claws attack this turn as a quick action instead of a standard action.
ast.target: 兽群本回合可以用快速动作进行一次锋利利爪攻击，而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm flies fast and is agile, but has a wide turning circle.
ast.target: 兽群飞行迅速且敏捷，但转弯半径很大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When any attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当任何攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Requires a standard action to reload, starts the battle loaded.
ast.target: 需要一个标准动作装填，战斗开始时已装填。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower takes 1d4 damage from burst roots.
ast.target: 爪花受到爆裂根须造成的1d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 4 psychic damage, and the target is confused until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 4点心灵伤害，且目标陷入困惑直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3 psychic damage, and the target is stuck until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 3点心灵伤害，且目标被困住直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower has roots and normally can’t move, but when it takes 10 or more damage from a single attack it can move normally during its next turn.
ast.target: 爪花有根，通常不能移动，但当它在一次攻击中受到10点或更多伤害时，它在其下一回合可正常移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The claw flower adds the escalation die to its bumble spores attack rolls.
ast.target: 爪花将升级骰加入其嗡嗡孢子攻击掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the claw flower can make a bumble spores attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，爪花可作为快速动作进行一次嗡嗡孢子攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack hits this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 11+ on the attack roll or it misses instead. That’s all attacks.
ast.target: 当一次攻击命中该生物时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然11+，否则改为未命中。适用于所有攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses any flight abilities and can’t gain flight in any way (save ends).
ast.target: 目标失去任何飞行能力，且无法以任何方式获得飞行（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The thane can make a chains and shrapnel attack as a free action.
ast.target: 领主可以作为自由动作进行一次锁链与弹片攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The clubtail can make a second attack.
ast.target: 棍尾可以进行第二次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 鞋匠吸血蝙蝠受到3点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cobbler has stubby ill-proportioned wings and takes 1d6 damage at the end of each round that it flies during battle.
ast.target: 鞋匠有短小且不成比例的翅膀，在战斗中每个飞行的回合结束时受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A coin collector zombie that spends its standard action stuffing coins into its mouth (or directly into its gut if there’s a convenient hole) heals 3d6 hit points. It normally doesn’t spend its time this way in combat, but who can predict collectors?
ast.target: 一个硬币收藏家僵尸若用标准动作把硬币塞进嘴里（如果有合适的洞则直接塞进肚子里），就会恢复3d6点生命值。它通常不会在战斗中这样浪费时间，但谁能预测收藏家呢？

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against the coin collector zombie cancels its lethal payout attack.
ast.target: 对硬币收藏家僵尸造成重击会使其致命分赃攻击失效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a coin zombie cancels one mook’s lethal jackpot ability that turn, though if the crit eliminates more than one coin zombie, others will still trigger their own lethal jackpots.
ast.target: 对硬币僵尸造成重击会在该回合使一个杂兵的致命头奖能力失效；不过如果该重击消灭了不止一个硬币僵尸，其余仍会触发各自的致命头奖。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If you’re feeling merciful, say that a PC can use a quick action to pocket some of the coins and grants a +2 bonus to the save against the ongoing psychic damage from the lethal jackpot attack.
ast.target: 如果你手下留情，可以说一名PC能用快速动作把一些硬币装进口袋，并在对抗致命头奖攻击造成的持续精神伤害的豁免检定上获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值为120或更低时，它因恐惧而恍惚，攻击时不加升级骰（豁免结束全部）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a holy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次圣力攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant takes 15 or more fire damage from a single attack, it releases all grabbed creatures.
ast.target: 当树人从单次攻击中受到15点或更多火焰伤害时，它会释放所有被抓住的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is vulnerable to the dybbuk’s attacks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前易受迪布克的攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk gains a fear aura against the target (save ends) as the dybbuk warps its corpse-flesh into a horrifying form. While engaged with the dybbuk, if the scared target has 30 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 迪布克将其尸肉扭曲成骇人的形态，获得针对目标的恐惧光环（豁免结束）。与迪布克缠斗时，若受惊目标生命值为30或更少，则其恍惚（攻击-4），且其攻击不添加升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action, the corpse dybbuk can grant a nearby ally a +2 bonus to attack and damage until the end of the battle. The warped ally takes damage equal to its level each time it uses a standard action to attack. If this ability is expended, the dybbuk regains it when the escalation die reaches 4+.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，尸体迪布克可使附近一名盟友在战斗结束前获得攻击与伤害+2加值。被扭曲的盟友每次用标准动作攻击时都会受到等同其等级的伤害。若该能力已消耗，当升级骰达到4+时，迪布克将重新获得该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only requires a quick action (once per round) to use.
ast.target: 该攻击仅需一个迅捷动作（每轮一次）即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a holy or poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当神圣或毒素攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然16+，否则仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Couatls fly and hover so smoothly on their multi-colored wings that other flyers get jealous.
ast.target: 库阿特尔凭借多彩的翅膀飞行与悬停得如此平滑，以至于其他飞行者都会嫉妒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the couatl adds the escalation die to its attack rolls.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，库阿特尔将升级骰加到其攻击检定中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The couatl can use more than one rippling scales attack during its turn.
ast.target: 库阿特尔在其回合内可以使用不止一次涟漪鳞片攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per campaign, the couatl can take a “campaign loss” similar to the PC-oriented flee special action to escape from certain death, along with its allies.
ast.target: 每个战役一次，库阿特尔可以采取类似面向PC的“逃跑”特殊动作的“战役损失”，与其盟友一起从必死中逃脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose each appropriate ability from the couatl’s Icon-centered Abilities list.
ast.target: 从库阿特尔的“图标中心能力”列表中选择每个合适的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a scorpion sting attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 曼提柯尔可以对另一个目标进行一次蝎刺攻击，作为一个自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While flying, the manticore can make a scorpion sting attack, pop free from the target, and keep flying to somewhere nearby.
ast.target: 飞行时，曼提柯尔可以进行一次蝎刺攻击，从目标身上挣脱，并继续飞向附近某处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Giant batlike dragon wings put the final horrid touch on the coursing manticore’s “everything awful” design aesthetic.
ast.target: 巨大的蝙蝠般龙翼为狂奔的曼提柯尔那种“无一不恐怖”的设计美学添上最后的骇人一笔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its scorpion sting attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每当曼提柯尔使用蝎刺攻击时，它会受到1d6伤害；如果处于踉跄状态，则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instead of a scorpion tail, the manticore has a spiked tail full of quills and can make volley of tail spikes attacks instead of scorpion sting attacks.
ast.target: 曼提柯尔没有蝎尾，而是有一条布满尖刺的尾巴，可以用尾刺齐射攻击代替蝎刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the crimsoncap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the crimsoncap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see or can’t see (like inside a closet) as a free action.
ast.target: 当猩红帽造成暴击，或当一名PC或桌上的玩家说出坏词时，猩红帽可以作为自由动作瞬移到附近一个它能看见或看不见的隐蔽地点（比如衣橱里）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crimsoncap has two bad words instead of one. And the PCs find that out the hard way. Write the words down ahead of time to prove you’re not just being a mean GM.
ast.target: 猩红帽有两个坏词而不是一个。PC们会以惨痛的方式发现这一点。提前把这些词写下来，以证明你并不是在当个刻薄的GM。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the crustycap can take an extra standard action during its next turn. Feel free to let the extra actions stack a few times if someone gets cocky.
ast.target: 当一名PC或桌上的玩家说出坏词时，老痂帽在下个回合可以获得一个额外标准动作。如果有人得意忘形，随意让这些额外动作叠加几次也无妨。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also moves down 1d6 points in initiative order.
ast.target: 目标在先攻顺序中还要下移1d6点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die does not increase the round after a dawn zorigami drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 当黎明折纸怪降至0 hp后的那一轮，升级骰不会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A creature that is reduced to a negative initiative count in a battle involving one or more dawn zorigami moves forward in time, reappearing somewhere nearby in a number of minutes equal to their negative initiative count, presumably long after the current battle is over. The target may be confused by this effect, since the ways of zorigami are mysterious.
ast.target: 在涉及一个或多个黎明折纸的战斗中，先攻值被降为负数的生物会向未来前进，在等同于其负先攻值的分钟数后于附近某处重新出现，通常是在当前战斗结束很久之后。由于折纸之道神秘莫测，目标可能会对这一效果感到困惑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 1d6 extra negative energy damage for each unexpended recovery it has.
ast.target: 目标每拥有一个未消耗的恢复次数，就会额外受到1d6点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target currently has less than its maximum recoveries, it gains a recovery! Gaining a recovery is not healing, but it can use that recovery later to heal as normal.
ast.target: 如果目标当前的恢复次数少于其最大值，它获得一次恢复！获得恢复次数不是治疗，但它之后可以像平常一样使用该恢复来治疗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the death blossom drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a blood rose or poison dandelion that lacks the black-gray resurgence ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当死亡花绽降至0点生命值时，它会被摧毁直到其下回合开始。在其下回合开始时，它会作为血玫瑰或毒蒲公英复活，但不具备黑灰复苏能力，除此之外毫发无损且完整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nearby targets who attack the death knight and roll a 1 take 20 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 附近攻击死亡骑士且掷出1的目标受到20点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the death knight is riding a phantomaton horse, the phantomaton isn’t strong enough to do a whole lot on its own, just count it as a nastier special while ignoring the phantomaton’s other stats. As a standard action the phantomaton horse can make the trample on its turn while it is still mid-move.
ast.target: 如果死亡骑士骑乘幻机马，幻机本身不足以做太多事，只需将其视为更凶狠的特殊效果并忽略幻机的其他数据。作为一个标准动作，幻机马可以在仍处于移动中时在其回合进行践踏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle, when the target tries to spend a recovery they have to succeed at a save (11+) first. If they fail, they haven’t used their action but can’t spend recoveries that turn.
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，目标尝试消耗恢复次数时必须先成功一次豁免（11+）。若失败，他们未消耗自己的动作，但该回合无法消耗恢复次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The save to spend a recovery is now a hard save (16+).
ast.target: 用于消耗恢复次数的豁免现在为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the battle the target cannot spend recoveries.
ast.target: 直到战斗结束，目标无法消耗恢复次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death markers can float on unseen winds, moving through solid objects and creatures as though they were not there. The death marker must still end its move on solid ground and not inside an object or creature.
ast.target: 死亡标记可以借着看不见的风漂浮，穿过固体物体和生物，仿佛它们不存在一样。死亡标记仍必须在坚实地面结束移动，不能在物体或生物体内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标眩晕直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death shades can hover and fly about easily.
ast.target: 死亡影灵可以轻松悬停并飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can now only save against the confusion with a natural 20 (or until the warbanner drops) and can’t flee if the rest of the PCs choose to do so.
ast.target: 目标现在只能通过自然20对抗困惑（或直到战旗落下），且若其他PC选择撤退，则目标无法逃离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round as a quick action, the warbanner can fly directly above a lower-level ally in its band and designate that ally as its bearer. Alternately, it can release itself from a bearer and fly free.
ast.target: 每回合一次作为快速动作，战旗可以飞到其队伍中一名较低等级盟友的正上方，并指定该盟友为旗手。或者，它可以从旗手处脱离，自由飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mooks fighting in the warbanner’s band gain a bonus to their hit points equal to the warbanner’s level (3).
ast.target: 在战旗队伍中作战的小兵获得等同于战旗等级（3）的生命值加成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The deep bulette’s crit range expands by 4 while the escalation die is 4+.
ast.target: 当升级骰为4+时，深渊掘地兽的重击范围扩大4。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, and only targeting a creature that is presently saving against the effect of a Protector Icon priest’s staff attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，且只能以当前正在对守护者圣像祭司的法杖攻击效果进行豁免的生物为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever an attacker hits the ranger with a melee attack, that creature takes 1d6 damage as the bow chews on it.
ast.target: 每当攻击者以近战攻击命中游侠时，该生物会受到1d6点伤害，仿佛弓正在啃咬它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 2 ongoing poison damage (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到2点持续毒素伤害（正常豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标陷入目眩（正常豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby ally gains a +4 bonus to hit on its next attack.
ast.target: 一名附近的盟友在其下一次攻击中获得+4命中加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/ battle, and generally after trying to corrupt at least one icon relationship.
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，通常在尝试腐化至少一个圣像关系之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarket takes 10 ongoing fire damage
ast.target: tarket 受到10点持续火焰伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the derro berserker is staggered, it deals 4 extra damage when it hits with an attack.
ast.target: 当德罗狂战士处于踉跄状态时，它在攻击命中时造成额外4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro berserker ignores the first 6 points of damage it takes each turn.
ast.target: 德罗狂战士在每个回合受到的前6点伤害会被忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a derro berserker drops to 0 hp, it doesn’t die. Instead, it can take one final turn, and then it dies. Once the berserker drops, it can’t be healed.
ast.target: 当德罗狂战士降至0 hp时，它不会死亡。相反，它可以再行动最后一个回合，然后死亡。一旦狂战士倒下，就无法被治疗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro can cast one of the following close-quarters spells as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 德罗本回合可以用快速动作施放以下近战法术之一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到5点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the derro maniac can make another light repeating crossbow attack as a free action.
ast.target: 同上，且德罗狂徒可以用自由动作再进行一次轻型连发弩攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby derro gain a +1 bonus to attacks and defenses until the end of the derro maniac’s next turn (cumulative).
ast.target: 所有附近的德罗在德罗狂徒的下个回合结束前攻击与防御获得+1加值（可累积）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Two random nearby non-derro creatures take 2d4 thunder damage.
ast.target: 附近两个随机的非德罗生物受到2d4点雷霆伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro sage can make another mind scream attack against a different nearby target as a free action.
ast.target: 德罗贤者可以用自由动作对另一个附近目标再进行一次心灵尖啸攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby derro gain a +1 bonus to attacks and defenses until end of the derro sage’s next turn (cumulative).
ast.target: 所有附近的德罗在德罗贤者的下个回合结束前攻击与防御获得+1加值（可累积）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Two random nearby non-derro creatures take 2d8 thunder damage.
ast.target: 附近两个随机的非德罗生物受到2d8点雷霆伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The derro sage starts a group of derro gibbering as a quick action. It can maintain the gibber as a free action at the start of each turn by taking 1 damage. Each nearby non-derro creature that hears the gibber must roll a d6 at the start of its turn and takes psychic damage equal to the die roll or to the number of gibbering derro, whichever is lower.
ast.target: 德罗贤者以迅捷动作让一群德罗开始胡言乱语。它可在每个回合开始时承受1点伤害，以自由动作维持胡言乱语。每个听到胡言乱语的附近非德罗生物，必须在其回合开始时掷一个d6，并受到等于掷骰结果或胡言乱语的德罗数量（取较低者）的心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is teleported to a nearby location the seer can see. It can’t be moved directly into dangerous terrain, over a cliff, etc.
ast.target: 目标被传送到预言者可见的附近地点。不能被直接移动到危险地形、悬崖外等位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The seer is dazed until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 预言者恍惚直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, the seer can teleport a nearby ally it can see to any location that the seer can see.
ast.target: 作为迅捷动作，预言者可以将一个其可见的附近盟友传送到预言者可见的任意地点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, as an interrupt action when a critical hit is scored against the derro seer’s ally, the seer can turn it into a normal hit instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当对德罗预言者的盟友造成暴击时，预言者可作为打断动作将其改为普通命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each turn that the seer teleports an ally using not here but there, that ally heals 4 hp.
ast.target: 每回合第一次，预言者使用“不是这里而是那里”传送盟友时，该盟友恢复4点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s closest nearby ally takes 4 psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标最近的附近盟友受到4点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The despoiler can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 掠夺者可以从目标处挣脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The despoiler mage can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 掠夺法师可以从目标处挣脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes extra damage equal to half the amount the destroying sword took from the last attack that hit it this battle.
ast.target: 目标受到额外伤害，等于本场战斗中摧毁之剑在上一次被命中时所受伤害的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The destroying sword takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 毁灭之剑在豁免检定上承受 -5 罚值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes +2d6 damage from a claw swipe.
ast.target: 目标受到一次爪击造成的 +2d6 伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll randomly unless you know this beast’s story already.
ast.target: 除非你已经了解这只野兽的故事，否则随机掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dire boar can make a bash attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 巨凶野猪可以作为自由动作对另一个目标进行一次猛撞攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: pile on damage to drop it to -60 hp, or trust the save roll to go their way.)
ast.target: 继续叠加伤害把它降到 -60 生命值，或相信豁免掷骰会对他们有利。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +1 attack bonus per other dire rat engaged with the target it’s attacking.
ast.target: 每有一只与其攻击目标交战的其他巨凶鼠，该生物获得 +1 攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to attack and damage for each other ally engaged with the target (max +4 bonus).
ast.target: 每有一名与目标交战的其他盟友，该生物在攻击与伤害上获得 +2 加值（最多 +4 加值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disgraced legionnaire can make a *confusing orders* attack as a free action
ast.target: 蒙羞军团士兵可作为自由动作进行一次 *confusing orders* 攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is also confused (same save ends).
ast.target: 目标也陷入困惑（相同豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increases the escalation die by 1 (cumulative), and until the end of the battle, the djinn adds the escalation die to its attacks
ast.target: 升级骰+1（可叠加），并且直到战斗结束，灯神在其攻击中加入升级骰

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn
ast.target: 目标直到其下回合结束前处于受阻状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the djinn gains resist spell damage 16+ against all spells except those cast by a PC that has at least a one point icon relationship with the icon that is channeling the djinn.
ast.target: 未处于踉跄时，灯神获得 法术伤害抗性 16+ ，对所有法术生效，除非该法术由与正在引导灯神的图标至少有一点图标关系的PC施放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the djinn has resist melee damage 16+.
ast.target: 未处于踉跄时，灯神具有 近战伤害抗性 16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The djinn takes a –1 penalty to all defenses. While not staggered, its crit range expands by 3.
ast.target: 灯神所有防御受到 –1 罚值。未处于踉跄时，其重击范围扩大3。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the target is engaged with the salamander, it will use its move and standard actions to move and become engaged with the salamander!
ast.target: 直到目标与火蜥蜴交战为止，它会使用移动动作和标准动作来移动并与火蜥蜴进入交战！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any unattended flammable objects ignite (straw in a stable, the party’s tents, trees, etc.) and nearby liquids boil. Provided that there was anything flammable in the area the salamander gets to use its escalating inferno power.
ast.target: 任何无人看管的易燃物都会点燃（如马厩里的稻草、队伍的帐篷、树木等），附近液体沸腾。只要区域内有可燃物，火蜥蜴即可使用其递增炼狱能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a specter is in the battle, the PCs don’t add the escalation die to attack rolls, but it does.
ast.target: 当战斗中有幽魂时，PC们不会将升级骰加入攻击检定，但它会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drider can make a poison bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 蛛化精灵可以以自由动作进行毒咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reduce the drow cavalry’s attack damage by 50 when it’s not riding a spider.
ast.target: 当卓尔骑兵未骑乘蜘蛛时，其攻击伤害减少50。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bite—The spider makes a bite attack.
ast.target: 啃咬—蜘蛛进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Web—The spider makes a web attack.
ast.target: 蛛网—蜘蛛进行一次蛛网攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the spider-mage misses with an attack, the crit range of attacks by drow and spiders in the battle expands by 1.
ast.target: 每当蛛网法师一次攻击未命中时，本场战斗中卓尔和蜘蛛的攻击暴击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the spider-sorceress misses with an attack, the crit range of attacks by drow and spiders in the battle expands by 1.
ast.target: 每当蛛网女术士一次攻击未命中时，本场战斗中卓尔和蜘蛛的攻击暴击范围扩大1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round when an attack misses the sword maiden, she can move or make a cruel cutlass attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，当一次攻击未命中剑之侍女时，她可以移动或以自由动作进行一次 残酷弯刀 攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal damage equal to the natural d20 roll to both the target and the drudge citizen.
ast.target: 对目标与卑民市民造成等同于自然d20掷骰点数的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the drudge moves it does not provoke opportunity attacks and if it makes a clumsy scythe attack immediately after it moves it gets a +2 bonus to its attack and deals half damage on a miss.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，卑民移动时不会引发借机攻击，且若它在移动后立即进行一次笨拙镰刀攻击，其攻击获得+2加值，并在未命中时造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the drudge gets to reroll a missed clumsy scythe attack, and deals 5 damage if it still miss.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，卑民可以重掷一次未命中的笨拙镰刀攻击，若仍未命中则造成5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t heal using its own recoveries (save ends).
ast.target: 目标不能使用自己的恢复来治疗（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die increases by one.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The escalation die decreases by one.

ast.name: description
ast.source: While it’s staggered, the dusk zorigami uses the escalation die.
ast.target: 当它处于踉跄状态时，dusk zorigami使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The earthshaker can use whipcrack only when the escalation die is even. With such a long tail, it takes the earthshaker a little time to ready its inbuilt whip.
ast.target: earthshaker只有在升级骰为偶数时才能使用鞭击。由于尾巴很长，earthshaker需要一点时间来准备其内置的鞭子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The adjudicator can make an *echo of decay* attack as a free action.
ast.target: adjudicator可以作为自由动作进行一次*衰朽回响*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an adjudicator is damaged, its glyphed flesh heals 10 hit points at the start of the adjudicator’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit. When the adjudicator is hit by an attack that deals acid or force damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn. Dropping an adjudicator to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 当adjudicator受伤时，在adjudicator回合开始时，其刻符的肉体会恢复10点生命值。每场战斗可再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则该次再生不计入五次限制。当adjudicator被造成酸或力场伤害的攻击命中时，它失去一次再生次数，并且在其下一回合无法再生。若adjudicator仍有剩余再生次数，将其降至0 hp并不会杀死它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the damage.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes a –4 penalty to all its defenses until the end of the eye’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标的所有防御受到–4减值，直到该之眼下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle after the Ebon Gauntlet eye has hit with at least one mind spike attack.
ast.target: 每战1次，在黑檀护手之眼至少一次以心灵尖刺攻击命中后可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per hit it has scored this battle, as a move action, the eye can teleport to any nearby location it can see.
ast.target: 本场战斗中它每次命中后，可作为移动动作，之眼传送到任何它能看到的附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, as an interrupt action, the eye can gain resist damage 18+ against attacks that target AC or PD. The resistance ends when the eye makes an attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为打断动作，该眼睛可以获得对以AC或PD为目标的攻击的抗性18+。当该眼睛进行一次攻击时，该抗性结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once a round, as a quick action, the inquisitor can spur a nearby ally into making an at-will attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，作为一个快速动作，审判官可以激励附近的一名盟友以自由动作进行一次随意攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses all fire resistance until the end of the battle and is hampered (save ends)
ast.target: 目标失去所有火焰抗性直到战斗结束，并受到阻碍（豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Efreet don’t fly as well or as quickly as djinn, but they are able to get around okay.
ast.target: 伊弗利特的飞行不如精灵般那样好或快，但它们依然能很好地行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: f you want an efreet to be even tougher, add a nastier special depending on which icon or icons the efreet is presently working for. The abilities represent the innate magic of the genie being channeled through the influence of the icon.
