ast.target: 如果你想让伊弗利特更强，依据它当前效力的图标添加一个更凶狠的特殊能力。这些能力代表精怪的天生魔法通过图标影响被引导出来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The eidolon can make its divine proclamation this turn as a quick action, but it is still only once per battle.
ast.target: 该神像本回合可以以快速动作进行神圣宣告，但仍然每场战斗仅一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: PCs with positive icon relationships with the Religious Icon roll those dice at the start of the battle, until the end of the battle subtract the total rolled amount from any holy damage the adventurer would otherwise take. This includes holy damage from creatures that are not the eidolon.
ast.target: 与宗教图标有正向关系的PC在战斗开始时掷那些骰子，直到战斗结束，将掷出的总点数从冒险者本应承受的任何神圣伤害中扣除。这也包括来自非神像生物的神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the eidolon makes its divine proclamation, natural odd attack rolls against it miss.
ast.target: 在神像进行神圣宣告之前，对它的攻击掷出自然奇数即未命中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a damage type for the attack: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder.
ast.target: 为该攻击选择一种伤害类型：酸、寒冷、火焰、闪电、毒素或雷霆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose a damage type for the attack: force, holy, negative energy, or psychic.
ast.target: 为该攻击选择一种伤害类型：力场、神圣、负能量或心灵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the eidolon grabs the target if doesn’t already have a creature grabbed.
ast.target: 同上，且若该幻灵尚未抓住任何生物，则抓住目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The naga gains resist spell damage 16+ against the target spells until the end of the battle
ast.target: 在战斗结束前，那伽对目标法术获得法术伤害抗性16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到15点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入混乱（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被阻碍，直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The elder wendigo can walk on the wind. It is not a graceful flyer, but it moves as fast as the wind that carries it.
ast.target: 上古温迪戈可以踏风而行。它不是优雅的飞行者，但移动速度如同承载它的风一般迅捷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the elder wendigo scores a critical hit against a target or drops a target to 0 hp or lower, that creature must permanently change one of its icon relationship points to a relationship with a different icon—one of a few that the GM chooses. Alternatively, a point the character already has with one of those icons changes to involve another icon (of the PC’s choice).
ast.target: 当上古温迪戈对目标造成暴击，或将目标打至0点生命值或更低时，该生物必须永久将其一个图标关系点改为与另一个图标的关系——由GM从少数几个图标中选择。或者，角色已拥有的其中一个图标关系点改为涉及另一个图标（由PC选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a ranged attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll 2d20 and take the lowest result.
ast.target: 当远程攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须掷2d20并取较低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature rolls a natural even hit with an attack, it can pop free from the target of that attack.
ast.target: 当该生物以攻击掷出自然偶数命中时，它可以从该攻击的目标处挣脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any attack against this creature’s nearby ally that deals lightning damage instead targets this creature.
ast.target: 任何对该生物附近盟友的闪电伤害攻击都会改为以该生物为目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an effect would move this creature, roll a save. On a success, the creature doesn’t move.
ast.target: 当某个效果将要移动该生物时，进行一次豁免。成功则该生物不移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to MD.
ast.target: 该生物的 MD 获得 +2 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature takes normal damage from critical hits. In addition, once per battle as a free action, it can take only half damage from an attack that hits.
ast.target: 该生物受到暴击时承受正常伤害。此外，每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，它可以让一次命中的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature moves before making an attack, it deals additional damage equal to 2*@lvl on a hit.
ast.target: 当该生物在发动攻击前移动时，命中将造成等于 2*@lvl 的额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a standard action, this creature can heal 15 hp or 20% of its maximum health, whichever is higher. It can only use this ability while it is in contact with the ground.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为标准动作，该生物可以恢复 15 点生命值或其最大生命值的 20%，取较高者。它只能在与地面接触时使用此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this creature is targeted by fire or lightning attacks, it gains a cumulative +1 bonus to attack rolls until the end of the battle (max: +4)
ast.target: 当该生物成为火焰或闪电攻击的目标时，其攻击检定获得累积 +1 加值，直到战斗结束（上限：+4）

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature rerolls all natural 2 attack rolls.
ast.target: 该生物会重掷所有自然 2 的攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature can disengage freely without needing to roll a disengage check.
ast.target: 该生物可以自由脱离，无需进行脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While this creature is staggered, its crit range expands by 2.
ast.target: 当该生物处于踉跄状态时，其暴击范围扩大 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While fighting underwater or in a watery environment (heavy rain, knee-deep swamp), this creature gains a +1 bonus to all defenses and to saving throws.
ast.target: 在水下或潮湿环境（暴雨、齐膝深沼泽）战斗时，该生物获得对所有防御和豁免检定的+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls against creatures that attacked it during the last round.
ast.target: 该生物对上回合攻击过它的生物进行攻击检定时获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use recoveries until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标直到其下个回合结束前都不能使用恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Take 25 damage; OR roll twice for each attack roll it makes that turn, taking the lower result.
ast.target: 受到25点伤害；或其在该回合进行的每次攻击检定都掷两次，取较低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The enduring shield takes a -5 penalty to saving throws.
ast.target: 持久之盾在豁免检定上受到-5减值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack hits the enduring shield, it gains a +5 bonus to the defense that the attack targeted until the end of the battle or until another attack hits it, in which case the bonus switches to the defense most recently hit.
ast.target: 当一次攻击命中持久之盾时，它获得对该攻击所针对防御的+5加值，持续到战斗结束或直到另一攻击命中它；在后一种情况下，该加值切换到最近一次被命中的防御。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of epic haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the epic haunting’s attacks and +5 to its damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每有一个独立的史诗级闹鬼喽啰群（群体至少由四个喽啰组成），就为史诗级闹鬼的攻击获得+1加值，并使其伤害+5。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 2+, the dybbuk’s soul-suck attack only deals 19 damage, and when it’s 4+, soul-suck only deals 10 damage. When the escalation die reaches 6, the dybbuk fades away at the end of the round. A dybbuk that fades away undefeated is not gone forever and may return in a later adventure.
ast.target: 当升级骰为2+时，dybbuk的吸魂攻击只造成19点伤害；当为4+时，吸魂只造成10点伤害。当升级骰达到6时，dybbuk在回合结束时消散。一个未被击败而消散的dybbuk并非永远消失，可能会在后续冒险中归来。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk hovers eerily, roughly 6 feet off the ground.
ast.target: dybbuk诡异地悬浮在离地约6英尺处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack that doesn’t deal holy damage targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次不造成神圣伤害的近战攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While one or more lower-level non-mook ettercap allies are nearby it, the ettercap keeper gains resist damage 16+.
ast.target: 当它附近有一个或更多低等级的非杂兵型ettercap盟友时，ettercap守卫获得抗性伤害16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ettercap warrior can make a poison bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: ettercap战士可以以自由动作进行一次毒咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If an ettin’s first save against an effect fails, it can roll a second save.
ast.target: 如果ettin针对某个效果的第一次豁免失败，它可以再进行一次豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn instead of dazed.
ast.target: 目标直到其下回合结束前陷入混乱而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action, a fallen derro can take 5 damage to end one ongoing effect on a creature in its mob.
ast.target: 以快速动作，堕落的derro可以承受5点伤害，以终止其团伙中一个生物身上的一个持续效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use as a free action once per turn at the start of the Fallen Icon’s turn.
ast.target: 每回合在堕落圣像回合开始时可作为一个自由动作使用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon can sprout wings to clumsily fly, and can swim indefinitely at any depth.
ast.target: 堕落圣像可以长出翅膀笨拙地飞行，并能在任意深度无限期地游泳。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the Fallen Icon is slain, the GM secretly rolls a normal save (11+) at the end of each session, including this one. If the save succeeds, the Fallen Icon returns to life near where it fell or in some distant wilderness. If the campaign somehow ends while the Fallen Icon is still dead, it’s the GM’s call whether the Fallen Icon stays dead or rises after the events of the campaign.
ast.target: 如果堕落圣像被杀死，GM会在每次游戏结束时（包括本次）秘密掷一次普通豁免（11+）。若豁免成功，堕落圣像将在其倒下之处附近或某处遥远的荒野中复活。若战役在堕落圣像仍然死亡时不知何故结束，堕落圣像是否继续死亡或在战役事件之后复活由GM裁定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature engaged with or next to the Fallen Icon dies (including the last mook of a mob), the Fallen Icon consumes it and regains 100 HP.
ast.target: 当与堕落圣像交战或相邻的生物死亡时（包括一群杂兵中的最后一个杂兵），堕落圣像会吞噬它并恢复100点HP。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free and takes extra damage equal to the attack roll.
ast.target: 目标脱离，并受到等同于该次攻击检定结果的额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon can deal 4d6 damage to itself and teleport someplace it can see nearby as a move action.
ast.target: 堕落圣像可以对自身造成4d6伤害，并以一个移动动作传送到附近它能看到的地点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the Fallen Icon rolls 2d20 instead of 1d20 and uses the higher result whenever it attacks or rolls a save.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，堕落圣像在攻击或进行豁免检定时掷2d20而非1d20，并取较高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Fallen Icon is no longer an icon, but it still possesses magical bonds with reality that make it difficult to destroy. See the flavor text at the top of the Fallen Icon’s stat block for ways in which significant campaign victories can make the Fallen Icon easier to defeat. (To be clear: if the PCs don’t achieve any of these campaign victories, the Fallen Icon will be difficult or perhaps even impossible to destroy.)
ast.target: 堕落圣像已不再是一个圣像，但它仍与现实存在魔法纽带，使其难以被摧毁。参见堕落圣像数据块顶部的风味文本，了解重大战役胜利如何让堕落圣像更容易被击败。（明确说明：如果PCs未达成任何此类战役胜利，堕落圣像将很难甚至可能无法被摧毁。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the Fallen Icon King is slain, the GM secretly rolls a normal save (11+) at the end of each session, including this one. If the save succeeds, the Fallen Icon returns to life in one of its secret treasure rooms deep in the underworld. If the campaign somehow ends while the Fallen Icon is still dead, it’s the GM’s call whether the Fallen Icon stays dead or rises after the events of the campaign.
ast.target: 如果堕落圣像之王被杀死，GM会在每次会话结束时（包括本次）秘密进行一次普通豁免（11+）。如果豁免成功，堕落圣像会在冥界深处的某个秘密宝库中复活。如果战役以某种方式结束时堕落圣像仍然死亡，是否继续死亡或在战役事件之后复活，由GM决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Human, dwarf, and forgeborn characters may not use their racial power until the escalation die reaches 4 or higher, and not when engaged with the Fallen Icon (so standard humans are simply out of luck).
ast.target: 人类、矮人和铸生角色在升级骰达到4或更高之前不能使用他们的种族能力，且在与堕落圣像交战时也不能使用（所以普通人类基本没机会）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round an attack would reduce the Fallen Icon to zero hit points or less, it instead damages the closest nearby loyal gatherer. If these have all been destroyed, the attack damages the closest nearby royal bearer, then finally the closest bronze kingsguard. If these have all been destroyed, the Fallen Icon is reduced to zero hit points—but see long live the icon below.
ast.target: 每个回合第一次有攻击会将堕落圣像的生命值降至0或以下时，改为伤害最近的忠诚收集者。如果这些都已被摧毁，攻击改为伤害最近的王室携宝者，最后才是最近的青铜王卫。如果这些也都被摧毁，堕落圣像才会降至0生命值—但见下方“圣像永存”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 60 psychic damage, and 15 120 psychic damage, and 30 ongoing negative energy damage (hard save ends)
ast.target: 60点心灵伤害，以及15 120点心灵伤害，以及30点持续负能量伤害（困难豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入易伤（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the last mook in a mob is slain nearby, or when a creature drops to 0 hit points or dies in some other fashion nearby, the Fallen Icon’s Maw heals hit point equal to 10 × the creature (or mob’s) level.
ast.target: 当附近一群杂兵中的最后一个被杀死，或附近有生物降至0生命值或以其他方式死亡时，堕落圣像之喉恢复的生命值等于该生物（或杂兵群）的等级×10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为120或以下，则其处于恍惚（攻击–4），且攻击不加升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target also takes 50 ongoing negative energy damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到50点持续负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the last mook in a mob is slain nearby, or when a creature drops to 0 hit points or dies in some other fashion nearby, the Fallen Icon’s Shadow heals hit point equal to 10 × the creature (or mob’s) level.
ast.target: 当附近一群杂兵中的最后一个被杀死，或附近有生物降至0生命值或以其他方式死亡时，堕落圣像之影恢复的生命值等于该生物（或杂兵群）的等级×10。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die reaches 6, the battle ends as a campaign loss for the player characters. The first consequence of the loss is that the Fallen Icon’s Shadow disappears and the Fallen Icon’s Maw returns to life at some other distant location. Perhaps there is no other terrible consequence. Perhaps that’s enough.
ast.target: 当升级骰达到6时，战斗以玩家角色的战役失败告终。失败的第一个后果是，堕落圣像的暗影消失，堕落圣像之喉在另一个遥远地点复活。也许没有其他可怕后果。也许这就够了。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 144 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，如果目标生命值为144或更少，则其处于恍惚状态（–4攻击），且攻击不加升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fallen lammasu can make a second fiery hoof attack (but not a third) as a free action.
ast.target: 堕落拉玛苏可以以自由动作进行第二次烈焰蹄攻击（但不能进行第三次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing fire damage instead of 20 fire damage, and until that ally saves against that damage, it adds the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 目标受到10点持续火焰伤害而非20点火焰伤害，且在该盟友对该伤害成功豁免之前，其攻击将加上升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到15点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fallen lammasu makes an attack that deals fire damage and the attack roll beats the target’s fire resistance, the target loses its fire resistance until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当堕落拉玛苏进行造成火焰伤害的攻击且攻击检定超过目标的火焰抗性时，目标在战斗结束前失去火焰抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lammasu gains an Abyssal curse attack.
ast.target: 拉玛苏获得一次深渊诅咒攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 另外造成11点持续火焰伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到20点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This ability only requires a quick action (once per round) to use.
ast.target: 该能力只需一个快速动作（每轮一次）即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against Fang Devil, you are hampered until the end of your next turn after you make the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对 Fang Devil 的攻击时，你在进行攻击后直到你的下一个回合结束前处于阻碍状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当能量攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xombie pops free from the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bandleader gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 乐队首领获得另一项命运增益，并使其较低的防御提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The enchanter gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 施法者获得另一项命运加成，并将其较低的防御提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reroll the attack against a random nearby creature.
ast.target: 对附近的一个随机生物重新进行攻击判定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The harrier gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 骚扰者获得另一项命运加成，并将其较低的防御提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The keeper gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 守卫获得另一项命运加成，并将其较低的防御提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target instead loses all actions during its next turn and does nothing as it gets tangled up.
ast.target: 目标在其下一回合改为失去所有动作并因被缠住而什么也做不了。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗2次，作为移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The outlaw gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 亡命者获得另一项命运加成，并将其较低的防御提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second longsword attack, but ignore this trigger for the second attack.
ast.target: 进行一次第二次长剑攻击，但第二次攻击忽略此触发效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ranger gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 游侠获得另一项命运收益，并将其较低的防御值提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标受阻（容易豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used on two consecutive rounds.
ast.target: 不能在连续两回合中使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The troubadour gains the other destiny benefit, and adds 1 to its lower defense.
ast.target: 游唱诗人获得另一项命运收益，并将其较低的防御值提高1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: he target can now only save against the confusion with a natural 20 (or until the warbanner drops) and can’t flee if the rest of the PCs choose to do so.
ast.target: 目标现在只能在自然20时对混乱进行豁免（或直到战旗倒下），并且如果其余PC选择撤退，目标也无法逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mooks fighting in the warbanner’s band gain a bonus to their hit points equal to the warbanner’s level (2).
ast.target: 在战旗队伍中作战的小喽啰获得等同于战旗等级（2）的生命值加成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unengaged fire bat can move, make a burning contrail attack, and move away from the target as a standard action without taking an opportunity attack from the target.
ast.target: 未被牵制的火蝙蝠可以移动、进行灼热尾迹攻击，并作为标准动作远离目标而不触发目标的借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然16+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire bats are agile fliers, especially when riding hot air currents. They slow down a bit away from warmth.
ast.target: 火蝙蝠是敏捷的飞行者，尤其是在借助热气流时。远离温暖时它们会慢一些。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每战斗1次，作为标准动作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is vulnerable to fire damage (save ends).
ast.target: 目标易受火焰伤害（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，可进行标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the fire giant priest-general makes an attack that staggers a target or reduces a target to 0 hp or fewer, each non-mook fire giant in the battle heals 25 hp.
ast.target: 每当火巨人祭司将军的攻击使目标踉跄或将目标降至 0 hp 或更少时，战斗中的每个非杂兵火巨人回复 25 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然 18+，否则仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to five times the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火巨人的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且没有效果，火巨人反而回复等于攻击者等级五倍的 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The armor and/or shield is shattered, the target now counts as unarmored with no shield. Magic armors and shields get a save (12 minus the magical AC bonus—so between 11+ for a +1 shield to 7+ for cursed epic +5 armor) to avoid shattering.
ast.target: 护甲和/或盾牌被击碎，目标现在视为无甲且无盾。魔法护甲与盾牌可进行一次豁免（12 减去魔法 AC 加值——因此从 +1 盾牌的 11+ 到受诅咒史诗 +5 护甲的 7+）以避免被击碎。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing fire damage, until the end of the day each time they spend a recovery they also take 2d10 fire damage.
ast.target: 目标一旦对持续火焰伤害豁免成功，在当天结束前，每次使用一次恢复时还会受到 2d10 火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗 1 次，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire attacks that miss the fire giant smith do not damage it and have no effect, and the fire giant instead heals hp equal to twice the attacker’s level.
ast.target: 未命中火巨人铁匠的火焰攻击不会对其造成伤害且没有效果，火巨人反而回复等于攻击者等级两倍的 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到10点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant warlord adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人军阀对正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标进行攻击时，加上升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the warlord can command one nearby ally that has resistance to fire to make a melee attack as a free action.
ast.target: 作为一个标准动作，军阀可以命令一名附近具有火焰抗性的盟友以自由动作进行一次近战攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fire giant adds the escalation die to its attacks against targets taking ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 火焰巨人对正在承受持续火焰伤害的目标进行攻击时，加上升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, the giant can make a slam attack as a quick action (once per round).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，巨人可以用快速动作进行一次重击攻击（每回合一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused, dazed, hampered, stunned, or weakened.
ast.target: 困惑、目眩、受阻、震慑或虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a sixth gnashing teeth attack, and is considered undamaged at its new hit point total. Using the hydra’s current hit points as a new baseline, the hydra will be staggered again when it drops below 50% of that total.
ast.target: 九头蛇第一次被打入重伤时，作为自由动作获得40点生命值并得到第六次噬咬攻击，并在新的生命值总量下视为未受伤。以九头蛇当前生命值作为新的基准，当其降至该总量的50%以下时，将再次进入重伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The second time the hydra is staggered, as a free action it gains 40 hit points and a seventh gnashing teeth attack, etc. Use a new hit point baseline as before, but there is no eighth head waiting to sprout.
ast.target: 九头蛇第二次被打入重伤时，作为自由动作获得40点生命值并得到第七次噬咬攻击，依此类推。像之前一样使用新的生命值基准，但不会再长出第八个头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a free action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰本回合已进行过一次飞行移动，则它可以在本回合以自由动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the *reborn in fire* ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到一次重击时，必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。若豁免失败，凤凰降至0生命值；见下方的*火中重生*能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a fire attack against the flamebird phoenix fails to beat its resistance, then instead of taking damage the flamebird phoenix heals that amount instead.
ast.target: 如果针对炎鸟凤凰的火焰攻击未能突破其抗性，那么炎鸟凤凰不会受伤，反而恢复相同的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A flamewreathed dragon can use primal fire breath 1d4 +2 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一只烈焰缠身的巨龙每场战斗可使用原始火息1d4 +2次，但绝不会连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon’s will and magic are so powerful that it ignores the fire resistance of creatures battling it.
ast.target: 巨龙的意志与魔法强大到足以无视与其战斗的生物的火焰抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon’s lair is wreathed in smoke and fumes, and through its magic the dragon has some control over those hot gases. Once per round as a quick action, the flamewreathed dragon can summon 1d4 smoke minions that take humanoid or bestial form and defend the dragon’s lair. Roll initiative for the minions once and use that count for all additional minions.
ast.target: 巨龙的巢穴烟雾与毒气缭绕，借助魔法巨龙可一定程度操控这些热气体。每回合作为一个迅捷动作，烈焰缠身的巨龙可召唤1d4名烟雾爪牙，其形态可为类人或兽形，用以守卫龙巢。爪牙的先攻只需掷一次，并将该结果用于所有额外召唤的爪牙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 被诅咒的头骨可以滑翔和悬停，始终在离地七八码的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target heals using a recovery, but the true-fomori gains the hit points.
ast.target: 目标使用一次恢复进行治疗，但获得生命值的是真·弗莫里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori torturer heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，弗莫里拷打者每有一名能看见或听见它的弗莫里亚人就恢复5点生命值，且若至少有一名污秽者能看见或听见它，则再恢复5点生命值。即使该弗莫里已死亡，此效果仍会作用于它，使其从0生命值恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori sing songs that drive listeners to insanity.
ast.target: 这些弗莫里唱出令人发狂的歌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ears of all non-fomori creatures in the battle begin to bleed, and continue to do so until the end of the day. Until the next full heal-up, those creatures take a –4 penalty to skill checks involving social situations or detecting sounds.
ast.target: 战斗中所有非fomori生物的耳朵开始出血，并一直持续到当天结束。直到下一次完全恢复之前，这些生物在涉及社交场景或侦测声音的技能检定上受到–4惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori usually have lots of eyes, or a single prominent eye, and fly by hovering.
ast.target: 这些fomori通常有很多只眼睛，或一只显眼的独眼，并以悬浮的方式飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature flies, its host’s unwashed and diseased feet hovering inches above the ground.
ast.target: 这个生物会飞行，它的宿主那双未清洗且带病的脚悬浮在离地几英寸处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the fomori can fire a powerful *eye beam* from one or more of its eyes.
ast.target: 每回合一次，作为快速动作，fomori可以从一只或多只眼睛发射强力的*眼束*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These fomori shift their forms instinctually, constantly devolving into ever-more horrible creatures.
ast.target: 这些fomori会本能地变形，不断退化成更加可怖的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the true-fomori is hit by an attack that targets PD or MD, until the start of its next turn, the values of its PD and MD switch and it gains a bonus to AC equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当true-fomori被以PD或MD为目标的攻击命中时，直到其下一回合开始，它的PD与MD数值互换，并获得等同于升级骰的AC加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After a battle with the fomori, the character with the lowest MD (randomly choose on a tie) has a nightmare during the following night, with a 50% chance that the nightmare somehow comes true the next day.
ast.target: 与fomori战斗后，MD最低的角色（平手则随机选择）会在当晚做噩梦，且有50%几率该噩梦在次日以某种方式成真。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You know that trick with the tablecloth? When the true-fomori scores a critical hit, it does that to some of its target’s skin, and the target is stunned (save ends). Replacing the skin might take more than normal healing, too, and it might take a while to look right on a creature again.
ast.target: 你知道那种桌布把戏吗？当true-fomori造成暴击时，它会对目标的一部分皮肤施展那招，目标陷入昏迷（豁免结束）。更换皮肤可能需要比正常治疗更多的时间，而且要过一阵子才会重新长得正常。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori tend to have lots of legs and can control spiders, scorpions, ticks, and other arachnids.
ast.target: 这些true-fomori往往有很多条腿，并能控制蜘蛛、蝎子、蜱虫及其他蛛形纲生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The true-fomori can climb like a spider and squeeze its body down to scuttle swiftly under low openings.
ast.target: true-fomori能像蜘蛛一样攀爬，并将身体挤压变薄，以迅速穿行于低矮开口之下。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per turn as a quick action, the true-fomori can make a *draining bite* attack to inject acid into its victim and drink its innards.
ast.target: 每回合一次，以快速动作，真·弗莫里可以进行一次*汲取之咬*攻击，向受害者注入酸液并饮其内脏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A creature staggered by this fomori can no longer see the sun the following day and must rely on lantern light or magical illumination. There is a 50% chance each day thereafter that the adventurer recovers and can once again see sunlight and feels its warmth. While a creature is unable to see or feel the healing sun, whenever it rolls recovery dice, it must reroll any die that has the maximum result (for example, a 10 on a d10).
ast.target: 被该弗莫里重创的生物在第二天将无法再看到太阳，只能依靠灯笼或魔法照明。此后每天有50%的几率冒险者恢复，重新看到阳光并感受到其温暖。当生物无法看见或感受治疗性的太阳时，每当它掷恢复骰，必须重掷任何掷出最大结果的骰子（例如，d10上的10）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: These true-fomori have plumage or fur in unnatural madness-causing colors.
ast.target: 这些真·弗莫里拥有羽毛或皮毛，颜色诡异且会致疯。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the true-fomori drops a creature to 0 hp or lower, that creature is drained of all color and can no longer perceive color. While under this effect, the creature takes a – 4 penalty to social skill checks and a –1 penalty to saves. Restoring color to the creature requires a quest involving walking a sacred labyrinth.
ast.target: 当真·弗莫里将生物打到0 hp或更低时，该生物被抽干一切颜色，无法再感知色彩。在此效果下，该生物进行社交技能检定承受– 4惩罚，进行豁免承受–1惩罚。要为该生物恢复颜色，需要进行一项涉及穿行神圣迷宫的任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is helpless instead of hampered.
ast.target: 目标变为无助，而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
At the start of each round roll a d6 and compare it to the escalation die. Whichever result is highest determines the true-fomori’s effect on local reality for that round. (If there are multiple true-fomori in the battle, only roll for one per round.) 

1: Bleeding steel—Inanimate objects scream and bleed.

2–3: Creeping insanity—Each non-fomori creature takes a –2 penalty to MD.

4–5: Abandoned and friendless—The adventurers can’t aid each other, communicate with each other, or otherwise count each other as allies.

6: Doom—The fomori and its allies use the escalation die and the adventurers do not.
ast.target:
每轮开始时掷一个d6并与升级骰比较。结果较高者决定该轮真·弗莫里对局部现实的影响。（若战斗中有多个真·弗莫里，每轮只为其中一个掷骰。） 

1: 流血的钢铁—无生命物体尖叫并流血。

2–3: 蔓延的疯狂—每个非弗莫里生物的MD承受–2惩罚。

4–5: 被遗弃且无友—冒险者无法互相援助、互相沟通，或以其他方式将彼此视为盟友。

6: 末日—弗莫里及其盟友使用升级骰，而冒险者不使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the fomori tyrant heals 5 hp for each fomorian that can see or hear it, and also heals 5 hp if at least one unclean-one can see or hear it. This effect affects the fomori even if it’s dead, healing it from 0 hp.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，弗莫里暴君每有一个能看到或听到它的弗莫里便恢复5 hp，若至少有一名不洁者能看到或听到它，也会再恢复5 hp。即使该弗莫里已死亡，该效果仍对其生效，使其从0 hp恢复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist is repulsive almost beyond comprehension, but its twisted form grants it the ability to withstand blows. It gains +2 to AC and +1 to PD.
ast.target: 邪教徒令人作呕，几乎难以理解，但其扭曲的形体赋予它承受打击的能力。它获得AC+2和PD+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cultist has a perfect and unaging physical body, a counterpoint to its increasingly corrupted soul. It gains +2 to PD and MD.
ast.target: 邪教徒拥有完美且不老的肉体，与其日益腐化的灵魂形成对照。它获得PD+2和MD+2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a melee attack hits the unclean-one, sores and pustules on its body burst, and the attacker takes 5 acid damage (champion: 10 damage; epic 15 damage).
ast.target: 当近战攻击命中不洁者时，其身上的疮口与脓疱爆裂，攻击者受到5点酸性伤害（勇士：10点伤害；史诗：15点伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The unclean-one cultist can move in strange ways, crawling up walls like a giant bug, skittering along the ground, and so forth. It gains a +2 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 污秽者信徒能以怪异的方式移动，像巨型虫子一样爬上墙壁，在地面上疾行等。它的脱离检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the unclean-one heals hit points equal to its level times the escalation die value (@lvl*@ed) at the start of its turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，污秽者在其回合开始时恢复等于其等级乘以升级骰数值（@lvl*@ed）的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, when the unclean-one misses with an attack (but not when it fumbles), it can change it to a hit and increase the damage by 2 for every point in the difference between the missed result and what it needed to hit as a free action. When it does, it takes 1d6 damage for every 2 extra damage it deals this way. (It must deal the extra damage if it changes a miss into a hit.)
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当污秽者的攻击未命中（但不是大失败）时，它可以以自由动作将其改为命中，并将伤害提高2点，提升幅度等于未命中的结果与其需要命中的数值之间的差值。这样做时，它每造成额外2点伤害就会承受1d6点伤害。（如果它将未命中改为命中，就必须造成这些额外伤害。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once one target has been hit by this attack, no further evil eye attacks can be made by any fomorian this battle.
ast.target: 一旦有一个目标被该攻击命中，本场战斗中任何弗莫里安都不能再进行邪眼攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are at least three other fomorians engaged with the target, the fomorian brute can make the bite attack.
ast.target: 若至少还有三个其他弗莫里安与目标交战，弗莫里安蛮力者可以进行啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian brute mook counts as two 5th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，弗莫里安蛮力杂兵按两个5级杂兵计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Roll on the table below if you wish. You can also give fomorians some unclean-one abilities (though never unearthly beauty).

d4 Mutation
1 Extra arm
2 Extra eyes
3 Fair is foul
4 Thick skin
ast.target:
如果愿意，请掷下表。你也可以给予弗莫里安一些污秽者能力（但绝不包括超凡美貌）。

d4 突变
1 额外手臂
2 额外眼睛
3 美即丑恶
4 厚皮

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fomorian can make one extra melee attack per round as a quick action.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，弗莫里安每轮可作为快速动作进行一次额外的近战攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian has a cluster of small eyes in the back of its head, a huge eye on a shoulder, a slug-like eye stalk, etc. The fomorian can’t be surprised or ambushed, and it has true sight (spells like blur, invisibility, etc. don’t work on it).
ast.target: 弗莫里安在后脑勺有一簇小眼睛，肩上有一只巨眼，还有类似蛞蝓的眼柄等。弗莫里安不会被突袭或伏击，并且拥有真视（诸如朦胧、隐形等法术对它无效）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an attack against MD targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次针对 MD 的攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然 16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian is moving, it only takes half damage from attacks—it isn’t really tougher, it just doesn’t notice some wounds.
ast.target: 当弗莫里安在移动时，它从攻击中只受到一半伤害—它并不是真的更结实，只是没有注意到一些伤口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fomorian can make a third attack as a free action.
ast.target: 弗莫里安可以作为自由动作进行第三次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle, if the fomorian is next to a dead body, as a move action it can eat part of the corpse, healing 1d6*10 hp.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，若弗莫里安靠近一具尸体，它可以作为移动动作吃掉部分尸体，恢复 1d6*10 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fomorian top-cannibal heals from eating a corpse, it gains a bonus to damage with its next attack, hit or miss, equal to the hit points it healed.
ast.target: 当弗莫里安首席食人者通过进食尸体恢复生命值时，它下一次攻击的伤害获得加值，无论命中与否，数值等于其恢复的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The forge wolf gains +1 to its AC against melee attacks for each other forge wolf engaged with its target (max +4 AC).
ast.target: 每有一只与其目标交战的其他熔炉狼，熔炉狼对近战攻击的 AC 获得 +1（最多 +4 AC）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the last mook in a mob of forge wolves dies it deals 2d12 fire damage to anybody engaged with it at the time. Creatures that resist fire damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 每当熔炉狼群中的最后一名杂兵死亡时，它会对当时与其交战的任何人造成 2d12 火焰伤害。能抗火焰伤害的生物忽略此效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per round, if a frog knight is unengaged, and an ally is targeted by an attack against AC anywhere on the battlefield, the frog knight may immediately leap to its ally’s side and give that ally a +2 bonus to AC for the rest of the round as an interrupt action.
ast.target: 每轮一次，若一名青蛙骑士未被交战，且战场上任意位置的一名盟友成为针对 AC 的攻击目标，青蛙骑士可以立即跳到盟友身旁，并以打断动作使该盟友在本轮剩余时间内 AC 获得 +2 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: You should certainly use one ability per frogspawn, occasionally two. For frogspawn mooks, treat the abilities as usable once per battle.
ast.target: 你当然应为每个蛙裔使用一个能力，偶尔两个。对于蛙裔杂兵，将这些能力视为每场战斗可用一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The frogspawn deals @lvl poison damage to any character that pops free of it or successfully disengages from it. (Teleporting away is probably tongue-free unless the GM is hopping mad.)
ast.target: 任一从中挣脱或成功脱离的角色都会受到蛙卵造成的 @lvl 点毒素伤害。（除非 GM 暴跳如雷，否则传送离开大概不会被它的舌头缠住。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, when struck by an attack that targets AC, take half damage from that attack instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当被以 AC 为目标的攻击命中时，改为承受该次攻击一半的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On a natural 16+, a hit from a frog knight’s club inflicts 5 ongoing poison damage (save ends).
ast.target: 自然掷骰 16+ 时，蛙骑士的棍棒命中会造成 5 点持续毒素伤害（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frogspawn deceivers do not take miss damage.
ast.target: 蛙卵欺诈者不会受到未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If it wasn’t killed by the attack, the ally heals 60 hit points and immediately moves as a free action.
ast.target: 如果未被该次攻击杀死，盟友恢复 60 点生命值，并立即以自由动作移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s next move action is controlled by the old one.
ast.target: 目标的下一个移动动作由老者控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time the target attacks, if it includes the old one in the attack the old one may make a free mindblast attack against the target.
ast.target: 目标下次攻击时，如果将老者包含在攻击中，老者可对目标进行一次免费的心灵爆破攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spellcroaker counts as two spellcroakers for the purposes of the croaking chorus.
ast.target: 就呱呱合唱的效果而言，这只咒蛙计作两只咒蛙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a spellcroaker rolls a natural 18+ when using a curse, the target is transformed into a steadily shrinking frog- like humanoid and is hampered and weakened (save ends all effects). If the curse somehow ran its full course, the target would no doubt shrink down into a frog, but PCs are made of strong stuff and should be able to evade a fate that might affect common folk.
ast.target: 咒蛙在施放诅咒时若自然掷骰 18+，目标会变成持续缩小的类蛙人形，并受到阻碍与虚弱（豁免结束所有效果）。如果诅咒 somehow 完整持续，其结果无疑会把目标缩成一只青蛙，但 PC 们天赋异禀，应能避开这种可能落在寻常人身上的命运。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster counts as two mooks when building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，这个怪物算作两个喽啰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses its next move action, and if it’s engaged with the giant, it pops free.
ast.target: 目标失去其下一次移动动作；若与巨人纠缠，则会脱离纠缠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant can make a frost touch attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 巨人可以以自由动作对目标进行寒霜之触攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Death can cause fluid-filled sacks inside the frost-würm to explode. When the attack roll that kills the frost-würm is a natural even roll, each nearby creature takes 20 cold damage.
ast.target: 死亡可能导致霜蟲体内充满液体的囊爆炸。当击杀霜蟲的攻击检定掷出自然偶数时，每个附近的生物受到20点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被困住，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the fungaloid and its target take 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 真菌体及其目标各受到1d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the escalation die is even, each creeper must succeed on a normal save at the start of its turn or lose its move action that turn.
ast.target: 每当升级骰为偶数时，每个爬行者必须在其回合开始时通过一次普通豁免，否则本回合失去其移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The drudge can make a fungal attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 苦役怪本回合可以用一个迅捷动作进行一次真菌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby fungaloid can make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一个附近的真菌体可以以自由动作进行一次真菌攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Up to three nearby fungaloids can each make a fungal attack as a free action.
ast.target: 最多三个附近的真菌生物各自可以进行一次真菌攻击作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The monarch’s attacks deal +1 damage for each other allied creature with the plant type in the battle (max +10).
ast.target: 君王的攻击在战斗中每有一个其他植物类型的盟友生物就额外造成+1伤害（最多+10）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there are not enough nearby fungaloids to use up all the fungal attacks granted by the mycotic scepter, skip the extra fungal attacks but add a full-strength fungaloid drudge to the battle next to the fungaloid monarch.
ast.target: 如果附近的真菌生物不足以用完菌丝权杖授予的所有真菌攻击，则跳过多余的真菌攻击，但在真菌君王旁边加入一个满血的真菌劳役者加入战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 psychic damage and 8 ongoing psychic damage (that feels like a terminal case of guilt).
ast.target: 目标还会受到8点心灵伤害并承受8点持续心灵伤害（仿佛终末般的内疚感）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 30 psychic damage instead.
ast.target: 目标改为受到30点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against a fury devil take a -4 penalty unless the devil is hellbent against that attacker.
ast.target: 对狂怒魔鬼的攻击承受-4罚值，除非该魔鬼对该攻击者处于“地狱执念”状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a fury devil, the fury devil deals 1d10 extra damage with its next attack this battle, hit or miss.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对狂怒魔鬼的攻击时，狂怒魔鬼在本场战斗中的下一次攻击无论命中与否都会额外造成1d10伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fury devils fly from place to place but fight on their feet.
ast.target: 狂怒魔鬼在各处飞行，但会站在地面上战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle can make two more melee attacks as a free action (but never more than three total attacks per standard action, even if you roll another 11+).
ast.target: 石像鬼可以作为自由动作再进行两次近战攻击（但每个标准动作的总攻击次数永远不超过三次，即使你又掷出11+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 石像鬼对以AC为目标的攻击具有12+的伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Because they often look like statues, gargoyles are capable of springing a surprise on inattentive PCs. When there’s a chance of such an ambush, give the PCs a champion-tier skill check (DC 20) to notice the gargoyles and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 由于它们常常看起来像雕像，石像鬼能够让粗心的PC遭受突然袭击。当有发生此类伏击的可能时，让PC进行一次冠军阶技能检定（DC 20），以察觉石像鬼并避免措手不及。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target takes a cumulative –2 penalty to disengage checks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在脱离检定上承受累计–2减值，直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Targets engulfed/grabbed by the cube take 30 acid damage at the start of the cube’s turn but are not viable targets for additional attacks by the cube. Multiple targets can be held within the cube simultaneously. Any engulfed creature that is also staggered must begin making last gasp saves or become paralyzed as the cube’s toxins overwhelm it.
ast.target: 被立方体吞噬/抓住的目标在立方体回合开始时受到30点酸性伤害，但不会成为立方体额外攻击的可行目标。多个目标可同时被困在立方体内。任何被吞噬且处于踉跄状态的生物必须开始进行临终挣扎豁免，否则会在立方体毒素压倒它时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 3. The cubahedron spits an engulfed creature into the air above it and makes a shlup’n’schlorp attack against that creature with a +5 attack bonus. Then the creature is engulfed again.
ast.target: 3. 立方体将被吞噬的生物吐到其上方空中，并以+5攻击加值对该生物进行一次shlup’n’schlorp攻击。随后该生物再次被吞噬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dodecahedron engulfs the target if it's samller than the dodecahedron.
ast.target: 若目标比十二面体更小，十二面体会吞噬目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Targets engulfed/grabbed by the cube take 30 acid damage at the start of the cube’s turn but are not viable targets for additional attacks by the cube. Multiple targets can be held within the cube simultaneously.

Any engulfed creature that is also staggered must begin making last gasp saves or become paralyzed as the cube’s toxins overwhelm it.
ast.target:
被立方体吞噬/抓住的目标在立方体回合开始时受到30点酸性伤害，但不会成为立方体额外攻击的可行目标。多个目标可同时被困在立方体内。

任何被吞噬且处于踉跄状态的生物必须开始进行临终挣扎豁免，否则会在立方体毒素压倒它时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Targets engulfed/grabbed by the cube take 38 acid damage at the start of the cube’s turn but are not viable targets for additional attacks by the cube. Multiple targets can be held within the cube simultaneously.

Any engulfed creature that is also staggered must begin making last gasp saves or become paralyzed as the cube’s toxins overwhelm it.
ast.target:
被立方体吞噬/抓住的目标在立方体回合开始时受到38点酸性伤害，但不会成为立方体额外攻击的可行目标。多个目标可同时被困在立方体内。

任何被吞噬且处于踉跄状态的生物必须开始进行临终挣扎豁免，否则会在立方体毒素压倒它时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Targets engulfed/grabbed by the tetrahedron take 22 acid damage at the start of the cube’s turn but are not viable targets for additional attacks by the tetrahedron. Multiple targets can be held within the tetrahedron simultaneously. Any engulfed creature that is also staggered must begin making last gasp saves or become paralyzed as the tetrahedron’s toxins overwhelm it.
ast.target: 被四面体吞噬/抓住的目标在立方体回合开始时受到22点酸性伤害，但不会成为四面体额外攻击的可行目标。多个目标可同时被困在四面体内。任何被吞噬且处于踉跄状态的生物必须开始进行临终挣扎豁免，否则会在四面体毒素压倒它时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is engulfed instead of stuck.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is vulnerable (attacks vs. it have crit range expanded by 2) to attacks by undead until the end of the ghoul’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标在食尸鬼下一回合结束前对亡灵的攻击变得易受伤害（对其攻击的重击范围扩大2）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ghoul’s claws and bite attack deals +4 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 食尸鬼的爪击和撕咬攻击对易伤目标造成+4伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞食的生物，都会在次夜作为食尸鬼复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ghoul hits a vulnerable target with a natural even attack roll, the target is also stunned (save ends).
ast.target: 当食尸鬼以自然偶数攻击掷骰命中易伤目标时，目标也会被眩晕（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the target saves against the vulnerable effect, it also takes 2d6 ongoing damage each turn.
ast.target: 直到目标对易伤效果豁免成功之前，它每回合还会受到2d6点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The licklash can make a flesh-seeking tongue attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 舔鞭怪可以以自由动作对另一个目标进行寻肉舌击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any creature that is slain by a ghoul and not consumed will rise as a ghoul the next night.
ast.target: 任何被食尸鬼杀死且未被吞食的生物，都会在次夜作为食尸鬼复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d3 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到1d3点持续酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant ant can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨蚁能像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant bird of prey must move before making this attack.
ast.target: 巨型猛禽在进行此攻击前必须移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the dire mantis might rate as a huge monster in terms of size, its stats are based on those for a large monster.
ast.target: 虽然恐惧螳螂在体型上可能被归为巨型怪物，但其属性基于大型怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2d6 ongoing poison damage if it’s dazed or stuck.
ast.target: 如果目标处于眩晕或被缠住状态，还会受到2d6持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also stuck until the end of the spider’s next turn.
ast.target: 目标也会被缠住，直到蜘蛛下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A giant web spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 巨型网蜘蛛可以像在地面移动一样轻松地攀爬天花板和墙壁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 6d10 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标都受到6d10伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a giant zombie mook deals triple damage instead of the normal double damage for a crit.
ast.target: 对巨型僵尸杂兵的重击造成三倍伤害，而不是通常重击的双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant zombie mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you are building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，巨型僵尸杂兵按两个9级杂兵计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target must begin making last gasp saves as it is slowly absorbed. Absorbed creatures can’t be resurrected by normal means.
ast.target: 目标被缓慢吸收时必须开始进行最后喘息豁免。被吸收的生物无法通过常规手段复活。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The next time this battle that the target saves against shocked it is an easy save (6+).
ast.target: 本场战斗中目标下一次对“震慑”进行豁免时，为容易豁免（6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it only counts a half a normal mook.
ast.target: 在构建与该怪物的战斗时，它仅算作半个普通杂兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: success indicates a hit; failure is a miss that hits one of the mirror images instead, dealing no miss damage to the glabrezou but dispelling all the images.
ast.target: 成功表示命中；失败则为未命中，但会击中一个镜像，且不会对格拉布雷祖造成未命中伤害，同时驱散所有镜像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a free action, the glabrezou can utter a word of power, canceling a single action just taken by a nearby creature with fewer hit points than the glabrezou—whether it was casting a spell, healing an ally, or whatever. The GM can see the results of the action, such as a die roll, before deciding whether to use the power word.
ast.target: 每日一次，作为一个自由动作，格拉布雷祖可以说出一个力量之言，取消一个附近生命值少于格拉布雷祖的生物刚刚进行的单一动作——无论是施法、治疗盟友或其他任何动作。GM 可以在决定是否使用力量之言前先看到该动作的结果，例如骰子结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, and can glide over obstacles.
ast.target: 闪耀持有者通常悬浮在离地一两英尺处，并可滑翔越过障碍物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiendfletch can make a disengage check as a free action this turn after the attack.
ast.target: 本回合攻击后，恶魔箭羽可以以自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed until the end of its next turn as it suffers debilitating pain from a hellish arrow.
ast.target: 目标因炼狱之箭造成的剧痛而恍惚，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While making a ranged attack, the fiendfletch gains a +4 bonus to AC against opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 进行远程攻击时，恶魔箭羽获得对借机攻击的 AC +4 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the fiendfletch rolls a natural 16+ with a hellbent bow attack and hits, the target is weakened (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当恶魔箭羽用地狱执念弓攻击掷出自然 16+ 并命中时，目标改为虚弱（豁免结束），而非恍惚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gnoll can make a second longbow attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 豺狼人可以以自由动作进行第二次长弓攻击（最多一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If more than one gnoll is engaged with the target, each gnoll melee attack that misses that target deals half damage.
ast.target: 如果有不止一名豺狼人缠住目标，每个未命中该目标的豺狼人近战攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by gnoll rangers expands by 2 against humanoids.
ast.target: 豺狼人游侠对类人生物的攻击重击范围扩大2点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is marked for death; until the end of the battle, all gnoll attacks against the target gain an attack bonus equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 目标被标记为死亡；直到战斗结束，所有对该目标的豺狼人攻击获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The goblin bat mage pops free from the target and can move as a free action.
ast.target: 地精蝙蝠法师从目标身边脱离，并可作为自由动作移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If target is staggered after taking the damage, it’s also hampered until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标在承受伤害后变为重伤，它也会受阻直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One random nearby ally of the target takes 2d6 negative energy damage.
ast.target: 目标附近一名随机盟友受到2d6点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a ranged attack targets this creature while it’s flying, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当该生物飞行时遭受远程攻击，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the goblin bat mage is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 15 damage.
ast.target: 当地精蝙蝠法师变为重伤时，必须进行一次立即豁免。若失败，它直到下一回合结束前失去飞行能力。若在近地面飞行，则立刻着陆；若在远离地面的高空飞行，则会坠落失控并受到15点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks.
ast.target: 地精获得脱离检定+5加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Goblins only need to roll a 6+ to disengage.
ast.target: 地精只需掷出6+即可脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an ally of the necromancer dies it instead heals to full hp and its creature type becomes UNDEAD if it was not already.
ast.target: 当亡灵法师的一名盟友死亡时，它反而恢复至满 hp，且若其生物类型原本不是 UNDEAD，则变为 UNDEAD。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the necromancer starts the combat as a living HUMANOID, then when it dies instead its type becomes UNDEAD and it instantly heals to 226 hp.
ast.target: 如果亡灵法师以活体 HUMANOID 的身份开始战斗，那么它死亡时其类型改为 UNDEAD，并立即恢复至 226 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its dazzling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 如果龙的炫目吐息已被消耗，它会恢复该能力，并可在其下回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes no damage and is instead swallowed whole (see below).
ast.target: 目标不受伤害，而是被整个吞下（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gorge dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 峡谷龙擅长游泳，且能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to the grandmother’s type of special damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前对祖母的特殊伤害类型变得脆弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature gains different abilities based on which name it has taken.
ast.target: 该生物会根据其取用的名字获得不同能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature attacks grandmother, it takes 1d6*10 damage of the grandmother’s special type on a hit, or 1d3*5 damage of that type on a miss.
ast.target: 当一名生物攻击祖母时，若命中则受到 1d6*10 点祖母特殊类型的伤害，若未命中则受到该类型的 1d3*5 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gray hoarder has resist negative energy 16+, as well as a +2 bonus to defenses and saves against attacks and effects that specifically target undead.
ast.target: 灰色囤积者具有负能量抗性 16+，并且对专门针对亡灵的攻击与效果的防御和豁免获得 +2 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the great cat moves before making this attack, it takes a –1 penalty to the attack roll but gains a +4 bonus to the damage.
ast.target: 如果巨猫在进行此攻击前移动，则攻击检定受到–1惩罚，但伤害获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the great cat can jump across the battlefield as a move action, avoiding obstacles and dangers. It can’t be intercepted when leaping.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，巨猫可以以移动动作跃过战场，避开障碍与危险。它在跃起时无法被拦截。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action when the escalation die is even, the great cat can make an *unnerving roar* attack.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，巨猫可以以快速动作进行一次*令人不安的咆哮*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cadre can make a second double axe attack (no more) as a free action.
ast.target: 该小队可以以自由动作进行第二次双斧攻击（只能一次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack targets PD instead of AC.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by great fang cadre orcs expands by 3 until half the great fang cadre mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 巨牙小队兽人近战攻击的重击范围扩大3，直到巨牙小队人群被击倒一半为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 若升级骰为偶数，再进行一次撕扯啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck and can’t make ranged attacks (save ends).
ast.target: 目标被困，无法进行远程攻击（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Add a dire feature. Roll a d6.

1: Armor plates

2: Spiky bits

3: Carnage

4: Poison

5: Dire regeneration

6: Fury
ast.target:
添加一个凶暴特性。掷1d6。

1: 甲壳护板

2: 尖刺外突

3: 屠戮

4: 毒素

5: 凶暴再生

6: 狂怒

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add +2 to the dire animal’s AC, and add +1 to its PD.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound’s attacks that miss deal 5 damage. When staggered, its missed attacks deal 10 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬未命中的攻击造成5点伤害。处于重伤时，其未命中的攻击造成10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 凶猛撕咬还会造成10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, the hound heals 15 hp.
ast.target: 当升势骰为偶数时，猎犬回复15点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the hound gains a +2 attack bonus and deals +4 damage, but at the end of each of its turns it takes 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 处于重伤时，猎犬获得+2攻击加值并造成+4伤害，但在其每个回合结束时会受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 60 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值为60或更低时，它因恐惧而恍惚，攻击时不加入升势骰（豁免结束全部）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sunder wraiths fly like the world is defined however they want it to be defined.
ast.target: 破裂幽魂飞行时仿佛世界由它们随心所欲地定义。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Three times per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a hard save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗三次，当破裂幽魂穿过墙壁、王座、门或箱子等坚固物体时，该物体必须进行一次高难度豁免。若豁免失败，物体会被破坏。强力的魔法物体在豁免上获得加值，但通常还是会出事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a bite attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 以自由动作对目标进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a move action the xorn can swim through the ground, or through a wall.
ast.target: 以移动动作，索恩能够在地面中游动，或穿过墙壁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say “nearby”.
ast.target: 索恩能在一定距离内看穿所有类型的岩石与土壤，就称为“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Xorn are used to the fires of the deep and the cold of solid rock—when a cold or fire attack targets a xorn, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: Xorn 习惯于地底的烈焰与坚硬岩石的寒冷—当寒冷或火焰攻击以 xorn 为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定上掷出自然 16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a quick action (once per round), the xorn can heal 20 hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，以快速动作（每轮一次），xorn 可回复 20 点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn’s attacks deal half damage on a miss.
ast.target: xorn 的攻击在未命中时造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the xorn attacks immediately after swimming out from rock, it can deal double damage on a hit.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当 xorn 从岩石中游出后立即攻击时，若命中则可造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 12 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标从一次翼击中额外受到 12 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标从一次爪击中额外受到 20 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a treasury master attack as a free action
ast.target: 巨龙可以以自由动作进行一次 treasury master 攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the dragon is in his lair, it has +1 to AC.
ast.target: 如果巨龙在自己的巢穴中，它的 AC 获得 +1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A greathoard elder can use precise breath 1d4 +1 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一位 greathoard elder 每场战斗可使用 precise breath 1d4 +1 次，但绝不会连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon is enamored/envious of the icons with the greatest hoards. For each PC who has at least one positive or conflicted relationship point with one or more of those icons, the greathoard elder gains an extra use of treasury master this battle.
ast.target: 巨龙迷恋/嫉妒拥有最大宝藏的 icons。对于与这些 icons 中一位或多位至少有一个正面或矛盾关系点的每位 PC，greathoard elder 在本场战斗中额外获得一次 treasury master 的使用次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The green bulette gains a +3 bonus to attack and damage with its first attack each battle.
ast.target: 绿龙鳄在每场战斗的第一次攻击时获得+3攻击与伤害加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die but can’t use into the earth. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 只要战斗中至少有一个生物处于重伤或昏迷状态，龙鳄的攻击与伤害获得等同于升级骰的加值，但不能使用“钻入地下”。没有血液的生物（构装体、黏液怪、植物生物等）不会触发该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Like all bulettes, the green bulette can burrow. While above ground, it prefers to move slowly on the surface and rely on its plant- and soil-covered shell to stay hidden until it attacks.
ast.target: 与所有龙鳄一样，绿龙鳄能够掘地而行。在地面上时，它更喜欢缓慢移动，并依靠覆盖着植物与泥土的甲壳保持隐蔽，直到发动攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes vulnerable to poison damage until the end of the battle. Creatures that resist poison damage ignore this effect.
ast.target: 目标在战斗结束前变得易受毒素伤害。具有抗毒伤害的生物无视该效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses all its resistances and is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标失去所有抗性并处于虚弱状态，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, but missing with the attack doesn’t expend it.
ast.target: 每战斗1次，但攻击未命中不会消耗该次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for this attack expands by 1 (to a maximum of 16+).
ast.target: 该攻击的暴击范围扩大1（最多至16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当毒素攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d6 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 该龙裔对其近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d6点额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ongoing poison damage increases by 2.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标也会虚弱（豁免结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is partially blinded and takes a –2 penalty to attacks and defenses until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标部分失明，攻击和防御检定受到–2惩罚，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wild stalker’s scales naturally change to blend with its surroundings, allowing it to hide in plain sight and making checks to detect it take a –5 penalty. When it attacks from concealment without being seen first, the target is vulnerable to its attack. It can regain its camouflage by moving out of direct sight and hiding (hard DC to spot).
ast.target: 野性潜猎者的鳞片会自然变化以融入周围环境，使其能够在显眼处隐匿，并使侦测它的检定受到–5惩罚。当它在未先被看见的情况下从隐蔽处攻击时，目标易受其攻击。它可以通过移出直接视线并隐藏来恢复伪装（难度DC以察觉）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 72 hp.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合结束，目标都会受到收割者的*恐惧光环*影响，即使它有超过72点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 6+, all normal saves made during the battle become hard saves (16+).
ast.target: 当升级骰为6+时，战斗中所有普通豁免都变为困难豁免（16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reavers ignore the bonds of gravity while they’re phasing.
ast.target: 收割者在相位移动时无视重力束缚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature disengages or moves away from a reaver that’s phasing, that creature is vulnerable to negative energy until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当一个生物脱离或远离处于相位移动的收割者时，该生物对负能量易受伤害，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 3d10 negative energy damage to any creature that targets the gruesome reaver with an attack that deals holy damage.
ast.target: 对任何以恐怖收割者为目标、且造成神圣伤害的攻击的生物造成3d10负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers one hag ability as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫以自由动作触发一个女巫能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hag triggers two hag abilities as a free action (can’t be the same ability twice).
ast.target: 女巫以自由动作触发两个女巫能力（不能是同一个能力两次）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each hag can lay a curse upon the one who ends its horrible life. After dropping to 0 hit points, a hag always lingers long enough to pronounce the words of the curse. (See Death Curses.)
ast.target: 每个女巫都能对终结其可怕生命的人施加诅咒。生命值降至0后，女巫总会停留足够长的时间来念出诅咒之词。（见死亡诅咒。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: All hags have the ability to twist the perceptions of others. If the hag has a short time to prepare, it can hide a small hut, disguise a volunteer or captive as a monster, disguise itself as a harmless peasant woman, etc. A DC 30 skill check is required to overcome the delusion and see the truth of it (if a player gives a reason for not trusting what their character sees; perhaps add subtle clues toward that end). The magic fades as soon as the hag enters combat.
ast.target: 所有女巫都具备扭曲他人感知的能力。如果女巫有短暂的准备时间，她可以隐藏一间小屋，将志愿者或俘虏伪装成怪物，把自己伪装成无害的农妇等。需要进行DC 30的技能检定才能克服幻觉并看清真相（如果玩家给出不信任其角色所见的理由；可以为此加入一些微妙线索）。当女巫进入战斗时，这种魔法立即消退。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target starts making last gasp saves. On the fourth failure, it becomes a shapeless ooze.
ast.target: 目标开始进行垂死挣扎豁免。第4次失败时，它会变成无定形的软泥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a psychic attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当灵能攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击检定必须掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby lower-level mook makes an attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的低等级喽啰以自由动作进行一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a nearby ally of the half-orc commander scores a critical hit, that ally can roll a save against a save ends effect as a free action.
ast.target: 当半兽人指挥官附近的一名盟友造成一次暴击时，该盟友可以以自由动作进行一次对抗“豁免结束”效果的豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 部族勇士恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, a tribal champion can roll two  for each melee attack roll it makes and use the result it prefers. If both dice are 11+, the melee attack is a critical hit.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，部族勇士每次进行近战攻击检定可以掷两颗 ，并使用其偏好的结果。如果两颗骰子都是11+，该近战攻击为暴击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only when the hallowed gargoyle starts its turn flying and ends its turn engaged on the ground.
ast.target: 只有当受祝圣的石像鬼回合开始时在飞行状态，并在地面上以交战状态结束回合时才生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby ally can roll a save against a save ends effect. If no allies are affected by a save ends effect, one nearby ally can make a basic attack as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的盟友可以对“豁免结束”效果进行一次豁免检定。若没有盟友受到“豁免结束”效果影响，则一名附近盟友可以以自由动作进行一次基础攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标受到迟缓（豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the hallowed gargoyle is hit by an attack against MD, reroll the attack with a -2 attack penalty. (Sometimes the halo sputters, so if you forget to use it the first time, use the reroll later in the battle.)
ast.target: 受祝圣的石像鬼第一次被针对 MD 的攻击命中时，以 -2 攻击减值重掷该攻击。（有时光环会闪烁不稳，因此如果你第一次忘了使用，可以在战斗后续使用该次重掷。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hallowed gargoyle has resist damage 12+ against attacks targeting AC.
ast.target: 受祝圣的石像鬼对针对 AC 的攻击具有 12+ 伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标受到迟缓（容易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of hampered (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标改为受到虚弱而非迟缓（容易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and the target take 3d10 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸与目标双方各受到 3d10 伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标受到 20 点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a headless zombie drops to 0 hp, it flails with its fists and makes a mouthless cry attack as a free action before it dies.
ast.target: 当一具无头僵尸降至 0 hp 时，它会挥拳乱舞，并在死亡前以自由动作进行一次无口嚎哭攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature tries to affect the zombie’s attack, such as forcing a reroll or applying a penalty, it must roll a normal save; on a failure, the effect is negated.
ast.target: 当生物试图影响僵尸的攻击时，例如强制重掷或施加惩罚，它必须进行一次正常豁免；失败则效果被抵消。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While nearby a headless zombie, when a creature would heal, it only heals half the normal hit points.
ast.target: 在无头僵尸附近时，生物进行治疗只能恢复正常的一半生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die increases to 6, each headless zombie in the battle is restored to maximum hit points, including the dead ones.
ast.target: 当升级骰增加到6时，战斗中的每个无头僵尸都会恢复至最大生命值，包括已死亡的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choos to add the escalation die to an attack against a hell imp, the imp automatically hits with it next needign taunt attack this battle, and the target taes 2d6 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对地狱小鬼的攻击上时，小鬼在本场战斗中下一次needign taunt攻击会自动命中，目标受到额外2d6点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hell imps are capable of impressive feats of aerial agility, but only when teir lives depends on it.
ast.target: 地狱小鬼能够展现令人印象深刻的空中敏捷，但只有在它们的teir lives depends on it时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stinging tail attack deals 3 extra ongoing poison damage (11 total), but the target must succeed on two saves (one for ongoing and one for weakened).
ast.target: 刺尾 攻击额外造成3点持续性毒素伤害（总计11点），但目标必须通过两次豁免（一次对持续伤害，一次对虚弱）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellcat must have its move action available to use *blazing pounce*.
ast.target: 地狱猫必须保有其移动动作才能使用*blazing pounce*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hellcat, during its next turn it gains a cumulative +2 bonus to attack if it’s invisible. Otherwise, it gains a non-cumulative +2 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn as its form blurs.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对地狱猫的攻击上时，在它的下一个回合中若处于隐形状态，则获得可叠加的+2攻击加值。否则，它的形体模糊，在其下个回合开始前获得不可叠加的+2全防御加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in bright light, the hellcat is invisible; attacks against it have a 50% miss chance.
ast.target: 在明亮光线下，地狱猫是隐形的；对它的攻击有50%未命中几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hellcat takes only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 地狱猫只承受来自借机攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellhound can make a fiery breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱犬可作为一个自由动作进行一次炽焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a hell hound at the start of its turn takes 2d6 fire damage.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时与地狱犬交战的每个生物受到 2d6 火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the hellstone gargoyle misses with a melee attack, *weathered claws* deals an additional 1d6 psychic damage until the end of the battle (maximum 4d6).
ast.target: 每当地狱石像鬼近战攻击未命中时，*风化之爪*会造成额外 1d6 点心灵伤害，持续到战斗结束（最多 4d6）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellstone gargoyle can't fly per se, but a clumsy glide can be achieved.
ast.target: 地狱石像鬼严格来说无法飞行，但可以进行笨拙的滑翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When there's the chance of an ambush, give the PC's a hard champion-tier skill check (usually DC 25) to notice the gargoyle and avoid being surprised.
ast.target: 若有被伏击的可能，让PC进行一次困难的勇士阶技能检定（通常 DC 25）以察觉石像鬼并避免被突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped can make one aberrant attack as a free action.
ast.target: 地狱扭曲者可作为一个自由动作进行一次畸变攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hellwarped gains a cumulative +1 attack bonus to its claw attacks until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 地狱扭曲者的爪击获得累积 +1 攻击加值，持续到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Since different creatures become hellwarped beasts, some are tougher or hardier than others. Before battle, roll a d6 and adjust the hellwarped’s stats accordingly. 

  1. d6 Effect
    1 –2 to all defenses
    2 +2 to all defenses
    3 –10% to hit points
    4 +10% to hit points
    5 –1 to all attacks
    6 +1 to all attacks
ast.target:
由于不同生物会变成地狱扭曲兽，有些比其他的更强壮或更健壮。战斗前掷 d6，并据此调整地狱扭曲者的属性。 

  1. d6 效果
    1 所有防御 –2
    2 所有防御 +2
    3 生命值 –10%
    4 生命值 +10%
    5 所有攻击 –1
    6 所有攻击 +1

ast.name: description
ast.source: For its mutated form ability, choose one instead of rolling.
ast.target: 对于其变异形态能力，改为选择其一而非掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 5 ongoing acid damage (easy save ends, 6+), and the hellwasp can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 5 点持续酸性伤害（易豁免结束，6+），并且地狱黄蜂可从目标身上脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 1. 困惑；2. 虚弱；3. 目眩；4. 易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hellwasps are adroit fliers that can hover and even fly backward.
ast.target: 地狱黄蜂是灵巧的飞行者，能够悬停，甚至倒飞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The save versus the stinger’s ongoing acid damage is a normal save (11+) instead of an easy save.
ast.target: 对抗尾针持续酸蚀伤害的豁免是普通豁免（11+），而非容易豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hezrou’s allies gain a +4 attack bonus against any creature it is grabbing.
ast.target: 赫兹洛的盟友对其所擒抱的任何生物获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The giant deals double damage with its attacks against staggered targets.
ast.target: 巨人对踉跄目标的攻击造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck until the end of its next turn as a stone hand rises from the ground to grasp it.
ast.target: 石手从地面升起抓住目标，使其陷住直至其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes the penalty to attacks.
ast.target: 目标还要承受攻击惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Nymphs are tied to an area of land or water. Land areas will be at most a couple miles wide; water areas might be much larger. As a rule, nymphs can’t leave the area they’re bound to.
ast.target: 宁芙与一片陆地或水域相绑定。陆地区域最多只有几英里宽；水域可能要大得多。通常，宁芙不能离开她们所绑定的区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A nymph that drops to 0 hit points or is otherwise slain will eventually return to life in its domain, so long as its domain and its secret survives. After an hour, a nymph needs a hard save to return to life. After eight hours, a nymph needs a normal save to return to life. If the nymph has still not returned, roll an easy save at the end of each 24 hours until the nymph succeeds.
ast.target: 宁芙降至0生命值或以其他方式被杀后，只要其领域和秘密仍在，最终都会在其领域内复活。一小时后，宁芙需要进行困难豁免以复活。八小时后，宁芙需要进行普通豁免以复活。若宁芙仍未返回，则每过24小时结束时进行一次容易豁免，直到宁芙成功为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然12+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck under a pile of treasure until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标被压在一堆宝藏下，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 15 extra damage from a precise strike.
ast.target: 目标因一次精准打击而额外受到15点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the start of its next turn, the first time an attack would hit the hobgoblin captain, it can partially avoid that attack if it has a nearby goblin ally. It only takes half damage from the attack, and that ally takes the rest.
ast.target: 直到其下个回合开始前，若有附近的地精盟友，第一次将命中地精队长的攻击可被其部分避开。它只受到该次攻击的一半伤害，其余由盟友承担。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ignore all damage from a hit (but not a crit) against AC.
ast.target: 对抗AC的命中（非暴击）造成的所有伤害无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入恍惚（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The honey devil can make a disengage check this turn as a free action.
ast.target: 蜜蜂恶魔本回合可作为自由动作进行一次脱离检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the honey devil is staggered by an attack, it makes a confusing plea attack against the attacker as a free action after the attack.
ast.target: 当蜜蜂恶魔被一次攻击打得踉跄时，它在该次攻击后可作为自由动作对攻击者进行一次困惑恳求攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 用此怪物组建战斗时，它只相当于半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a telepathic harry attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是该恶魔在其回合中的第一次攻击，它可以作为自由动作进行一次心灵骚扰攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If this is the devil’s first attack during its turn, it can make a crushing punch or kick attack as a free action.
ast.target: 如果这是该恶魔在其回合中的第一次攻击，它可以作为自由动作进行一次重击拳或踢击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a hooded devil, it adds the escalation die to its attacks until the end of the battle and no other attacks against it can use the escalation die.
ast.target: 当你选择在对兜帽恶魔的攻击中加入升级骰时，它的攻击也加入升级骰直到战斗结束，并且对它的其他攻击都不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of a hooded devil’s turn, it can roll a save against each save ends effect affecting it if it doesn’t attack that turn (so it could successfully save against confused or stunned conditions and still move that turn, for example.)
ast.target: 在兜帽恶魔回合开始时，如果它该回合不攻击，就可以对其受到的每个“豁免结束”效果各进行一次豁免掷骰（例如，它可以成功豁免困惑或眩晕状态并仍然在该回合移动。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned azinth adult can make a trample attack as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 有角阿辛斯成年体本回合可以作为快速动作进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth adult have a 30% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before an attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯成年体的攻击有30%的未命中几率。攻击者必须在进行攻击掷骰前先掷未命中几率。此外，阿辛斯在静止站立或缓慢啃食时几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the miss chance from the azinth’s natural blurring by 5*@ed.
ast.target: 将阿辛斯天生模糊带来的未命中几率提高5*@ed。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time this battle the azinth is staggered, it becomes harder to detect until the end of the battle, gaining a +4 bonus to all defenses.
ast.target: 本战斗中阿辛斯第一次受创时，它会更难被察觉，直到战斗结束，获得所有防御+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks against the horned azinth calf have a 20% miss chance. An attacker must roll the miss chance before the attack roll. In addition, the azinth is nearly invisible while standing still or slowly grazing, as it blends in with its surroundings.
ast.target: 对有角阿辛斯幼崽的攻击有20%的未命中几率。攻击者必须在进行攻击掷骰前先掷未命中几率。此外，阿辛斯在静止站立或缓慢啃食时几乎不可见，因为它与周围环境融为一体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each horned azinth adult gains a +1 attack bonus during a battle that includes one or more calves, +2 if any calves are attacked, and +4 if any calves are killed!
ast.target: 在包含一只或多只幼崽的战斗中，每个有角阿辛斯成年体获得+1攻击加值；若任何幼崽被攻击，则为+2；若任何幼崽被杀死，则为+4！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 有角魔可以以自由动作对另一个目标进行一次切割尾击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horned devil can make a slicing tail attack as a free action.
ast.target: 有角魔可以以自由动作进行一次切割尾击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 30 ongoing fire damage.
ast.target: 目标还会承受30点持续火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a horned devil, you are weakened until the end of your next turn after you make the attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对有角魔的攻击中时，攻击后直到你下个回合结束前你会陷入虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Horned devils are clumsy but determined fliers.
ast.target: 有角魔是笨拙但意志坚定的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 15 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还会承受15点持续酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the huge black dragon’s turns, roll a d4 to see if it gets an extra standard action. If the roll is equal to or less than the escalation die, the black dragon can take an extra standard action that turn. After the first success, the grace die bumps up to a d6. After the second success, it’s a d8, then a d10 after the third success. The fourth success is a d12, and finally a d20 after the fifth one.
ast.target: 在巨型黑龙每个回合开始时，掷一个d4来判断它是否获得额外的标准动作。如果掷骰结果等于或小于升级骰，黑龙该回合可以获得一个额外的标准动作。第一次成功后，恩赐骰提升为d6。第二次成功后为d8，第三次成功后为d10。第四次成功为d12，第五次成功后最终为d20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge black dragon can use acid breath 2d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型黑龙每场战斗可使用2d3次酸息，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black dragons swim well and can breathe underwater.
ast.target: 黑龙善于游泳，并且可以在水下呼吸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸蚀攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然18+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 该巨龙可作为一个自由动作进行一次撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed (save ends). After the target saves, it takes a -1 attack penalty (non-cumulative) until its next full heal-up (because it’s vibrating slightly out of synch with the rest of the world).
ast.target: 目标也会目眩（豁免结束）。目标豁免后，在下一次完全恢复之前承受 -1 攻击减值（不叠加）（因为它与世界其他部分的振动略微不同步）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge blue dragon can use far slashing lightning breath 2d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一条巨型蓝龙每场战斗可使用远距切割闪电吐息 2d4 次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: impossible unless the dragon has a save bonus from some other source).
ast.target: 不可能，除非该巨龙从其他来源获得豁免加值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然 18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a mind-bending babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 该巨龙可作为一个自由动作进行一次扭曲心智的喋喋不休攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused instead of dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标改为困惑而非目眩（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 该巨龙可从目标处挣脱。

ast.name: description
