ast.source: When a creature attacks the dragon, if it used another action this turn before the attack, the dragon gains a +4 bonus to all defenses against the attack.
ast.target: 当某生物攻击该巨龙时，若其在本回合攻击前使用了其他动作，该巨龙对该次攻击的所有防御获得 +4 加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make an acrid smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 该巨龙可作为一个自由动作进行一次刺鼻烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon’s MD, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以巨龙的MD为目标时，巨龙可以作为自由动作迫使攻击者重掷该次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a stultifying smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 巨龙可以作为自由动作进行一次令人昏沉的烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 40 ongoing fire damage and is dazed (save ends both).
ast.target: 目标受到40点持续火焰伤害并陷入迟缓（豁免结束两者）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can heal 300 hp and cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can heal and cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在其回合开始时，巨龙可以作为自由动作恢复300点HP并取消其身上的所有效果和状态，包括持续伤害。即使它无法采取动作（例如被震慑），也可以恢复并取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a poison breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 巨龙可以作为自由动作进行一次毒息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到20点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰中掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fourth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 再进行一次第4次獠牙、利爪与尾击攻击的掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a fifth fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 再进行一次第5次獠牙、利爪与尾击攻击的掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A huge red dragon can use fiery breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 巨型红龙每场战斗可使用火焰吐息1d6次，但绝不会连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as a free action.
ast.target: 巨龙可以以自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 18+ against that attack. If the attack misses, the dragon can make a paralyzing smoke attack as free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以巨龙为目标时，它可以以自由动作迫使攻击者重掷该次攻击，并对该次攻击拥有18+伤害抗性。若该次攻击未命中，巨龙可以以自由动作进行一次麻痹烟雾攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The white dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 白龙可以以自由动作进行一次寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The thug deals +6 damage with its next attack this battle.
ast.target: 暴徒在本场战斗的下一次攻击造成+6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d6 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标都受到1d6点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is taking ongoing psychic damage, the attack deals +2d6 damage.
ast.target: 如果目标正承受持续的精神伤害，该攻击额外造成 +2d6 伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 当目标承受持续的精神伤害时，它处于恍惚（-4 攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing psychic damage, it is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: 当目标承受持续的精神伤害时，它陷入困惑而非恍惚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hungry stars flap and glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground.
ast.target: 饥饿之星振翅、滑翔并悬停，始终在离地七八码的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 1d8 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还会承受 1d8 持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can turn its own failed disengage check into a success by taking 1d4 damage.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛可以通过承受 1d4 伤害，将自己失败的脱离检定转为成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hunting spider can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狩猎蜘蛛在天花板和墙壁上攀爬的能力与在地面移动一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action, one of the ice devil’s nearby allies of its level or lower can make a basic attack as the ice devil sets the battlefield. That attack only deals half damage.
ast.target: 作为一个自由动作，冰魔将战场改造时，其附近且等级不高于它的一名盟友可以进行一次基础攻击。该攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against an ice devil, you are stuck (save ends).
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加入对冰魔的攻击时，你会被定身（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lower level nearby ally of the ice devil attacks a creature that’s stuck, the crit range of that attack expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当冰魔附近且等级较低的盟友攻击一个被定身的生物时，该攻击的暴击范围按升级骰扩大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 13+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然13+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sorceress can make an icy delusions attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 女巫可以以自由动作对目标进行冰霜幻觉攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: confused (hard save ends, 16+); OR stunned (save ends). After saving, the creature rerolls its initiative.
ast.target: 困惑（困难豁免结束，16+）；或眩晕（豁免结束）。成功豁免后，该生物重掷先攻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ice sorceress has resist damage 16+ unless the attack deals fire damage.
ast.target: 除非攻击造成火焰伤害，否则冰霜女巫拥有16+抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of battle each PC rolls one icon relationship die of their choice and one die chosen from their relationships by the GM. A roll of 6 means the chimera has shifted in a manner that gives it a chimerical flaw (F) that the adventurers can exploit. A roll of a 5 indicates that the chimera gains both a flaw and a benefit associated with that icon. A result of 1 or 2 means that the chimera gains the icon’s chimerical benefit (B) without the flaw. Actual benefits and flaws are up to the GM, and should reflect the icons with which the players have relationships.
ast.target: 战斗开始时，每位PC掷一颗自己选择的标志关系骰，以及一颗由GM从其关系中选择的骰子。掷出6表示奇美拉以某种方式发生变化，获得冒险者可利用的奇美拉缺陷（F）。掷出5表示奇美拉同时获得与该标志相关的缺陷和益处。结果为1或2表示奇美拉仅获得该标志的奇美拉益处（B），不带缺陷。具体的益处与缺陷由GM决定，并应反映玩家所建立关系的标志。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a spell attack misses the chimera, it has no miss effect and the chimera heals 40 hp.
ast.target: 当一次法术攻击未命中奇美拉时，没有未命中效果，且奇美拉回复40生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的近战攻击暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera saves against a condition, it becomes immune to that condition until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当奇美拉对一种状态豁免成功时，它在战斗结束前对该状态免疫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of spell attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的法术攻击暴击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the chimera at the start of its turn, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当生物在其回合开始时与奇美拉处于交战状态，它受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the chimera scores a critical hit, it takes a cumulative -2 penalty to all defenses.
ast.target: 每当奇美拉造成一次暴击时，它所有防御承受累计 -2 罚值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any damage dice that roll maximum damage against the chimera count as 1s.
ast.target: 任何对奇美拉投出最大伤害的伤害骰都视为 1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera won’t willingly disengage from a creature engaged with it.
ast.target: 奇美拉不会自愿脱离与其交战的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the chimera gains an additional standard action that turn.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，奇美拉在该回合获得一次额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera’s form is unusually frail, and any damage dice that roll 1s against the chimera count as 2s.
ast.target: 奇美拉的形态异常脆弱，任何对奇美拉投出 1 的伤害骰都视为 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera makes a fiery breath attack, it can make another fiery breath attack that turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 当奇美拉进行火焰吐息攻击时，它可以在该回合以快速动作再进行一次火焰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural odd miss with fiery breath, it takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉以火焰吐息掷出自然奇数未命中时，它会受到 20 点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of poison attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的毒素攻击的暴击范围扩大 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of holy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的神圣攻击的暴击范围扩大 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the chimera can make a tusk charge attack. It can’t make any other attacks the same turn.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，奇美拉可以进行獠牙冲锋攻击。它在同一回合不能进行其他攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The horns and tusks of the chimera lock together at inopportune moments. When it rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack against multiple targets, it loses any further attacks that turn.
ast.target: 奇美拉的角与獠牙会在不合时宜的时候卡在一起。当它对多个目标进行攻击掷出自然 1-5 时，该回合会失去后续攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chimera can fly like an eagle, swooping in and out of the battle.
ast.target: 奇美拉像鹰一样飞行，俯冲进出战场。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of negative energy attacks against the chimera expands by 2.
ast.target: 对奇美拉的负能量攻击的重击范围扩大 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chimera rolls a natural 1-5 with an attack and misses, the target takes 20 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 当奇美拉攻击掷出自然 1-5 且未命中时，目标受到 20 点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each turn the chimera hits with an attack, it rerolls the attack and takes the lower roll.
ast.target: 每回合奇美拉首次命中攻击时，它会重掷该次攻击并取较低结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not staggered, the chimera rolls 2d20 with its melee attacks and uses the higher roll.
ast.target: 在未被重创时，奇美拉的近战攻击掷 2d20 并取较高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: the target is weakened instead of dazed; OR the imp can make a blight jet attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 目标变为虚弱而非迟缓；或小恶魔可以以自由动作对另一个目标进行枯萎喷射攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature attacks the imp and rolls a natural 1-5, that creature takes 1d10 psychic damage.
ast.target: 每当生物攻击小恶魔并掷出自然 1-5 时，该生物受到 1d10 点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An intellect assassin’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智力刺客对 MD 的攻击的重击范围扩大 2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can't add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends)
ast.target: 目标不能将升级骰加到其攻击中（豁免终止）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The intellect devourer’s crit range with attacks against MD expands by 2.
ast.target: 智噬者对MD的攻击重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Increased trauma: Add the following extra effect trigger to the intellect devourer’s recall trauma attack.

Natural 5, 10, 15, 20: The target can’t cast spells until the end of its next turn.
ast.target:
创伤加深： 为智噬者的 回忆创伤 攻击添加以下额外效果触发。

自然骰 5、10、15、20： 目标在其下回合结束前不能施法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: With a resounding “WHANG!”, the shovel leaves the target dazed until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 伴随着一声响亮的“WHANG!”，铲子使目标恍惚，直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a jackal gravewrecker mook rolls a natural 1 with an attack, its cowardly nature takes over and it flees, leaving the rest of its mob to fight on.
ast.target: 当一名豺狼掘墓者喽啰在攻击时掷出自然1，它的怯懦本性占上风并逃跑，留下其余喽啰继续战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mage can make a second attack against the same target as a free action.
ast.target: 法师可以对同一目标进行第二次攻击，作为一个自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 negative energy damage
ast.target: 目标受到5点负能量伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The high priest can make a *cull the weak* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 高阶祭司可以以自由动作进行一次*cull the weak*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jackal high priest starts each battle accompanied by a mob of 1d6+1 10th level greater summoned ghoul mooks. (The mooks gained via this ability are accounted for in the building battle math by the jackal priest’s designation as a double-strength monster.) At the start of each of the jackal priest’s turns, (whether or not the jackal high priest is engaged!) roll a d6. If you roll less than or equal to the escalation die, use the jackal priest’s standard action to add another mob of 1d6+1 greater summoned ghoul mooks to the battle. The newly summoned mooks take their turn after the jackal high priest’s turn. Stop rolling the d6 after the ability has triggered to summon the second mob of ghoul mooks.
ast.target: 豺狼高阶祭司每场战斗开始时都会伴随一群1d6+1个10级强化召唤食尸鬼喽啰。（通过该能力获得的喽啰已在战斗构建计算中计入，因为豺狼祭司被指定为双倍强度怪物。）在豺狼祭司每个回合开始时（无论豺狼高阶祭司是否处于交战！）掷一个d6。若掷出结果小于或等于升级骰，使用豺狼祭司的标准动作再加入一群1d6+1个强化召唤食尸鬼喽啰到战斗中。新召唤的喽啰在豺狼高阶祭司回合之后行动。在该能力触发并召唤第二群食尸鬼喽啰后，停止掷d6。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 72 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (–4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，若目标生命值为72或更少，则其恍惚（–4攻击），且其攻击不加升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/battle, as the jackal mage uses its psychic connection with the Fallen Icon to show an image of the moment of death (always past, not future) of someone the target loved or someone they let down.
ast.target: 每场战斗 1 次，豺狼法师利用其与堕落圣像的心灵连接，展示目标所爱之人或辜负之人的死亡瞬间（总是过去而非未来）的影像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage
ast.target: 目标还会受到 5 点持续伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到 10 点精神伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jackal priest starts each battle accompanied by a mob of 1d4+1 7th level summoned ghoul mooks. (The mooks gained via this ability are accounted for in the building battle math by the jackal priest’s designation as an elite monster.) At the start of each of the jackal priest’s turns, if the jackal priest is not engaged, roll a d6. If you roll less than or equal to the escalation die, use the jackal priest’s standard action to add another mob of 1d4+1 summoned ghoul mooks to the battle. The newly summoned mooks take their turn after the jackal priest’s turn. Stop rolling the d6 after the ability has triggered to summon the second mob of ghoul mooks.
ast.target: 豺狼祭司每场战斗开始时都会伴随一群 1d4+1 个 7 级召唤食尸鬼杂兵。（通过该能力获得的杂兵，在战斗构建的数值中已由豺狼祭司作为精英怪物的定位计入。）在豺狼祭司每个回合开始时，若豺狼祭司未被缠斗，掷一枚 d6。若掷出结果小于或等于升势骰，使用豺狼祭司的标准动作再加入一群 1d4+1 个召唤食尸鬼杂兵参与战斗。新召唤的杂兵在豺狼祭司回合之后行动。该能力触发并召唤出第二群食尸鬼杂兵后，停止掷 d6。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles with this monster, it counts as 1.5 of a monster at 7th level.
ast.target: 使用该怪物构建战斗时，按 7 级怪物的 1.5 个计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the jackal priest drops to 0 hp, she can use summon ghouls as a free action.
ast.target: 当豺狼祭司降至 0 hp 时，她可以以自由动作施放召唤食尸鬼。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scout can take an additional move action this turn.
ast.target: 侦察兵本回合可以额外进行一个移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a jackpot zombie cancels one mook’s lethal jackpot ability that turn, though if the crit eliminates more than one coin zombie, others will still trigger their own lethal jackpots.
ast.target: 对大奖僵尸的一次重击会取消一个杂兵该回合的致命大奖能力，但如果该重击消灭了不止一个硬币僵尸，其余仍会触发各自的致命大奖。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The haunted skull can glide and hover, always within seven or eight feet of the ground. It also performs barrel rolls.
ast.target: 闹鬼的骷髅能滑翔与悬停，始终离地七八码高。它还会进行桶滚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The jotun auroch can make a fiery or frosty breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 霜巨牛可以以自由动作进行炽热或冰霜吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 18+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷或火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者的攻击骰必须掷出自然18+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the kelpling reaches 0 hp, it doesn’t die. Instead, it separates into 1d3 +1 constituent symbionts, known as kelplets.
ast.target: 当幼凯尔普降至0 hp时，它不会死亡。相反，它会分裂成1d3 +1个组成共生体，称为kelplet。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会受到未命中攻击的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When one of the kobold’s allies engages a creature engaged with the kobold, the kobold can pop free as a free action.
ast.target: 当狗头人的一名盟友与正与狗头人交战的生物交战时，狗头人可以以自由动作脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This kobold berserker mook transforms into an undamaged *really angry kobold* after the attack.
ast.target: 该狗头人狂战杂兵在攻击后会变成一个未受伤的*非常愤怒的狗头人*。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll 2d20 for each of the kobold’s attacks and use the higher result.
ast.target: 为狗头人的每次攻击掷2d20，并取较高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold pushes or trips the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标推入或绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is line tied to the barbed dart, pulling/tripping the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 倒刺飞镖系着一条线，将目标拉入/绊入陷阱。参见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The steed can’t be targeted separately from the kobold. If the kobold dies the dog runs away.
ast.target: 坐骑不能与狗头人分开作为目标。如果狗头人死亡，狗就会逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 8 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到8点持续酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dragon-soul’s wings aren’t strong enough for sustained flapping flight, but with a headwind and a tall place to launch from it can glide for hours. During battle, however, it must land at the end of its turn if the escalation die is even (but see fire spit).
ast.target: 龙魂的翅膀不够强壮，无法持续振翅飞行，但在迎风且有高处起飞的情况下，它可以滑翔数小时。然而在战斗中，如果升级骰为偶数，它必须在回合结束时落地（但见火焰吐息）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold drags the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人将目标拖入陷阱。见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold summons a trap that was not previously there, which the target triggers. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 狗头人召唤一个之前不存在的陷阱，目标触发它。见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The engineer’s kobold allies gain a +2 attack bonus against the target until the start of the engineer’s next turn.
ast.target: 工程师的狗头人盟友对目标的攻击检定获得+2加值，直到工程师的下个回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The blast knocks the target into a trap. See Trapster Kobold ability.
ast.target: 爆炸将目标击入陷阱。见陷阱师狗头人能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each other glinter in the battle gains a +1 attack bonus (cumulative) until the end of the turn.
ast.target: 战斗中其他每个光闪获得+1攻击加值（可叠加），直到回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mob of glinters can use this attack only once during the battle. On the turn that they use the attack, each glinter in the mob can choose whether to make the attack or not. Any who don’t use it, lose it.
ast.target: 一群光闪在战斗中只能使用一次此攻击。使用该攻击的回合中，群中的每个光闪可以选择是否进行攻击。未使用者将失去该攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever three or more glinters drop from a single attack (possibly involving multiple attack rolls), one-third of those glinters are undamaged instead (round down).
ast.target: 每当一次攻击击倒三个或更多光闪（可能涉及多次攻击检定）时，其中三分之一的光闪改为未受伤（向下取整）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a glinter mob is reduced to half its number or less, the surviving glinters gain a +4 bonus to all defenses until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 当一群光闪减少到原数量的一半或更少时，幸存的光闪在战斗结束前所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A kobold shadow-warrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 狗头人影武者能像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobolds take no damage from missed attacks.
ast.target: 狗头人不会因未命中的攻击而受伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The kobold warrior can pop free from the target.
ast.target: 狗头人战士可从目标身边脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kobold warriors with single digit hit points will run away the first chance they get.
ast.target: 生命值为个位数的狗头人战士会在一有机会时就逃跑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When staggered, the kohwa enforcer gains a bonus to damage equal to triple the escalation die (3*@ed).
ast.target: 当陷入重创时，科瓦执行者获得等同于升级骰三倍的伤害加值（3*@ed）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are winged, and therefore capable of flight. While they are strong fliers and able to travel great distances in this way, they are acutely aware of how ungainly they look while doing so, and therefore prefer to walk or run unless they are certain no one is watching.
ast.target: 科瓦有翅膀，因此能飞行。虽然他们擅长飞行并能以此方式远行，但他们很清楚自己飞行时看起来有多笨拙，因此除非确定没有人看见，否则更喜欢走路或跑步。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kohwa are capable of short-range telepathy with non-kohwa. It is assumed (although no one is entirely sure) that they are capable of communicating with others of their species at greater distances, as when one is in trouble, others are sure to appear—eventually.
ast.target: 科瓦能够与非科瓦进行短距离心灵感应。据推测（尽管没人完全确定），他们也能在更远的距离与同族沟通；当其中一只遇到麻烦时，其他的最终总会出现—只是迟早而已。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the kohwa messenger makes a natural odd roll when using this attack, it can immediately make another *piercing gaze* attack roll against a different target it has not already targeted this turn.
ast.target: 每次科瓦信使使用此攻击掷出自然奇数时，它可以立刻对本回合尚未成为其目标的另一名不同目标再进行一次*piercing gaze*攻击检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cannot be used until the escalation die reaches 4+
ast.target: 直到升级骰达到4+时才能使用

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, as a quick action, the kohwa messenger can invoke the protection of their unknown gods. Once the invocation has been made, at the start of each of the messenger’s turns, roll 1d6. As long as the roll is equal to or less than the escalation die, critical hits against the messenger and its allies only inflict normal damage (although they do still trigger the kohwa enforcer’s acid rain attack, if appropriate). As soon as the roll fails, the protection lapses.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为一个迅捷动作，kohwa信使可以祈求其未知神祇的庇护。一旦完成祈求，在信使每个回合开始时，掷1d6。只要掷骰结果小于或等于升级骰，对信使及其盟友的重击仅造成普通伤害（但在适当情况下仍会触发kohwa执法者的酸雨攻击）。一旦掷骰失败，庇护即失效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller makes a second *thrashing tail* attack against a different target.
ast.target: koruku landkiller对另一个目标进行第二次*thrashing tail*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller regains its *stolen magic* attack if it’s expended.
ast.target: 如果已消耗，koruku landkiller恢复其*stolen magic*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One nearby koruku servitor can make a *wild magic blast* attack (fire damage) as a free action.
ast.target: 一名附近的koruku仆从可以作为一个自由动作进行*wild magic blast*攻击（火焰伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 attack bonus against stuck targets on their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的koruku仆从在其下个回合对被困目标获得+4攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a cumulative +2 to the defenses of all koruku servitors until the end of the servitors’ next turn.
ast.target: 所有koruku仆从的防御获得累计+2，直到仆从下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby koruku servitors gain a +4 damage bonus until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 所有附近的koruku仆从获得+4伤害加值，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 向战斗中加入一名koruku仆从。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku landkiller adds twice the escalation die (2*@ed) to its saves.
ast.target: koruku landkiller将升级骰的两倍（2*@ed）加到其豁免上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a standard action, a koruku landkiller can make one of the magical attacks listed under "stolen magic." The first five attacks can add the escalation die when rolled against a target that has an icon relationship with the icon the power has been stolen from! Feel free to roll a d6 if you don’t want to spend time choosing between attacks. (If its thrashing tail attack roll allows the landkiller to regain stolen magic, it doesn’t have to choose which magical attack it will use until it actually uses the attack.)
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为一个标准动作，科鲁库陆地杀手可以进行“偷盗魔法”下列出的一个魔法攻击。前五个攻击在对与被偷盗力量所属图标存在图标关系的目标进行掷骰时可以加上升级骰！如果你不想花时间在攻击之间做选择，可以随意掷一个 d6。（如果其猛击尾巴攻击的掷骰让陆地杀手恢复偷盗魔法，则在实际使用该攻击之前无需选择要使用哪一个魔法攻击。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the koruku landkiller is hit by an attack, add a koruku servitor to the battle.
ast.target: 当科鲁库陆地杀手被一次攻击命中时，将一个科鲁库仆从加入战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can make a *blood-sucking proboscis* attack against the target as a quick action this turn.
ast.target: 科鲁库幼虫在本回合可以作为一个快速动作对目标进行*吸血喙管*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 additional damage and the koruku larva can heal 5 hit points.
ast.target: 目标受到额外5点伤害，科鲁库幼虫可以回复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each creature engaged with a damaged koruku larva at the start of its turn takes 2d6 acid damage.
ast.target: 每个在其回合开始时与受伤的科鲁库幼虫处于接战状态的生物都会受到2d6点酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku larva can physically and magically bond with a willing humanoid, or a humanoid it has reduced to 0 hp, and evolve over the course of a day into a koruku symbiont.
ast.target: 科鲁库幼虫可以与自愿的类人生物，或被它降至0 hp的类人生物在身体和魔法上结合，并在一天的时间内进化为科鲁库共生体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku servitor takes 10 damage and the target gains a random Wild Magic Benefit from the table below.
ast.target: 科鲁库仆从受到10点伤害，目标从下表中获得一个随机的野性魔法增益。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Koruku servitors fade away if they fly too far from their koruku landkiller, but are quick and agile fliers in battle.
ast.target: 科鲁库仆从若飞离其科鲁库陆地杀手过远就会消散，但在战斗中是快速而敏捷的飞行者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened (normal save ends) and the koruku symbiont can pop free of the target.
ast.target: 目标虚弱（正常豁免结束），科鲁库共生体可以从目标身上弹出脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 8 ongoing poison damage (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标受到8点持续毒素伤害（普通豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The koruku symbiont can make an *acid spew* attack as a quick action.
ast.target: koruku共生体可以以快速动作进行一次*acid spew*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stunned until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标昏迷直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (normal save ends).
ast.target: 目标被迟滞（普通豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the koruku symbiont drops to 0 hit points, it rolls a normal save (11+). If the save succeeds, place a 5th level koruku larva with 30 hit points on the battlefield where it has detached itself from its former host. The staggered larva maintains the initiative of its host, but any conditions placed upon the host end. (If the save fails, the larva gets squashed along with its host!)
ast.target: 当koruku共生体降至0生命值时，它进行一次普通豁免（11+）。若豁免成功，在其从原宿主脱离的位置放置一只5级、30生命值的koruku幼虫。该踉跄的幼虫保持其宿主的先攻，但施加在宿主身上的任何状态结束。（若豁免失败，幼虫会和宿主一起被压扁！）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lammasu priest can make a righteous ray of faith attack against a different target.
ast.target: lammasu祭司可以对另一个目标进行一次正义之信仰射线攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the lammasu priest can make this invocation as a quick action if it has used invocation of the world unseen. At the start of each of the lammasu priest’s turns, roll a d8. If the roll is less than or equal to the escalation die, the lammasu can make an overworld’s rebuke attack as a free action that turn.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，若lammasu祭司已使用“不可见世界的祈祷”，它可以以快速动作进行此祈祷。在lammasu祭司每个回合开始时，投掷1d8。若结果小于或等于升级骰，lammasu可在该回合以自由动作进行一次“上界的谴责”攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast spells (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标无法施法（简单豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One spell or effect created by the target this battle is canceled (lammasu’s choice).
ast.target: 目标在本次战斗中制造的一个法术或效果被取消（由拉玛苏选择）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the black dragon’s turns, roll a d6 to see if it gets an extra standard action. If the roll is equal to or less than the escalation die, the black dragon can take an extra standard action that turn. After the first success, the grace die bumps up to a d8. After the second success, it’s a d10, then a d12 after the third success, and finally a d20 after the fourth one.
ast.target: 在黑龙每个回合开始时，掷1d6以查看它是否获得额外的标准动作。如果掷骰结果等于或小于升级骰，黑龙在该回合可以进行一个额外的标准动作。第一次成功后，恩惠骰提升为d8。第二次成功后为d10，第三次成功后为d12，第四次成功后最终为d20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型黑龙每场战斗可使用1d3次酸息，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当酸性攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d6 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型蓝龙每场战斗可使用1d6次闪电吐息，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当闪电攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon can make a babble attack as a free action.
ast.target: 该龙可以以自由动作进行一次咿呀攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action at the start of its turn, the dragon can cancel all effects and conditions on it, including ongoing damage. It can cancel these effects even if it’s prevented from taking actions, such as by being stunned.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，在其回合开始时作为自由动作，该龙可以取消其身上的所有效果与状态，包括持续伤害。即使它被阻止采取动作（如被击晕），也可以取消这些效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing poison damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll a third fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 进行第三次獠牙、利爪和尾巴攻击掷骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A large red dragon can use fiery breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 大型红龙每场战斗可使用1d4次火焰吐息，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 16+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当攻击以龙为目标时，它可作为自由动作迫使攻击者重掷该攻击，并对该次攻击拥有16+抗伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of lesser haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the lesser haunting’s attacks and damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每有一群独立的次级幽魂杂兵（每群至少有四名杂兵），次级幽魂的攻击和伤害各获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xorn can see through all types of rock and soil for some distance, let’s say "nearby".
ast.target: 索恩能够透视所有类型的岩石和土壤，距离上就说是“附近”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any woven engaged with the target can attack it as a free action.
ast.target: 任何与目标交战的编织体都可以作为自由动作攻击它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich baroness scores a critical hit, the target loses a death save until the end of the battle (effectively, it now dies after failing three death saves, and the effect is cumulative). In addition, the crit range of attacks by the lich against the target expands by the escalation die.
ast.target: 当巫妖女男爵打出重击时，目标在战斗结束前失去一次死亡豁免（实际上，它现在在失败三次死亡豁免后就会死亡，且效果可叠加）。此外，巫妖对该目标的攻击重击范围会随着升级骰扩大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich drops to 0 hit points, it crumbles to dust but does not die. It begins to reform near its phylactery, taking a number of days to regain its full strength equal to its level. If the phylactery has been destroyed, the lich dies when it drops to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 当巫妖生命值降至0时，它会化为尘埃但不会死亡。它会在其魂匣附近开始重塑，恢复到完整实力所需的天数等于其等级。如果魂匣已被摧毁，巫妖在生命值降至0时就会死亡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+)
ast.target: 目标变为虚弱而非恍惚（困难豁免结束，16+）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is encased in shadows (save ends). While under the effect, it’s weakened and takes 10 ongoing cold damage.
ast.target: 目标被阴影包裹（豁免结束）。在该效果持续期间，其处于虚弱状态并承受10点持续寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing fire damage instead of 10.
ast.target: 目标改为承受20点持续火焰伤害，而非10点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich count scores a critical hit, the target loses a death save until the end of the battle (effectively, it now dies after failing three death saves, and the effect is cumulative). In addition, the crit range of attacks by the lich against the target expands by the escalation die and the lich heals 40 hit points.
ast.target: 当巫妖伯爵打出一次重击时，目标失去一次死亡豁免，直到战斗结束（实际上，目标现在在三次死亡豁免失败后死亡，且该效果可叠加）。此外，巫妖对目标的攻击重击范围按升级骰扩大，巫妖回复40点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 48 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，若目标生命值为48或更少，则其陷入恍惚（攻击-4），且攻击不加升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with the lich flower, non-undead and non-plant creatures are dazed (-4 attacks).
ast.target: 与巫妖之花交战时，非亡灵与非植物生物陷入恍惚（攻击-4）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich flower drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a blood rose or poison dandelion that lacks the black-gray resurgence ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当巫妖之花降至0生命值时，它被摧毁，直到其下回合开始。其下回合开始时，它会以血玫瑰或毒蒲公英的形态复活，缺失黑灰复苏能力，但其余部分完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is weakened instead of dazed (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标改为虚弱而非恍惚（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is being grabbed by the ghostly hands, it takes 30 negative energy damage at the start of its turn and must make a last gasp save. On the fourth failed last gasp save, the creature’s soul is torn from it and it dies. Unconscious creatures take a -4 penalty to their last gasp saves. Note, grabbed creatures take a -5 penalty to disengage checks.
ast.target: 当生物被幽灵之手抓住时，它在其回合开始时承受30点负能量伤害，并必须进行一次最后喘息豁免。第四次最后喘息豁免失败时，该生物的灵魂被撕离并死亡。昏迷的生物进行最后喘息豁免时承受-4惩罚。注意，被抓住的生物进行脱离检定时承受-5惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when an attack would hit the lich prince, the attack misses instead and the lich teleports to a nearby location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击本应命中巫妖王子时，改为未命中，且巫妖以自由动作传送到附近它能看见的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the lich prince scores a critical hit, if after taking damage the target still has hit points, it drops to 0 hp, falls unconscious, and begins making death saves. When the target saves against this effect, it regains hit points equal to the amount it had before dropping to 0 hp (after the crit damage). In addition, the crit range of attacks by the lich against the target expands by an amount equal to the escalation die and the lich heals 60 hit points.
ast.target: 当巫妖王子打出重击时，若目标在承受伤害后仍有生命值，则其降至0生命值，昏迷并开始进行死亡豁免。当目标成功对抗该效果时，其回复的生命值等于其降至0生命值之前的数值（在重击伤害之后）。此外，巫妖对目标的攻击重击范围按升级骰数值扩大，巫妖回复60点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While engaged with this creature, if the target has 120 hp or fewer, it’s dazed (-4 attack) and does not add the escalation die to its attacks.
ast.target: 与该生物交战时，若目标生命值为120或更少，则其处于目眩（攻击-4），且攻击时不加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lizardman savage can make a bite attack against the target or another creature engaged with it as a free action.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人狂战士可作为一个自由动作，对目标或与其交战的另一生物进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the lokkris hits with the attack, the crit range for all lokkris against that target expands by 1 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每当洛克里斯的该攻击命中时，所有洛克里斯对该目标的重击范围扩大1，持续到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lokkris are quick darting fliers that move with an angry buzzing sound.
ast.target: 洛克里斯是迅捷的穿梭飞行者，移动时会发出愤怒的嗡嗡声。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A lokkris can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 洛克里斯在天花板和墙壁上爬行的难度与在地面上移动一样容易。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dirt-fisher can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances, but it prefers to attack from within its pre-dug trap-door pit. It usually has a few pits dug nearby if forced to leave its current pit.
ast.target: 泥穴渔者可在短距离内以极快速度掘进，但更偏好从预先挖好的陷阱井中发动攻击。若被迫离开当前陷阱井，它通常会在附近挖有几个备用坑洞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round an attack hits the dirt-fisher, it can hunker down and pull the lid on its pit shut. If it does, it gains a +3 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn, and any creature in the pit takes a -5 penalty to checks to climb out of the pit. Force attacks and opportunity attacks don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 每回合第一次被攻击命中时，泥穴渔者可以蜷伏并拉上其陷阱井的盖子。若如此做，它在其下一回合开始前获得所有防御+3的加值，且井内任何生物进行攀爬出井的检定承受-5罚值。强制攻击与借机攻击不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dirt-fisher deals double damage against creatures engaged with it in its pit.
ast.target: 泥穴渔者对在其陷阱井内与其交战的生物造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 6 extra fire damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到6点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For every separate mob of major haunting mooks in the battle (mobs start with at least four mooks), add a +1 bonus to the major haunting’s attacks and +2 to its damage.
ast.target: 战斗中每有一群独立的重大缠绕杂兵群（群体至少由四名杂兵组成），就为重大缠绕的攻击加+1加值，伤害加+2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 蝎狮可以以一个免费动作对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击检定）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it is staggered.
ast.target: 每次蝎狮使用尾刺齐射攻击时，它会受到1d6伤害，若处于重创则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can make a single volley of tail spikes attack (one attack roll) against a different target as a free action without taking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 蝎狮可以以一个免费动作对一个不同的目标进行一次尾刺齐射攻击（一次攻击检定），且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In addition, the target can’t use the escalation die until it saves.
ast.target: 此外，目标在通过豁免前不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The manticore can use musical voice only 1d4 times during the battle, and never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 蝎狮在战斗中只能使用音乐之声1d4次，且不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the manticore uses its volley of tail spikes attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每次蝎狮使用尾刺齐射攻击时，它会受到1d6伤害，若处于重创则受到2d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fortissimo—Each of the manticore’s allies gains a +2d6 damage bonus with attacks that hit until the end of the battle (non-cumulative).
ast.target: Fortissimo—每个蝎狮的盟友在战斗结束前，攻击命中时获得+2d6伤害加值（非累积）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Profundo—The manticore’s musical voice attack now deals 40 psychic damage instead of 20 until the end of the battle.
ast.target: Profundo—蝎狮的音乐之声攻击在战斗结束前造成40点心灵伤害，替代原本的20点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Furioso—The target is confused instead of dazed.
ast.target: Furioso—目标变为混乱而非眩晕。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Largo—The manticore can make a musical voice attack during its next turn as a free action, but with a +3 attack bonus. This free attack won’t trigger another battle music effect.
ast.target: Largo—蝎狮可在其下一个回合以一个免费动作进行音乐之声攻击，并获得+3攻击加值。此免费攻击不会触发另一个战斗乐章效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar pulls its target under the soil/ground. The target is stuck, hampered, and takes 5 ongoing damage from suffocation (save ends all)
ast.target: 曼提库姆哈尔将目标拖入土壤/地面下。目标被困住、受阻，并因窒息受到5点持续伤害（豁免结束全部）

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar can move rapidly through sand, loose soil, or dry eroded earth. It prefers to dig out a wide pit and lie in wait for prey. (See Burrowing.)
ast.target: 曼提库姆哈尔可以在沙地、松散土壤或干燥侵蚀的地面中快速移动。它更喜欢挖出一个宽坑，伏击猎物。（见“掘地”。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the mantikumhar uses its serpent sting attack, it takes 1d6 damage, or 2d6 damage if it’s staggered.
ast.target: 每次曼提库姆哈尔使用其蛇刺攻击时，它会受到1d6点伤害；若它处于踉跄状态，则受到2d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A mantikumhar can burrow into the soil as a move action, concealing itself from attacks. A hunkered mantikumhar gains a +3 bonus to AC and PD, but it can’t use crushing leonine jaws.
ast.target: 曼提库姆哈尔可以以一个移动动作钻入土中，从而隐蔽自身免受攻击。蜷伏的曼提库姆哈尔获得AC和PD+3的加值，但无法使用粉碎狮颚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mantikumhar’s extensible tail can strike by surprise like a cobra from anywhere in its pit.
ast.target: 曼提库姆哈尔可伸缩的尾巴能像眼镜蛇一样从其坑内任意位置发动突袭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The marilith’s crit range with melee attacks expands by a number equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 玛丽丽丝的近战攻击重击范围扩大，扩大值等于升级骰的点数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered and weakened (hard save ends both, 16+).
ast.target: 目标受阻并虚弱（困难豁免结束两者，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mutant chuul can make three crushing claws attacks instead of two. If two of the attacks hit the same target, the chuul grabs it.
ast.target: 变异楚尔可以进行三次粉碎利爪攻击，而不是两次。若其中两次攻击命中同一目标，楚尔会抓住它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the chuul rolls a natural even hit with crushing claws, it deals 120 damage instead of 70.
ast.target: 当楚尔用粉碎利爪掷出自然偶数命中时，造成120点伤害而非70点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul gains a venom spit attack.
ast.target: 楚尔获得毒液喷吐攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The chuul can make a second venom spit attack against the same group as a free action.
ast.target: 丘尔可以以自由动作对同一群体再进行一次毒液喷吐攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mausoleum dragon can make an infused ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 陵墓巨龙可以以自由动作进行一次灌注冰息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 7 ongoing holy damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到7点持续的神圣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷或负能量攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然16以上，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 4 ongoing acid damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到4点持续的酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium black dragon can use acid breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一只中型黑龙每场战斗可使用酸息1d3次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an acid attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次酸蚀攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然12以上，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium blue dragon can use lightning breath 1d4 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 一只中型蓝龙每场战斗可使用闪电吐息1d4次，但不能连续两个回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a lightning attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次闪电攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然12以上，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中掷出自然12以上，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a poison attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次毒素攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然12+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll another fangs, claws, and tail attack.
ast.target: 再进行一次獠牙、利爪和尾巴攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A medium red dragon can use fiery breath 1d3 times per battle, but never two turns in a row.
ast.target: 中型红龙每场战斗可使用火焰吐息1d3次，但不能连续两回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action when an attack targets the dragon, it can force the attacker to reroll the attack and has resist damage 12+ against that attack.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当一次攻击以巨龙为目标时，它可作为一个自由动作迫使攻击者重掷攻击检定，并对该次攻击具有12+伤害抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 12+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然12+，否则只能造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a petrifying gaze attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 美杜莎可作为自由动作对目标进行石化凝视攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The medusa can make a lightning fork attack against a different target as a free action; keep making lightning fork attacks until you run out of targets that have taken damage from lightning fork or roll a natural odd attack.
ast.target: 美杜莎可作为自由动作对另一个目标进行闪电分叉攻击；持续进行闪电分叉攻击，直到没有受到闪电分叉伤害的目标可选，或掷出自然奇数的攻击结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If lightning isn’t working against her target, the medusa noble can take a -2 attack penalty to change the energy type of her ranged attack to fire or thunder.
ast.target: 若闪电对目标不起作用，美杜莎贵族可承受-2攻击惩罚，将其远程攻击的能量类型改为火焰或雷鸣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the medusa’s turns, roll a d4. If you roll less than or equal to the escalation die, the medusa can also use petrifying gaze as a quick action once during that turn.
ast.target: 在美杜莎每个回合开始时，掷1d4。若结果小于或等于升级骰，美杜莎还可在该回合中使用一次石化凝视作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If in her true form, the melusine has limited flight capability, which she uses to effect an escape if sufficiently close to a convenient source of fresh water.
ast.target: 若处于真身，美露西娜具有有限的飞行能力；若足够接近便捷的淡水源，她会用其实施逃脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the melusine can change her form to that of any humanoid or fish (the latter usually only if already in water), or turn back into her true form. A successful DC 25 skill check is required to see through the shapechange.
ast.target: 以一个标准动作，美露西娜可以变形为任意类人生物或鱼类（后者通常仅在已在水中时），或变回真身。成功的 DC 25 技能检定才能看穿该变形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attack does double damage, but the xombie takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 该攻击造成双倍伤害，但 xombie 受到 1d6 伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attack only uses a quick action rather than a standard action.
ast.target: 该攻击只需快速动作，而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
As a move action, the minotaur adept teleports somewhere nearby that it can see. Through the earth it looks like burrowing, through air like teleporting, etc.

Limited use: 1d3 times per battle.
ast.target:
以一个移动动作，牛头怪 adept 传送至其可见的附近位置。穿过土壤时看起来像掘进，穿过空气时像传送，等等。

使用限制：每场战斗 1d3 次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The adept gains a bonus to saves equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 该 adept 获得等同于升级骰的豁免加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each round the minotaur takes damage, prevent 2d6 of it.
ast.target: 每回合牛头怪第一次受到伤害时，防止其中 2d6 点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The moon dragon can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 月龙可以作为一个自由动作进行寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the full moon is within seven days, the moon dragon’s next ice breath attack this battle will deal double damage.
ast.target: 如果满月在七天内，本场战斗中月龙的下一次寒冰吐息攻击将造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: fire when the new moon is within seven days.
ast.target: 新月在七天内时，改为火焰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s flesh begins to rot and the ongoing damage increases by +40 (cumulative). Saves granted by special powers don’t increase this damage if they fail, only end of turn failures.
ast.target: 目标的肉体开始腐烂，持续伤害提高+40（可累积）。由特殊能力给予的豁免若失败不会增加此伤害，只有回合结束时的失败才会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already affected by mummy rot, increase the ongoing negative energy damage by 40. If the target isn’t affected by mummy rot already, it takes 40 ongoing negative energy damage and is affected by mummy rot (save ends both)
ast.target: 如果目标已受木乃伊腐烂影响，持续负能量伤害提高40。若目标尚未受木乃伊腐烂影响，则承受持续40点负能量伤害并受到木乃伊腐烂影响（两者均豁免结束）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the mummy takes 20 damage or less from a non-fire attack, it takes no damage instead.
ast.target: 当木乃伊受到来自非火焰攻击的20点或更少伤害时，改为不受伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mummy has a +4 bonus to all defenses until it takes damage.
ast.target: 木乃伊在受到伤害前对所有防御获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action
ast.target: 牛蛙还可以作为自由动作进行一次咬击攻击

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may also make a bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 牛蛙还可以作为自由动作进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If smaller than the mutant bullfrog, the target is partially-swallowed, and takes 10 ongoing damage (disengaging or popping free ends).
ast.target: 若体型小于变异牛蛙，目标被部分吞咽，并受到10点持续伤害（脱离或挣脱结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bullfrog may add the escalation die to its attack rolls when staggered.
ast.target: 牛蛙在受创时可以将升级骰加到其攻击检定中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The newly-risen ghoul’s scrabbling claws attack deals +2 damage against vulnerable targets.
ast.target: 新近苏醒的食尸鬼的抓挠爪击对易伤目标造成+2伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Can only be used when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 只能在升级骰为偶数时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time an ochre jelly takes 20 or more damage from a single attack, it splits into two normal-size ochre jellies, each with half the original’s current hit points plus 2d6 hp. Treat the new jellies as undamaged jellies at their new hit point totals without the splitter ability.
ast.target: 赭黄黏液怪第一次从一次攻击中受到20点或更多伤害时，会分裂成两个普通体型的赭黄黏液怪，每个拥有原本当前生命值的一半再加2d6生命值。将新的黏液怪视为未受伤且不具分裂能力，使用其新的生命值总数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre berserker gains the escalator ability (it adds the escalation die to its attacks) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 食人魔狂战士获得升级者能力（将升级骰加到其攻击中）直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a free action, when the ogre berserker fails a save, it can take 3d6 damage to succeed at the save instead.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为自由动作，当食人魔狂战士豁免失败时，它可以承受3d6伤害以改为豁免成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion gains a second standard action this turn, but not a third.
ast.target: 食人魔勇士本回合获得第二个标准动作，但不能获得第三个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the ogre champion take opportunity attacks from it when casting close spells as if they were casting ranged spells.
ast.target: 与食人魔勇士交战的生物在施放近程法术时会受到它的借机攻击，如同在施放远程法术。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre champion adds the escalation die to the damage it deals with its attacks, hit or miss.
ast.target: 食人魔勇士将升级骰加到其攻击造成的伤害上，命中或未命中皆是如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre crusader can make a war-curse attack as a free action.
ast.target: 食人魔十字军可用自由动作进行一次战争诅咒攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage can cancel one spell or magical effect created by the target.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师可以取消目标创造的一道法术或魔法效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre lightning mage flies well using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔闪电法师凭借其卓越心智的强大力量飞行自如。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not engaged, the ogre lightning mage can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 未处于交战时，食人魔闪电法师可用随意的标准动作隐形。它在攻击时会显形。食人魔法师在重伤时每次使用隐形都会受到1d10伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一个有限攻击（非随意攻击）以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则仅造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While an ogre mage is damaged, its uncanny flesh heals 20 hit points at the start of the ogre mage’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当食人魔法师受伤时，其诡异的血肉会在其回合开始时恢复20点生命值。它每场战斗可再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则这次再生不计入五次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the ogre mage is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当食人魔法师被造成火焰或酸蚀伤害的攻击命中时，它失去一次再生次数，并且在其下一回合不能再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping an ogre mage to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 将食人魔法师降到 0 hp 并不会杀死它，只要它还剩余再生次数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre mage flies using the sheer power of its superior mind.
ast.target: 食人魔法师凭借其卓越心智的纯粹力量飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre mage is not engaged, it can turn invisible as an at-will standard action. It becomes visible when it attacks. The ogre mage takes 1d10 damage each time it uses invisibility while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 如果食人魔法师未处于交战，它可以以随意的标准动作隐形。它在攻击时会显形。食人魔法师在陷入踉跄时每次使用隐形都会受到 1d10 伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 25 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use lightning pulse as a free action.
ast.target: 25 伤害，且食人魔法师骑士可以以自由动作使用 lightning pulse。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the ogre mage knight can use voice of thunder as a free action.
ast.target: 20 伤害，且食人魔法师骑士可以以自由动作使用 voice of thunder。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 10 damage, and the ogre mage knight can teleport to any nearby location it can see before using magi's lightning chain as a free action.
ast.target: 10 伤害，且食人魔法师骑士可以在以自由动作使用 magi's lightning chain 之前传送到它能看到的任意附近位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a limited attack (not an at-will attack) targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次有限攻击（非随意攻击）以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然 16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gain /gmr 1d4 ki at the start of each battle. Spend a point of ki as a free action, once per round, to change the ogre mage knight’s natural attack result by one; a natural 1 could become a 2, a natural 19 could become a natural 20, and so on.
ast.target: 每场战斗开始时获得 /gmr 1d4 气。每轮一次，以自由动作消耗 1 点气，将食人魔法师骑士的自然攻击结果改变 1 点；自然 1 可变为 2，自然 19 可变为自然 20，依此类推。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ogre minion mook counts as two 9th level mooks when you’re building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，食人魔随从小兵算作两个 9 级小兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While staggered, the ogre penitent gains a +4 attack bonus.
ast.target: 处于踉跄时，食人魔忏悔者获得 +4 攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time the ogre fails a save, it takes 1d8 psychic damage.
ast.target: 食人魔每次豁免失败时，承受1d8点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ogre penitent rolls a natural 1 or 2 with an attack roll, it can take an extra standard action during its next turn.
ast.target: 如果忏悔食人魔的攻击掷出自然1或2，它在下回合可以获得一个额外的标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，该能力仅需一次快速动作（每轮一次），而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the ogre takes weapon damage, reduce that damage by 1d8 points.
ast.target: 每当食人魔受到武器伤害时，将该伤害减少1d8点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of attacks by orcs expands by 3 unless they are staggered.
ast.target: 除非陷入踉跄状态，兽人攻击的暴击范围扩大3点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range of melee attacks by orc ragers expands by 3 until half the orc rager mob has been dropped.
ast.target: 兽人狂战者的近战攻击暴击范围扩大3点，直到该狂战者群体有一半被击倒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an orc rager drops to 0 hp, it can make a final attack as a free action. (These extra attacks can come from ragers engaged with a PC.)
ast.target: 当一名兽人狂战者降至0生命值时，它可以以自由动作进行最后一次攻击。（这些额外攻击可以来自与PC交战的狂战者。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reroll the attack against a random nearby creature. If the rerolled attack is also a natural 1-5, the orcish archer takes 3 damage from sheer agonized frustration, but it doesn’t get to make another attack.
ast.target: 对附近一名随机生物重新掷骰进行攻击。如果重掷结果仍为自然1–5，兽人弓箭手因极度懊恼自受3点伤害，但不能再进行一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is 3+, the orcish archer gains a +3 bonus to melee attacks and melee damage
ast.target: 当升阶骰为3+时，兽人弓箭手的近战攻击与近战伤害获得+3加值

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The otyugh can grab the target and make a big toothy maw attack against it as a free action.
ast.target: 秽食怪可以抓住目标，并以自由动作对其进行一次大嘴咬击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the escalation die is even, make another rip and peck attack.
ast.target: 若升阶骰为偶数，再进行一次撕裂与啄击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One special dybbuk ability triggers as a free action (see below).
ast.target: 一个特殊的dybbuk能力以自由动作触发（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the dybbuk can change its host’s form to that of another humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check. When the dybbuk is driven out of the host body, the body reverts to its original form.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，dybbuk可以将其宿主体形变为另一名类人生物，或变回其本来形态。识破此变形需要DC 25的技能检定。当dybbuk被逐出宿主体内时，身体恢复原貌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A dybbuk can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: dybbuk在天花板和墙壁上攀爬如同在地面移动般轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is engaged with the dybbuk at the start of its turn, it takes 20 damage.
ast.target: 当目标在其回合开始时与dybbuk交战，它受到20点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the dybbuk rolls a natural odd hit or miss with unearthly glare, one special dybbuk ability triggers.
ast.target: 当dybbuk使用超自然凝视掷出自然奇数命中或失手时，触发一个特殊的dybbuk能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dybbuk can hover 6 feet off the ground and make boneless flea-like leaps.
ast.target: dybbuk可以悬浮在离地6英尺处，并进行像无骨跳蚤般的跳跃。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到5点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra lightning damage.
ast.target: 目标额外受到5点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beetles fly badly, usually just enough to get back to the worm when they’ve been shaken off from their hiding spots in its segments.
ast.target: 这些甲虫飞得很糟，通常仅够在它们从蠕虫体节中的藏身处被甩落后飞回蠕虫身上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever one or more parasitic lightning beetles drop to 0 hp, roll a d6. If you roll less than or equal to the number of beetles that were destroyed by that attack, all beetles in the battle stop fighting, using all their actions during their next turn to disengage and fly away.
ast.target: 每当一只或多只寄生闪电甲虫降至0 hp时，掷1d6。若点数小于或等于该次攻击被摧毁的甲虫数量，战斗中的所有甲虫停止战斗，在下一回合用尽所有动作脱离并飞走。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was can make a *disparaging rummage* attack as a free action
ast.target: 任性的“从未存在者”可以以自由动作进行一次*轻蔑翻找*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petulant never-was takes 3d6 damage that ignores its ghostly resistance.
ast.target: 任性的“从未存在者”受到3d6点伤害，忽略其幽灵抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the phantom can become immaterial, phasing through solid objects, but not ending its turn inside a solid object. Its chill touch attack takes a -2 attack penalty while it is immaterial, but all its defenses gain a +2 bonus against non-magical weapons and unarmed attacks. It is a quick action for it to become material again.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，幽影可以变为虚体，穿过实体物体，但不能在实体物体内结束其回合。它在虚体时其冰冷之触攻击承受-2攻击罚值，但对非魔法武器和徒手攻击时其所有防御获得+2加值。它也可以以快速动作再次变为实体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Those affected by the face of death must save to end their fear instead of it ending at the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 受死亡之面影响者必须进行豁免以终止其恐惧，而不是在其下个回合结束时自动终止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 6 ongoing negative energy damage, and the target becomes vulnerable to all attacks by undead creatures until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 持续6点负能量伤害，且目标在战斗结束前对所有亡灵生物的攻击变得易伤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This phantomaton has been built with sturdier materials than other phantomatons: it has +2 AC and 20 extra hp.
ast.target: 该幻影机巧体使用比其他幻影机巧体更坚固的材料打造：AC+2，并额外获得20点HP。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phantomaton has a ranged weapon built directly into its body, and can make a *spike-thrower* attack.
ast.target: 该幻影机巧体在体内直接内置了一件远程武器，可以进行*尖刺发射器*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spider can make a rummage and filch attack against the target as a free action, even if the target isn’t staggered.
ast.target: 该蜘蛛可以对目标进行一次“翻找与顺手牵羊”攻击，作为自由动作进行，即使目标未处于摇摆状态也可。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As long as it didn’t just return from being out of phase, at the start of the phase spider’s turn, roll a d6 to see which of its phase and teleport abilities it can access that turn. The spider doesn’t have to use the available ability and can attack normally, if it wishes.
ast.target: 只要它不是刚从相位外返回，在相位蜘蛛的回合开始时，掷1d6以决定该回合可使用其相位与传送能力中的哪一种。蜘蛛不必使用可用能力，若愿意也可以正常攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Short teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby.
ast.target: 短距离传送——作为一个移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到其能看到的附近任意位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Long teleport—As a move action, the spider can teleport anywhere it can see nearby or far away.
ast.target: 长距离传送——作为一个移动动作，蜘蛛可以传送到其能看到的附近或远处任意位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can make an entangling tail attack against a different target as a free action.
ast.target: 深渊魔鬼可以作为自由动作对另一个目标进行一次缠绕尾击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pit fiend can use fiendish vigor as a free action.
ast.target: 深渊魔鬼可以作为自由动作使用恶魔活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a pit fiend, the escalation die does not increase at the start of the next round. Special circumstances and PC powers can still increase it.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对深渊魔鬼的攻击时，升级骰不会在下一轮开始时增加。特殊情况和PC能力仍可使其增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the pit fiend can heal 300 hp and roll a save against each ongoing effect on it. It can use fiendish vigor up to five times per battle.
ast.target: 作为一个标准动作，深渊魔王可以恢复300点生命值，并对其身上的每个持续效果进行一次豁免检定。它每场战斗最多可使用五次邪魔活力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Amidst wind and flames, a pit fiend can fly with surprising agility.
ast.target: 在风与烈焰之中，深渊魔王能以惊人的敏捷飞行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the pit fiend at the start of its turn, that creature takes 20 fire damage.
ast.target: 当某个生物在其回合开始时与深渊魔王交战，该生物受到20点火焰伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The crit range for pit-spawn orcs is 17+. Whenever a pit-spawn orc scores a critical hit, each pit-spawn orc mook in the battle gains a +1 cumulative bonus to damage until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 深渊后裔兽人的重击范围为17+。每当一名深渊后裔兽人造成重击时，战斗中的每个深渊后裔兽人杂兵获得+1累积伤害加值，持续到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 小精灵骑士会飞，但从不离地太远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie knight can’t be intercepted and doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks by moving.
ast.target: 小精灵骑士无法被拦截，且移动不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a new podling into the battle in a random location.
ast.target: 在随机位置将一个新的荚童加入战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the pixie pod rolls a natural even hit with peripheral summoning, it adds a number of podlings into the battle equal to the escalation die instead of only one.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当小精灵荚用外围召唤掷出自然偶数命中时，它会加入等同于升级骰数值的荚童数量，而不只是一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Although its podlings occasionally pick up and move it around out of combat, in battle the pixie pod can’t move and is stuck except for its teleport ability.
ast.target: 尽管它的荚童有时会在战斗外把它抬起来移动，但在战斗中小精灵荚无法移动，除传送能力外都被固定在原地。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle as a move action, the pixie-pod can teleport to a nearby location. But its control sucks. The teleport goes in a random direction. Roll it using a d8 for direction.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，作为一个移动动作，妖精荚可以传送到附近位置。但它的控制很差，传送会朝随机方向进行。用一个 d8 掷出方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie pod is normally accompanied by five active podlings that don’t count toward the total when building a battle with the pod. Additional podlings do count, however.
ast.target: 妖精荚通常会带着五个活跃的荚灵，这些不计入与该荚构建战斗时的总数。不过，额外的荚灵会计入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The pixie warrior can make a madness attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 妖精战士可以对目标进行一次疯狂攻击，作为一个自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: During battle, pixies fill the air with the light and sound of countless flashy illusions. The effects are disorienting enough that the PCs don’t get to add the escalation die to their attacks.
ast.target: 在战斗期间，妖精们用无数炫目幻象的光与声充满空气。这种效果足够令人迷惑，以至于PC的攻击不能加上升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pixies make flying look like a lot of fun.
ast.target: 妖精让飞行看起来充满乐趣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t choose to search for the pixie-pod plant until all podlings in the battle are slain.
ast.target: 在战斗中的所有荚灵被消灭之前，目标不能选择去寻找妖精荚植物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The podling that can fly, hovering out of reach and firing arrows.
ast.target: 能飞的荚灵，在够不着的高度盘旋并射箭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the poison dandelion drops to 0 hit points, it’s destroyed until the start of its next turn. At the start of its next turn, it returns to life as a death blossom or lich flower that lacks the red-yellow resurrection ability but is otherwise undamaged and whole.
ast.target: 当毒蒲公英的生命值降至0时，它会被摧毁，直到其下回合开始。在其下回合开始时，它会以死亡之花或巫妖花的形态复活，缺少红黄复活能力，但其他方面完好无损。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The prismatic ogre mage can use prismatic blast as a free action without provoking an opportunity attack.
ast.target: 棱彩食人魔法师可以作为自由动作使用棱彩爆发，而不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This power only requires a quick action (once per round) instead of a standard action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，此能力仅需一个快速动作（每回合一次）而非标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 50 damage, and the target is confused (save ends).
ast.target: 造成50点伤害，目标陷入混乱（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target loses a recovery, and the prismatic ogre mage heals 70 hp.
ast.target: 目标失去一次复原，虹彩食人魔法师回复70点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazed and confused (save ends both). When the target saves, it takes 40 psychic damage.
ast.target: 目标恍惚并混乱（两者均豁免结束）。当目标豁免成功时，受到40点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: “Yellow hair,” “Afraid of spiders,” “Prefers white wine to red,” or “Tattoo of a halfling on left bicep.” These personal traits are shuffled and randomly distributed equally by the GM after the battle is over. Whichever trait each player receives is now true for their character as well as for the character of the player who wrote it down (unless there has somehow turned out to be a swap…). These traits don’t alter game mechanics (feats, powers, backgrounds, icon relationships, attributes, bonuses, etc.). They are personal details that have been warped and scrambled by the prismatic ogre mage’s magic.
ast.target: “金色头发”“害怕蜘蛛”“更喜欢白葡萄酒而非红葡萄酒”或“左侧肱二头肌上有半身人纹身”。这些个人特质在战斗结束后由GM洗牌并平均随机分配。每位玩家得到的特质将同时真实地适用于其角色以及写下该特质的玩家角色（除非不知为何出现了交换……）。这些特质不会改变游戏机制（专长、能力、背景、图标关系、属性、加值等）。它们是被虹彩食人魔法师魔法扭曲与扰乱的个人细节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Purple larvae can dig quickly in and out of the skin of the purple worm as if they were burrowing but without needing die rolls to succeed.
ast.target: 紫色幼虫可以在紫虫的皮肤内外迅速钻进钻出，如同掘进一般，但无需掷骰判定成功。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The worm takes 10 damage (but it still deals miss damage on a 2-5)
ast.target: 紫虫受到10点伤害（但在掷出2-5时仍会造成未命中伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
While a creature is swallowed whole, it takes 7d10 acid damage at the start of its turn and is stuck, hampered, and unable to attack or affect anything outside the worm’s stomach (and vice-versa). Most teleport abilities don’t work because you’re hampered and you can’t see the location out of the worm you want to teleport to. There are two ways out.

  • Cut your way out: Deal 40 damage to the worm with a single attack and you can cut your way out. All edged or bladed weapons are reduced to d6 damage dice (at most) inside the worm’s gullet, so good luck. At least you’ll be damaging the worm attacking it from within.
  • Get upchucked: While the worm is staggered, you can use a standard action to try and crawl out of its mouth. Roll a hard save (16+); on a success, the worm vomits you out and spits you somewhere nearby. The worm also vomits out all creatures it has swallowed when it drops to 0 hp.
ast.target:
当生物被整只吞下时，在其回合开始时受到7d10点酸蚀伤害，并被困住、受阻，无法攻击或影响紫虫胃外的任何事物（反之亦然）。多数传送能力无法生效，因为你处于受阻状态，且 无法看见紫虫体外你想传送到的位置。离开的方法有两种。

  • 切开出路： 用一次攻击对紫虫造成40点伤害即可切开逃出。所有有刃或刀刃类武器在紫虫喉道内的伤害骰降为d6（最多如此），祝你好运。至少你会在从内部攻击时伤到紫虫。
  • 被吐出来： 当紫虫处于踉跄状态时，你可以用一个标准动作尝试从它口中爬出。进行一次困难豁免（16+）；成功则紫虫将你呕吐出来并吐到附近某处。当紫虫生命值降至0点时，也会呕吐出所有它吞下的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Purple worms generate weird energy resistances thanks to underworld radiation and their odd diets. Roll a 2d8, in secret, to determine what energy types the worm is not resistant to. The PCs probably have to find out what energy works best against the worm the hard way, though you might have mercy and allow a DC 35 Wisdom skill check to figure out what energy types work against the worm.

1: acid; 2: cold; 3: fire; 4: lightning; 5: thunder; 6: holy; 7: negative energy; 8: poison.
ast.target:
紫色巨虫因地下世界的辐射和奇怪的饮食而产生诡异的能量抗性。秘密掷一次2d8，以确定该虫不具抗性的能量类型。PC们可能不得不通过硬办法找出对抗该虫最有效的能量，不过你也可以大发慈悲，允许进行一次DC 35的智慧技能检定，以弄清哪些能量类型对该虫有效。

1: 酸蚀; 2: 寒冷; 3: 火焰; 4: 闪电; 5: 雷鸣; 6: 神圣; 7: 负能量; 8: 毒素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ranged weapon attacks with non-magical weapons or non-magical ammunition against the salamander fail—the missiles simply burn up mid-air.
ast.target: 使用非魔法武器或非魔法弹药对火蜥蜴进行的远程武器攻击会失败—弹丸会在半空中直接烧尽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a rend mind attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以以自由动作进行一次心灵撕裂攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将自身形态变为任意类人生物，或变回原形。看穿这种变形需要一次DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每天一次，作为快速动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等同于被偷走时骰子数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合按常规提升。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target is no longer confused it takes 50 psychic damage.
ast.target: 当目标不再困惑时，它受到50点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die advances the rakshasa teleports as a free action to any spot it can see nearby or faraway. If the rakshasa is engaged with a PC, that character’s player can choose to prevent the teleportation at the cost of the escalation die not advancing.
ast.target: 当升级骰提升时，罗刹可以以自由动作传送至其能看见的任何附近或远处的位置。如果罗刹正与某个PC交战，该角色的玩家可以选择阻止这次传送，代价是升级骰不前进。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 20 skill check.
ast.target: 作为标准动作，罗刹可以将自身形态变为任意类人生物，或变回原形。看穿这种变形需要一次DC 20的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa isn’t alone—it bought a team of hirelings and hangers-on into the dungeon with it, though they are currently elsewhere. When the escalation die reaches 3+ these allies rush into the fight and act at the start of the round.
ast.target: 罗刹并非孤身一人—它带着一队雇佣兵和随从进入了地城，只是他们目前在别处。当升级骰达到3+时，这些盟友会冲入战斗，并在回合开始时行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa can make a *rend mind* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 罗刹可以以自由动作进行一次*撕裂心智*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa can change its form to that of any humanoid, or back to its own shape. Seeing through the shapechange requires a DC 25 skill check.
ast.target: 以标准动作，罗刹可以变形成任何类人生物的形态，或变回自身形态。看穿这种变形需要DC 25的技能检定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per day as a quick action, the rakshasa steals the escalation die; until the end of the battle, the rakshasa gains an attack bonus equal to the die’s value when it was stolen. Reset the escalation die to 0 for the players and increase it normally with each new round.
ast.target: 每天一次，以迅捷动作，罗刹窃取升级骰；直到战斗结束，罗刹获得等同于被窃取时该骰数值的攻击加值。将玩家的升级骰重置为0，并在每个新回合正常提高。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the rakshasa mastermind rolls a d4 or a d6, your choice. If the roll is equal to or less than the escalation die, a number of the rakshasa mastermind’s allies equal to the die roll will enter the battle in the next round. Each new ally should be about as tough as a single PC according to the building battles table. Explain this ability as the culmination of the rakshasas’ cunning plans.
ast.target: 以标准动作，罗刹幕后主使投掷一个d4或d6，由你选择。若结果小于或等于升级骰，则在下一回合进入战斗的罗刹幕后主使的盟友数量等于该骰结果。根据构建战斗表，每个新盟友的强度应与单个PC相当。将此能力解释为罗刹狡猾计划的最终成果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target’s saves against ongoing damage become hard (16+) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标对持续伤害的豁免变为困难（16+），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rakshasa has a real link to the divine (or maybe it’s actually a link to the infernal realms, or a bargain with the chaos of the outer dark). Twice per battle as a free action the rakshasa can cause itself or a nearby ally to heal an amount equal to half that creature’s maximum hit points.
ast.target: 罗刹与神圣存在有真正的联系（或者实际上是与地狱领域相连，或与外暗混沌达成交易）。每场战斗两次，以自由动作，罗刹可以使自己或附近的盟友回复等同于该生物最大生命值一半的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标混乱，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The psychic seduction attack is not expended can be used again this battle.
ast.target: 灵能诱惑攻击未被消耗，可在本场战斗中再次使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The devourer of wizards adds the escalation die to its attacks and damage when it targets a creature that has one or more icon relationship points with the Magic Icon.
ast.target: 当巫师吞噬者以与魔法图标有一个或多个图标关系点的生物为目标时，它在攻击和伤害上加入升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 5 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到5点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rat swarms gain a +5 bonus to disengage checks and take only half damage from opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 鼠群在脱离检定上获得+5加值，并且只受到借机攻击一半的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While at least one creature in the battle is staggered or unconscious, the bulette gains a bonus to its attacks and damage equal to the escalation die. Creatures that have no blood (constructs, oozes, plant creatures, etc.) don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 当战斗中至少有一个生物处于重伤或昏迷状态时，地龙在攻击和伤害上获得等同于升级骰的加值。没有血液的生物（构装体、黏液怪、植物生物等）不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever the bumoorah takes damage from an attack, it rolls a save; on a 16+ it can immediately dive beneath the ground, preventing further attacks against it until it surfaces at the start of its next turn. Force attacks and opportunity attacks don’t trigger this ability.
ast.target: 每当布穆拉受到一次攻击的伤害时，它进行一次豁免；掷出16+时，它可以立即钻入地下，在其下一回合开始时浮出地面之前无法再被攻击。力场攻击和借机攻击不会触发此能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bumoorah can burrow incredibly quickly for short distances. Bumoorahs are renowned for the dust-spurts and vibrating sound they generate as they shoot through the ground like hungry spears.
ast.target: 布穆拉可以在短距离内以惊人的速度钻地。布穆拉以其穿行地下时喷出的尘土与震动声而闻名，宛如饥饿的长矛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add another ravenous cannibal mook to the mob (it must have been hiding somewhere nearby, or wasn’t really dead when it dropped earlier in the battle).
ast.target: 为该群体再加入一个贪婪的食人狂徒杂兵（它一定是藏在附近，或在战斗早先倒下时并没有真正死去）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the damage by +1 for each razor shark mook that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 每有一个在本场战斗中倒下的剃刀鲨杂兵，伤害提高+1。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target and the razor shark each take 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标与剃刀鲨各自受到1d6点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When two or more razor sharks in the same mob are dropped to 0 hp by an attack, as a free action each dropped razor shark attacks one random nearby non-razor shark creature before it dies. That creature takes 1d8 damage.
ast.target: 当同一群体中的两条或以上剃刀鲨被一次攻击打到 0 hp 时，作为一个自由动作，每条被击倒的剃刀鲨在死亡前会攻击一名附近随机的非剃刀鲨生物。该生物受到 1d8 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This really angry kobold transforms into an undamaged red haze berserker after the attack.
ast.target: 这个非常愤怒的狗头人会在攻击后变成一名未受伤的赤雾狂战士。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When building battles using this monster, it only counts as half a normal monster.
ast.target: 在用该怪物构建战斗时，它只算半个普通怪物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the target is affected by the reaver’s *fear aura* even if it has more than 36 hp.
ast.target: 直到其下回合结束前，目标都会受到掠夺者的 *fear aura* 影响，即使它拥有超过 36 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 2d6 bonus damage to the target
ast.target: 对目标造成 2d6 点额外伤害

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking ongoing damage from this attack, the redcap is riding the target’s shoulders with its knives in the target’s ears, and once during its turn the redcap can use a move action to make the target move anywhere nearby that won’t directly cause it harm (but opportunity attacks are fair game).
ast.target: 当目标因这次攻击承受持续伤害时，红帽怪正骑在目标肩膀上，把刀插在目标耳中，并且在其回合中一次，红帽怪可以使用一个移动动作使目标移动到附近任何不会直接伤害它的地方（但借机攻击不算）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the redcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the redcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 当红帽怪造成重击，或者当一名 PC 或桌上的玩家说出禁词时，红帽怪可以作为一个自由动作传送到其所能看见的附近隐藏位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The fiery vanquisher can make a *burning breath* attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 炽焰征服者可以作为一个自由动作对目标进行一次 *burning breath* 攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd, the fiery vanquisher can roll two d20s for its heavy axe attack and use the best result.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，炽焰征服者在重斧攻击时可以掷两枚 d20 并取最高结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然 14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the flamewing is forced to land, it rolls 3d20 for its next attack roll and takes the best result.
ast.target: 当火翼被迫着陆时，它为下一次攻击掷3d20，并取最佳结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flamewing can fly, and fly fast—soaring on wings of flame. However, its turning circle isn’t great and it can’t hover, so in tight quarters it needs to land. Also, its wings are made of fire, and overusing its fireball breath can cause the wings to gutter and fade.
ast.target: 火翼能飞，而且飞得很快—以火焰之翼翱翔。然而，它的转弯半径不大，而且无法悬停，所以在狭窄空间里需要着陆。另外，它的翅膀由火焰组成，过度使用火球吐息会导致翅膀摇曳并黯淡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time each battle the flamewing is hit by a fire attack, instead of taking the fire damage it heals that many hit points.
ast.target: 每场战斗中火翼第一次被火焰攻击命中时，不是承受火焰伤害，而是回复等量的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d12 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对其近战攻击未命中的目标造成2d12额外伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The queen may be sluggish after eating unsuccessful suitors, laying eggs, or moving across the ice like a rushing avalanche. Roll 2d10 to determine her current initiative.
ast.target: 女王在吃掉失败的求偶者、产卵，或像疾冲的雪崩般穿越冰面后可能会变得迟缓。掷2d10以决定她当前的先攻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The resurgent phoenix can fly as well or better than anything you’ve seen airborne.
ast.target: 复苏凤凰飞得不比你见过的任何空中生物差，甚至更好。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in fire ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。若豁免失败，凤凰生命值降为0；见下方的浴火重生能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a river devil minion, you must only attack river devil minions until the end of the battle or until all river devil minion mobs have dropped to 0 hp.
ast.target: 当你选择将升级骰加到对河魔仆从的攻击时，你必须只攻击河魔仆从，直到战斗结束或所有河魔仆从群降至0 hp为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
