ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against a river devil, you only heal half the normal hit points the next time you heal using a recovery this battle. The effect is cumulative (so the second time you heal, the third time, etc.) if you pay the devil’s due more than once before using a recovery.
ast.target: 当你选择在对河魔的攻击中加入升级骰时，在本场战斗中你下次使用一次恢复进行治疗时，只能恢复正常一半的生命值。如果你在使用一次恢复之前多次支付恶魔的代价，该效果会累积（因此第二次治疗、第三次治疗等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is confused from the naiad’s watery words attack, it immediately moves into the water next to the naiad as a free action to defend the naiad. The target takes half the damage of the next attack that hits the naiad. During its turn, it doesn’t attack, instead moving to stay next to the naiad. Each time the target fails its save, it will again defend the naiad against the next attack that hits it, taking half damage.
ast.target: 当生物因水妖的水之言攻击而陷入困惑时，它会立即以自由动作移动到水妖身旁的水中以保护水妖。目标承受下一次命中水妖的攻击伤害的一半。在它的回合中，它不会攻击，而是移动以保持在水妖旁边。每当目标豁免失败，它都会再次保护水妖对抗下一次命中水妖的攻击，并承受一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each time a target confused by watery words fails its save, it will forget something important. GM’s choice or player’s suggestion!
ast.target: 每当被水之言困惑的目标豁免失败时，它会忘记一件重要的事。由GM决定或接受玩家建议！

ast.name: description
ast.source: No choice, the target suffers both effects.
ast.target: 没有选择，目标承受两种效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The glittering bearer normally hovers a foot or two off the ground, though it can achieve impressive elevation and mobility if need be.
ast.target: 闪耀承载者通常在离地一两英尺处悬浮，但必要时也能达到惊人的高度与机动性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is now considered to be wearing no armor (the armor is damaged beyond repair; adjust defenses accordingly). If the target’s armor is magical, the target must roll a hard save (16+). On a success, the armor isn’t affected. This effect is permanent until the creature obtains new armor.
ast.target: 目标现在被视为未穿戴任何护甲（护甲损毁到无法修复；相应调整防御）。如果目标的护甲是魔法护甲，目标必须进行一次困难豁免（16+）。成功则护甲不受影响。此效果永久持续，直到该生物获得新护甲。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当生物用近战武器命中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为进行一次容易豁免（6+）。此效果是永久的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whenever a creature hits the rust monster with a melee weapon, the attacker must roll a save; on a failure, the weapon is destroyed. Magic weapons require an easy save (6+) instead. This effect is permanent.
ast.target: 每当生物用近战武器命中锈蚀怪时，攻击者必须进行豁免；失败则武器被摧毁。魔法武器改为进行一次容易豁免（6+）。此效果是永久的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sadsacks are also vulnerable to the type of weapon or attack that ended their lives. Interpret this liberally, GM.
ast.target: 伤心鬼也会对夺走它们生命的武器或攻击类型易伤。GM请从宽解释。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gravity does not influence sadsacks unless they are staggered. When they’re staggered, they sink to the ground and stay there.
ast.target: 除非被打至踉跄，否则重力不会影响这些倒霉蛋。当它们踉跄时，会沉到地面并停留在那里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The priest teleports the target next to one of its nearby allies that it can see, who engages it as a free action. It can’t teleport the target to a location that causes it direct damage (so into a pool of flaming oil is out, but off a ship into the sea is fine).
ast.target: 祭司将目标传送到其可见的附近盟友旁边，那个盟友以一个自由动作与其交战。它不能将目标传送到会造成直接伤害的位置（因此不能传送进燃烧的油池，但从船上落入海中是可以的）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each target that was hit takes a -2 penalty (non-cumulative) to all saves until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 每个被命中的目标对所有豁免检定受到-2惩罚（不叠加），直到战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sahuagin breathe underwater and swim very well.
ast.target: 萨胡阿金能在水下呼吸，游泳能力很强。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin mutant adds the escalation die to its attacks until the die is 5+.
ast.target: 萨胡阿金变异体在升级骰达到5+之前，将升级骰加入其攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sahuagin raider gains a +2 attack bonus while it’s staggered.
ast.target: 萨胡阿金劫掠者在踉跄状态下获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the escalation die by 1, and the target is hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 升级骰+1，且目标受阻（只能进行基础攻击）直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a note of the escalation die when the sahuagin becomes staggered. The sahuagin gains a bonus to its melee attacks and damage equal to the escalation die value for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 当萨胡阿金进入踉跄状态时记录升级骰。该萨胡阿金在本场战斗剩余时间内，其近战攻击和伤害获得等同于升级骰数值的加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The screaming hoardling is dazed and vulnerable until the start of its next turn as it scrambles for its ‘lost treasure’, the weapon it just dropped.
ast.target: 尖叫的宝藏精灵在其下一回合开始前处于恍惚且易伤状态，因为它在慌乱地寻找它“丢失的宝物”——刚刚掉落的武器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is odd.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a quick action (once per round), the nereid can call to a slumbering creature, and during its next turn (while still unconscious), that creature will swim under the water seeking the nereid. The creature must start making last gasp saves, which replace its save against being unconscious. After the fourth failure, it drowns.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为一个快速动作（每轮一次），海灵可以呼唤一名沉睡的生物，并在其下一回合（仍处于昏迷时），该生物会在水下游向海灵。该生物必须开始进行濒死豁免，取代其对昏迷的豁免。第四次失败后，它会溺死。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The seven-headed hydra has all the same abilities as the five-headed hydra, except that the heads that get sprouted are the 8th and 9th and those heads/attacks come with 50 new hit points apiece.
ast.target: 七头九头蛇拥有与五头九头蛇相同的所有能力，唯一区别是新长出的头是第8与第9个，而且每个头/攻击都额外获得50点新的生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When an opportunity attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次借机攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击骰上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hydra gets a natural even attack roll with a gnashing teeth attack, its next attack that turn (if it has one) is a flame breath attack instead. Note that flame breath attacks don’t lead to other flaming breaths; the hydra has to return to making a gnashing teeth attack first.
ast.target: 当九头蛇以撕咬攻击掷出自然偶数时，该回合的下一次攻击（若有）改为火焰吐息攻击。注意，火焰吐息不会引发其他火焰吐息；九头蛇必须先回到撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标陷入困惑（强豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When in poorly lit areas of shadow, the dragon adds the escalation die to its attack rolls. Complete darkness or bright daylight negates the ability.
ast.target: 当处于昏暗的阴影区域时，巨龙将升级骰加入其攻击掷骰。完全黑暗或明亮的日光会使该能力失效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the dragon can appear to be humanoid, usually disguising itself as an unthreatening old man in a cloak (DC 35 to detect). Daylight will show the illusion for what it is—an insubstantial dragon. Dragons with a Book of Many Faces will have perfect humanoid disguises. Dropping the illusion is a free action.
ast.target: 作为一个标准动作，巨龙可以显现为类人生物，通常伪装成披着斗篷的无害老者（DC 35 以识破）。日光会揭示幻象的真实——一条虚体的巨龙。拥有《多面之书》的巨龙会有完美的类人伪装。解除幻象是一个自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die is even, natural odd attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. When the escalation die is odd, natural even attack rolls against the dragon automatically miss. Attacks that deal holy damage ignore this ability.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，对巨龙的自然奇数攻击掷骰会自动失手。当升级骰为奇数时，对巨龙的自然偶数攻击掷骰会自动失手。造成神圣伤害的攻击无视该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the current battle is over, the next time this day that the target takes ongoing damage, the shadow mongoose gets to make a *destruction of fate* attack against the target.
ast.target: 当前战斗结束后，在当天目标下一次受到持续伤害时，影獴可以对目标进行一次 *命运摧毁* 攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can move over any solid surface, slithering like a shadow.
ast.target: 影獴可以在任何坚实表面上移动，像影子般滑行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the shadow mongoose may fake being dead. Only magical senses and a DC 25 skill roll from the PC who struck the ‘killing blow’ will detect that the creature is still alive. Shadow mongooses like to fake their deaths so that they can escape battle with their stolen icon relationships. Since shadow anatomy isn’t entirely biological, this ability functions like fleeing the battle if it succeeds, the PCs can go ahead and blast away at what they think is the corpse, but they’ll be fragging the mongoose’s shadows, not the mongoose itself.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，影獴可以假死。只有魔法感知以及给予“致命一击”的PC进行DC 25的技能检定，才能发现该生物仍然活着。影獴喜欢假死，以便携带其偷来的图标关系逃离战斗。由于影子的解剖结构并非完全生物性的，这个能力在成功时等同于逃离战斗；PC可以继续猛轰他们以为的尸体，但他们破坏的是影獴的影子，而不是影獴本体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the shadow mongoose doesn’t attack on its turn it can turn into a flat shadow, and cannot be intercepted or attacked it is moving in this form. When it returns to its normal form, it deals double damage with its next attack, hit or miss.
ast.target: 如果影獴在其回合未发动攻击，它可以化为扁平的影子，并在以此形态移动时无法被拦截或攻击。当它恢复为正常形态时，下一次攻击无论命中与否都造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: d12 damage to a nearby target not engaged with the shadow mongoose.
ast.target: 对一个未与影獴交战的附近目标造成d12伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose may become a thing of dark smoke and shadow, flying swiftly through the air or through the smallest cracks.
ast.target: 影獴可以化作黑烟与阴影之物，迅速飞过空中或穿过最微小的裂缝。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the shadow mongoose may fake being dead. Only magical senses and a DC 30 skill roll from the PC who struck the ‘killing blow’ will detect that the creature is still alive. Shadow mongooses like to fake their deaths so that they can escape battle with their stolen icon relationships. Since shadow anatomy isn’t entirely biological, this ability functions like fleeing the battle if it succeeds, the PCs can go ahead and blast away at what they think is the corpse, but they’ll be fragging the mongoose’s shadows, not the mongoose itself.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，影獴可以假死。只有魔法感知以及给予“致命一击”的PC进行DC 30的技能检定，才能发现该生物仍然活着。影獴喜欢假死，以便携带其偷来的图标关系逃离战斗。由于影子的解剖结构并非完全生物性的，这个能力在成功时等同于逃离战斗；PC可以继续猛轰他们以为的尸体，但他们破坏的是影獴的影子，而不是影獴本体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shadow mongoose dies all the aspects that it stole return to their owners. Stolen aspects that have been traded away also return, but slowly. The person who killed the shadow mongoose gains a random aspect chosen by the GM.
ast.target: 当影獴死亡时，它偷来的所有特质都会归还原主。被转手交易出去的被盗特质也会回归，但会很慢。击杀影獴的人将获得一个由GM选择的随机特质。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second *tenebrous claws* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 以自由动作进行第二次*幽影利爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: …and the relationship that the adventurer has with that icon flips from positive to negative or negative to positive. Conflicted relationships are unaffected.
ast.target: ……并且该冒险者与该图标的关系由正转负或由负转正。矛盾关系不受影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle the shadow mongoose may fake being dead. Only magical senses and a DC 35 skill roll from the PC who struck the ‘killing blow’ will detect that the creature is still alive. Shadow mongooses like to fake their deaths so that they can escape battle with their stolen icon relationships. Since shadow anatomy isn’t entirely biological, this ability functions like fleeing the battle if it succeeds, the PCs can go ahead and blast away at what they think is the corpse, but they’ll be fragging the mongoose’s shadows, not the mongoose itself.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，影獴可以假死。只有魔法感知以及给予“致命一击”的PC进行DC 35的技能检定，才能发现该生物仍然活着。影獴喜欢假死，以便携带其偷来的图标关系逃离战斗。由于影子的解剖结构并非完全生物性的，这个能力在成功时等同于逃离战斗；PC可以继续猛轰他们以为的尸体，但他们破坏的是影獴的影子，而不是影獴本体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The shadow mongoose can change shape, though not mid-battle. Shadow mongooses sometimes join adventuring parties as helpful hirelings, love interests, or local guides to repeatedly steal icon relationships from adventurers.
ast.target: 影獴可以改变形态，但不能在战斗中变形。影獴有时会作为有用的雇工、恋爱对象或本地向导加入冒险队伍，以反复从冒险者那里偷取图标关系。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the shadow mongoose dies all the icon relationship dice that it stole return to their owners. The person who killed the shadow mongoose gains 1d3 ‘5’ icon dice results with a random icon that they do not have a relationship with OR a 6 with the Trickster Icon if they do not have a relationship with him (roll 1d3 for relationship type: 1=Negative, 2= Conflicted, 3= Positive).
ast.target: 当影獴死亡时，它偷走的所有图标关系骰都会回到它们的拥有者手中。杀死影獴的人获得1d3个‘5’图标骰结果，图标为一个与其没有关系的随机图标；或者如果与诈术者图标没有关系，则获得一个6（掷1d3确定关系类型：1=负面，2=矛盾，3=正面）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 negative energy damage, and the shadow thief can make a shadow possession attack as a free action (but see group ability).
ast.target: 目标受到20点负能量伤害，影盗可以作为自由动作进行一次影子附身攻击（但见群体能力）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hound leaves teeth in the wound; the target takes 5 ongoing damage, and the hound takes 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 猎犬把牙齿留在伤口里；目标受到5点持续伤害，猎犬受到1d6伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of its turn, a skin devil heals 8 hp. If it doesn’t heal up to its maximum hit points, it loses its ability to heal from this ability until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，剥皮魔恢复8点生命值。如果它未能恢复到最大生命值，则在战斗结束前失去该能力带来的治疗效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skin devil is routinely able to pass through civilized areas without alerting dogs, bouncers, city guards, or passersby. If the thing attacks, that’s when you notice that it’s not a human but a monstrous pile of flesh. In addition to passing unnoticed in crowds, it uses its fluid shape to sneak through hidden places, and it doesn’t make much noise unless it wants to. PCs looking for the devil won’t find it unless they have some special information or advantage, and even then it’s a hard check (DC 25). Normally when PCs think they have the devil cornered, it escapes through a tight exit that it had previously identified.
ast.target: 剥皮魔通常能够穿过文明地区而不惊动狗、保镖、城卫或路人。如果它发动攻击，你才会注意到它不是人类，而是一团怪物般的血肉。除了在拥挤人群中不被察觉外，它还会利用其流动的形体潜入隐蔽之处，并且除非它愿意，否则几乎不发出声音。寻找该恶魔的PC除非拥有特殊情报或优势，否则找不到它，即便如此也需要一次困难检定（DC 25）。通常当PC以为已将恶魔逼入绝境时，它会通过之前识别出的狭窄出口逃走。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull crab has burrowed its tentacles into the target’s flesh; the target takes a –1 penalty to all d20 rolls (save ends). Until the target saves, whenever it moves the skull crab comes with it, and the crab will continue to bite the target.
ast.target: 颅蟹已将触手钻入目标的肉体；目标在所有d20掷骰上承受–1罚值（豁免结束）。在目标豁免成功前，每当它移动，颅蟹都会跟随，并继续咬噬目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The penalty to all d20 rolls increases by –1 (first failed save = –2 penalty, etc.)
ast.target: 所有d20掷骰的罚值再增加–1（第一次豁免失败=–2罚值，依此类推）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a creature fails three consecutive saves against the scrabbling tentacles effect, attacks against the skull crab deal half damage to it and half to that creature as the crab burrows deep. The effect lasts until the creature saves.
ast.target: 若生物对抓挠触手效果连续三次豁免失败，针对颅蟹的攻击将造成一半伤害给它、一半伤害给该生物，因为颅蟹会深深钻入。该效果持续到该生物豁免成功为止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (save ends) from looking into the void within it.
ast.target: 目标因凝视其中的虚空而陷住（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deal 25 damage to the slaughter pit shade; then add a 3rd level battle shade OR a 3rd level archer shade to the battle that will act 1d6 initiative counts after the slaughter pit shade acted. Treat this battle or archer shade as if it had used its *earthen assault* ability, so that it starts off the table and reappears where it likes nearby the slaughter pit shade.
ast.target: 对屠戮坑阴影造成25点伤害；然后在战斗中加入一个3级战斗阴影或3级弓箭阴影，其行动将在屠戮坑阴影行动后1d6个先攻计数进行。将该战斗或弓箭阴影视为已使用其*earthen assault*能力，使其从战场外开始，并在屠戮坑阴影附近任意位置重新出现。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 extra acid damage and is stuck (hard save ends, 16+).
ast.target: 目标额外受到3点酸性伤害并被定身（艰难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the slime-skull or stuck from its grasping slime tendrils attack at the start of its turn, it takes 3 acid damage.
ast.target: 当生物与黏液头骨接战，或因其抓握黏液触须攻击在其回合开始时被定身时，受到3点酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature is slow. It only moves when the escalation die is odd or 6+.
ast.target: 该生物迟缓。仅当升级骰为奇数或6+时才会移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A slime-skull can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 黏液头骨可以像在地面移动一样轻松地在天花板和墙壁上攀爬。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is the only creature engaged with the smoke devil, the attack deals 30 poison damage instead.
ast.target: 如果目标是唯一与烟雾魔接战的生物，则该攻击改为造成30点毒素伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils drift and eddy as if blown by an evil wind.
ast.target: 烟雾魔漂浮回旋，仿佛被邪风吹拂。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Smoke devils have a preternatural ability to get to their chosen victims. Keeping the smoke devil out is a hard, champion-tier challenge (DC 25).
ast.target: 烟雾魔拥有超自然能力，能抵达它们选定的受害者。阻止烟雾魔进入是一个困难的勇士阶挑战（DC 25）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered from burning eyes and gases in its lungs until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 直到其下回合结束，目标因眼睛灼烧与肺部气体而受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the end of the snowy owlbear’s next turn, the target is hampered while engaged with the owlbear.
ast.target: 直到雪地枭熊的下回合结束，目标在与枭熊接战时受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The snowy owlbear’s crit range expands by 1 for each owlbear cub that has dropped this battle.
ast.target: 每有一只枭熊幼崽在本场战斗中倒下，雪地枭熊的暴击范围扩大1点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪地枭熊只造成一半伤害，除非掷出自然 14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Checks to hear a snowy owlbear take a -5 penalty.
ast.target: 聆听雪地枭熊的检定承受 -5 惩罚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gains a +3 bonus on disengage checks, or adds the escalation die, whichever is higher.
ast.target: 脱离检定获得 +3 加值，或改为加上升级骰，取较高者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attacks that deal cold damage deal half damage to the snowy owlbear cub unless they roll a natural 14+.
ast.target: 造成寒冷伤害的攻击对雪地枭熊幼崽只造成一半伤害，除非掷出自然 14+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This monster only counts as half a normal monster when building battles.
ast.target: 在构建战斗时，该怪物只按半个普通怪物计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The phoenix may move again this turn as a quick action if it has already made a flying move on its turn.
ast.target: 如果凤凰在其回合中已经进行过一次飞行移动，则本回合可以用快速动作再次移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix teleports to a point nearby or faraway.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰传送到一个近处或远处的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The solar phoenix flies like the sun unleashed.
ast.target: 太阳凤凰如解放的太阳般飞翔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is already weakened, it’s also stunned until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果目标已处于虚弱状态，还会被震慑直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays a soul flenser, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it has had flensed away.
ast.target: 当生物击杀灵魂剥离者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。若成功，该生物恢复一个被剥离的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The soul flenser gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 噬魂者对被剥离了一个或多个能力的生物获得等同于升级骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While confused by a soul flenser’s effect, a creature that has had a power flensed away can use and re-use that limited power against their erstwhile allies, if the GM sees how to use the power in a useful way.
ast.target: 在被噬魂者的效果困惑期间，被剥离了能力的生物若GM认为该能力有合适用途，则可以对其昔日盟友使用并反复使用该受限能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the target is staggered, it is also hampered (makes only basic attacks) until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 若目标处于踉跄，还会受到阻碍（只能进行基础攻击），直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered (hard save ends, 16+) instead.
ast.target: 目标改为受到阻碍（困难豁免结束，16+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A spider mount can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground, and so can its rider.
ast.target: 蜘蛛坐骑在天花板和墙壁上攀爬如同在地面移动一样轻松，其骑手也同样如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A riderless spider mount will eventually run away. At the start of the spider’s turn roll a d4; if you roll less than the escalation die, the mount flees.
ast.target: 无人骑乘的蜘蛛坐骑最终会逃跑。在蜘蛛回合开始时掷1d4；若结果小于升级骰，坐骑就会逃离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is flung 1d6 * 10 feet in a random direction. (If that’s going to put it into a very dangerous place or over a cliff or similar bad spot, it can roll a normal save to catch itself before being thrown and take another 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 目标被抛向随机方向1d6 * 10英尺。（如果这会把它扔到极其危险的地方或悬崖外等糟糕位置，它可以进行一次普通豁免来在被抛出前抓住自己，并再承受2d6伤害。）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每场战斗1次，但在踉跄时不能使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 2 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还会承受2点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t cast a spell until the end of its next turn or until the splotchcap drops to 0 hp, whichever comes first.
ast.target: 目标在其下一回合结束前或直到splotchcap降至0 hp为止（以先到者为准）无法施法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the splotchcap scores a critical hit OR when a PC or a player at the table says the bad word, the splotchcap can teleport to a nearby hidden location it can see as a free action.
ast.target: 当涂斑帽打出重击，或当一名PC或桌上的玩家说出禁词时，涂斑帽可以作为自由动作传送到它能看见的附近隐蔽位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sporrior can make a spore cloud attack this turn as a quick action.
ast.target: 孢战士可以在本回合作为快速动作发动一次孢子云攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior gains an extra move action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，孢战士获得一个额外的移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A sporrior can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 孢战士攀爬天花板和墙壁就像在地面移动一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its normal size; but still usable if hampered!
ast.target: 仅在树精处于正常体型时可用；即使受阻也仍可使用！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is thrown somewhere faraway but non-harmful (like over a cliff) and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标被抛到远处但不致伤的位置（如悬崖外），并失去其下一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can make an opportunity attack against the spriggan.
ast.target: 目标可以对树精进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only usable when the spriggan is at its larger size.
ast.target: 仅在树精处于更大体型时可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a spriggan wants to stay hidden in an illusory form instead of joining a battle, roll initiative for the spriggan as normal. When the spriggan “acts,” by doing nothing, have the most perceptive PC roll a DC 25 Wisdom check, adding +1 for each of their allies in the fight. On a success, the spriggan’s illusion is pierced and the spriggan can use a single move action during its turn, but nothing else—it burned its standard action trying to stay hidden.
ast.target: 如果树精想以幻象形态保持隐藏而不加入战斗，照常为树精掷先攻。当树精“行动”时（即什么都不做），让最有洞察力的PC进行一次DC 25的感知检定，每有一名参战盟友就+1。若成功，树精的幻象被看穿，树精在其回合中只能使用一次移动动作，其他都不能——它为了保持隐藏而消耗了标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the escalation die reaches 2, the spriggan grows in size as a free action, acquiring its giant-sized slap attack. Note that as a free action, this transformation can take place any time, usually at the start of a round. If the spriggan was using its hidden guardian ability, it’s not hidden anymore!
ast.target: 当升级骰达到2时，树精作为自由动作体型变大，获得其巨型拍击攻击。注意，作为自由动作，这种变形可在任何时候发生，通常在一轮开始时进行。如果树精正在使用其隐藏守卫能力，它就不再隐藏了！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The sprite flies, but never too far from the ground.
ast.target: 小精灵会飞，但从不会离地太远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature is engaged with the squib swarm at the start of its turn, it takes cold damage equal to the escalation die.
ast.target: 当一个生物在其回合开始时与鞭炮群交战，它会受到等于升级骰的寒冷伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stalker locks onto its victim with its powerful jaws. If it’s still engaged with the target at the start of its next turn, it can make a *tearing claws* attack.
ast.target: 潜行者用强有力的颚锁定受害者。如果在其下一回合开始时仍与目标交战，它可以进行一次*撕裂利爪*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Despite its size, as an ambush hunter, the stalker is very good at shadowing its prey. Checks to notice it and avoid surprise are ridiculously hard.
ast.target: 尽管体型庞大，作为伏击猎手，潜行者非常擅长跟踪猎物。察觉它并避免被突袭的检定难得离谱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first time the dungeon heart is staggered, it makes a *mind-erasing blast* attack.
ast.target: 地城之心第一次被重创时，会进行一次*抹除心智冲击*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dungeon heart can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 地城之心无法进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is odd, the star-mask brain zealot can’t be intercepted, doesn’t suffer opportunity attacks, and takes only half damage from attacks that target AC or PD.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，星面具脑狂信徒无法被拦截，不会遭受借机攻击，并且只承受来自以AC或PD为目标的攻击的一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused (save ends) instead of dazed.
ast.target: 目标变为困惑（豁免结束）而非目眩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 psychic damage, but no dazed or confused effect.
ast.target: 20点心灵伤害，但不产生目眩或困惑效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask brute can make a throw attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 星面具蛮兵可以对目标进行一次投掷攻击，作为自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One dead (or unconscious or otherwise out of the fight) star-mask cultist, dead star-mask cult leader, or dead star-mask brute becomes a living scuttling star-mask mook.
ast.target: 一个死亡（或昏迷或以其他方式退出战斗的）星面具邪教徒、死亡的星面具邪教领袖或死亡的星面具蛮兵会变成一个活着乱窜的星面具杂兵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The star-mask puppet can use oily tentacles to climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 星面具傀儡可以用油腻的触手攀爬天花板和墙壁，像在地面上移动一样轻松。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/round, as a quick action when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时，每轮1次，作为快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The floating brain’s crit range expands to 11+ for the attack.
ast.target: 该攻击中，浮空大脑的暴击范围扩大至11+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a star-mask floating brain scores a critical hit with psychic pulse, instead of dealing extra damage, the target becomes confused (save ends) instead of hampered.
ast.target: 当星面具浮空大脑用心灵脉冲造成暴击时，它不造成额外伤害，而是使目标陷入混乱（豁免结束），而非受阻。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The brain uses telepathic energy to float in the air at about head height.
ast.target: 大脑使用心灵能量悬浮在空中，约在头部高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Star-mask floating brains can’t make opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 星面具浮空大脑无法进行借机攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of the target’s next turn, it must use its move action to engage the omnipotent brain. It won’t take opportunity attacks to do so, instead trying to disengage.
ast.target: 在目标下一回合开始时，它必须用移动动作与全能大脑接战。为此它不会引发借机攻击，而是会尝试脱离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the target saves against the ongoing damage, it must choose one: it makes a basic attack against itself or an ally with its next standard action, OR it becomes weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 当目标对持续伤害豁免成功时，必须二选一：在其下一次标准动作中对自己或一名盟友进行一次基础攻击，或直到其下一回合结束前陷入虚弱。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 每轮2次，作为独立的快速动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures engaged with the star-mask omnipotent brain that have 120 hp or fewer can’t target the omnipotent brain with attacks.
ast.target: 与星面全能大脑交战且生命值为120或更低的生物无法以攻击为目标指向全能大脑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The omnipotent brain can use a standard action to allow a nearby ally to make an attack as a free action with a +4 attack bonus. If the ally misses it takes 1d8 damage and the brain heals 50 hp.
ast.target: 全能大脑可以使用标准动作让附近的盟友以自由动作进行一次攻击，并获得+4攻击加值。若该盟友未命中，则其受到1d8伤害，而大脑回复50生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stirges fly well. Also, the pitch of their wings is high and thin, allowing a stirge to get very close without tipping off its prey.
ast.target: 荆棘蚊飞得很好。此外，它们翅膀的振动声高而细，使得荆棘蚊能在不惊动猎物的情况下非常接近。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After hitting a living creature that has blood with its draining probe attack, the stirge heals 5 hit points and will use its next turn to move, fleeing to the hive to feed the stirgelings…and to alert the hive that there is an easy meal nearby. A new full-strength stirge enters the battle during the next round on the same initiative count.
ast.target: 荆棘蚊以汲取探针攻击命中有血液的生物后，会回复5生命值，并在其下一回合移动，逃回巢穴喂养幼蚊……并提醒巢穴附近有易得的食物。下一轮同一先攻计数时，一只满状态的新荆棘蚊加入战斗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose one effect, and then the stirgeling mob takes 4 damage (killing this creature first).
ast.target: 选择一种效果，然后幼蚊群受到4点伤害（优先杀死该生物）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage, and 3 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，并受到3点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 3 damage and is stuck until end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标受到3点伤害，并被缠住直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: They aren’t strong fliers but they are quick and agile.
ast.target: 它们不是强力飞行者，但速度快且敏捷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant can also make a stomp attack against a single target as a free action.
ast.target: 石巨人还可以以自由动作对单一目标进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stone giant has resist weapons 16+.

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is hampered (save ends).
ast.target: 造成20点伤害，目标受到阻碍（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 20 damage, and the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 造成20点伤害，目标陷入眩晕（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keep count of the number of times the storm giant uses its lightning bolt attack during the battle. Add that number to the escalation die to get the current building thunder value.
ast.target: 记录战斗中风暴巨人使用闪电箭攻击的次数。将该次数加到升级骰上，得到当前的蓄雷值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A storm giant can use its standard action to walk or run through the air, using move actions to continue. If the storm giant makes a standard action attack, it settles back to the ground below it without falling.
ast.target: 风暴巨人可以用标准动作在空中行走或奔跑，并用移动动作继续。如果风暴巨人进行标准动作攻击，它会降回其下方的地面而不会坠落。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The storm giant has resist thunder 16+ and resist lightning 16+.
ast.target: 风暴巨人具有雷鸣抗性16+和闪电抗性16+。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle when the sunder wraith moves through a solid object like a wall, throne, door, or chest, the object must roll a normal save. If the save fails, the object is broken. Strongly magical objects get bonuses on the save, but err on the side of uh-oh.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，当破裂怨灵穿过墙、王座、门或箱子等实心物体时，该物体必须进行一次普通豁免。若豁免失败，物体被破坏。强力魔法物体在豁免上获得加值，但还是要谨慎，可能会出事。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm prince gains a +1 bonus to all defenses for each nearby Woven.
ast.target: 每有一个附近的Woven，群蜂王子对所有防御获得+1加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is hampered until the end of its next turn. It can end the effect by attacking the swarm, or if the swarm drops to 0 hp.
ast.target: 目标受到阻碍直到其下个回合结束。它可以通过攻击蜂群来结束该效果，或者蜂群降至0生命值时结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The serrated maw also deals miss damage the second time it misses with a serrated maw attack each battle.
ast.target: 锯齿巨口在每场战斗中第二次用锯齿巨口攻击未命中时也会造成失手伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar avalanche deals damage to itself equal to 1d6 per point on the escalation die 1d6*@ed; damage is not reduced by the all-rock ability.
ast.target: 塔拉纳雪崩对自身造成等同于升级骰每点1d6的伤害1d6*@ed；该伤害不受全岩能力减少。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All taranar are resistant to physical damage as a result of their stony nature. If an assailant fails to make a natural roll of 16+ when using a weapon against a taranar, the attacker deals only half damage. The resistance also applies to negative energy damage, which tends to fizzle ineffectively against the ancient stones.
ast.target: 所有塔拉纳因其石质本性而对物理伤害具有抗性。若攻击者用武器对抗塔拉纳时未能掷出自然16+，则该攻击者只造成一半伤害。该抗性也适用于负能量伤害，它往往会在这些古老岩石上无效地消散。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9 lightning damage released by the taranar’s all-pervading crystalline components on contact.
ast.target: 目标因接触塔拉纳无处不在的晶体成分而受到9点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the taranar bugler can cause the stones it summons to coalesce into animated conglomerates, whose number is determined by the escalation die +1. The conglomerates take their turns immediately after the bugler when they first appear and each round thereafter.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，塔拉纳号手可使其召唤的石头凝聚成活化凝聚体，其数量由升级骰+1决定。凝聚体初次出现时在号手之后立即行动，此后每轮亦然。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 lightning damage from the electrical discharge caused by the impact of crystal-laced stone feet on their person.
ast.target: 目标因镶晶石足踏击其身体产生的电流放电而受到5点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The coryphée can use this ability only when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: coryphée仅在升级骰为偶数时才能使用该能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes the target into the ground, the target is either stuck, hard save ends (if the ground was soft), or takes 20 damage (if the ground was hard).
ast.target: 塔拉纳将目标砸入地面，目标要么被困住，困难豁免结束（若地面松软），要么受到20点伤害（若地面坚硬）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar ends up just pounding the ground, and can make a follow-up seism attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔最终只是猛击地面，并可作为快速动作进行一次后续的地震攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 7 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到塔拉纳尔内嵌水晶在冲击时释放的电能造成的7点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also dazed the target (save ends).
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔将双拳猛然相击，生成一道可怕的闪电，同时令目标目眩（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 lightning damage from the electrical energy released on impact by the taranar’s integral crystals.
ast.target: 目标受到塔拉纳尔内嵌水晶在冲击时释放的电能造成的10点闪电伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The taranar smashes its fists together to generate a fearsome bolt of lightning that also weakened the target until the end of their next turn.
ast.target: 塔拉纳尔将双拳猛然相击，生成一道可怕的闪电，同时使目标虚弱直到其下回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque swallows the target immediately (see swallow whole).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克立即吞下目标（见“整吞”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 9d6 extra damage and pops free from the tarrasque as it’s hurled far away.
ast.target: 目标受到额外9d6伤害，并在被远远抛飞时从塔拉斯克体内挣脱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque can swim and breathe underwater (or it holds so much air in its vast lungs that it makes no difference).
ast.target: 塔拉斯克可以游泳并在水下呼吸（或者它巨大的肺里储存了大量空气，使之毫无影响）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque is immune to normal conditions and effects (stunned, weakened, etc.), but it isn’t completely impervious. Bypassing its resistances requires icon-supported effort. A PC can use one 5 or 6 they acquired from icon relationship dice rolls to overcome the resistance each time they use an attack or power that would apply a condition or effect upon the tarrasque. Of course, they must also provide a story to go along with the reason the tarrasque is affected.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克免疫常规状态与效果（眩晕、虚弱等），但并非完全不可侵。绕过其抗性需要图标支持的努力。每次PC使用会对塔拉斯克施加状态或效果的攻击或能力时，都可以消耗一次他们从图标关系骰掷得的5或6来克服该抗性。当然，他们还必须提供一个故事来说明塔拉斯克为何会受到影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once a creature is swallowed, it goes inside one of the tarrasque’s gigantic stomachs. It can still act while inside the tarrasque, but it will have to deal with the beast’s stomach acid that is splashing around. A swallowed creature must deal 400 damage to the tarrasque to force it to disgorge the contents of its gullet, freeing the creature. During the tarrasque’s turn, it can make a gullet digestion attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 一旦生物被吞下，它就会进入塔拉斯克的一处巨大胃袋。它在塔拉斯克体内仍可行动，但必须应对四处飞溅的胃酸。被吞生物必须对塔拉斯克造成400点伤害，迫使其吐出喉中之物，从而解放该生物。在塔拉斯克的回合中，它可以作为自由动作对目标进行一次 gullet digestion 攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tarrasque doesn’t have scales on the inside. It takes a –5 penalty to all defenses against attacks from inside its gullet, though only melee and close attacks can be made in there. The tarrasque’s insides are immune to acid damage, however.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克体内没有鳞片。来自其咽喉内部的攻击使其所有防御受到–5减值，不过在里面只能进行近战和近距攻击。塔拉斯克的体内免疫酸性伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a tarrasque is damaged, its malign magical flesh heals 230 hit points at the start of the tarrasque’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals up to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit. With this power, the monstrosity is likely unstoppable without a powerful magical artifact designed specifically to bind, wound, or otherwise hamper the tarrasque.
ast.target: 当塔拉斯克受伤时，它那邪恶的魔法血肉会在其回合开始时恢复230点生命值。每场战斗它可以再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，那么该次 再生 不计入五次使用限制。凭借此力量，若无专门用于束缚、伤害或以其他方式阻碍塔拉斯克的强大魔法神器，这头怪物很可能无法阻止。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is weakened until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标虚弱直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This spell only requires a quick action to use.
ast.target: 此法术只需快速动作即可使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target is taking the ongoing damage it is also hampered (basic attacks only).
ast.target: 当目标承受持续伤害时，它也会受阻（仅能进行基础攻击）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target also takes 50 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 目标还会受到50点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When you choose to add the escalation die to an attack against the Final Devil, one of the Final Devil’s nearby allies can make an attack as an interrupt action before your attack.
ast.target: 当你选择将升阶骰加入对终末恶魔的攻击时，终末恶魔的一名附近盟友可以在你攻击之前以打断动作进行一次攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a creature slays one of the flensed, it can roll a hard save (16+). If it succeeds, the creature regains one power it had flensed away.
ast.target: 当一个生物杀死一名剥皮者时，它可以进行一次困难豁免（16+）。若成功，该生物恢复一个曾被剥离的能力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Flensed gains an attack bonus equal to the escalation die against creatures that have had one or more powers flensed away.
ast.target: 剥皮者对那些被剥离过一个或多个能力的生物获得等同于升阶骰的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Make a second bladed fan attack, and if that is a natural even roll make a third bladed fan attack.
ast.target: 进行第二次刃扇攻击，若掷出自然偶数，则进行第三次刃扇攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is blown back from the Purple Dragon.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon pops free and moves away from the target (blown by the wind of the fan).
ast.target: 紫龙脱离并远离目标（被扇风吹开）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can also choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每场战斗可使用其致幻吐息 2d4 次，但不能连续两回合使用。它也可选择在致幻吐息命中或未命中时使目标陷入混乱（豁免终止），但这会耗尽其吐息，直至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: That bladed fan attack? Yeah, that was the Purple Dragon’s wings hidden by an illusion. The Purple Dragon can use the bladed fan attack in this form, but now it is clear that they are using their wings so it is only +9 to attack.
ast.target: 那次刃扇攻击？没错，那是紫龙被幻象隐藏的双翼。紫龙在此形态下仍可使用刃扇攻击，但此时很明显它在使用双翼，因此攻击只有 +9。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the Purple Dragon drops to 0 hp or fewer (or would otherwise die) they are not slain, but instead escape leaving an illusion in their place. When they escape it is a campaign win for the party, as though they had been killed, and their plans crumble. The Purple Dragon cannot return until the next tier (if defeated at adventurer tier they cannot return until champion tier, if defeated at champion tier they return at epic tier).
ast.target: 当紫龙降至 0 hp 或更低（或本应死亡）时，它不会被杀死，而是逃脱并在原地留下幻象。它一旦逃脱，队伍即视为战役胜利，仿佛它已被击杀，其计划也随之瓦解。紫龙在下一个阶级之前无法回归（若在冒险者阶级被击败，则要到勇士阶级才能回归；若在勇士阶级被击败，则在史诗阶级回归）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is dazzled by light and takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attacks (up to a maximum of -4) until the end of the battle.
ast.target: 目标被强光致盲，攻击累计承受 -1 罚值（最高 -4），持续至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also dazed and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入迟缓与定身（一次豁免同时解除这两种效果及持续伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is dazed (save ends).
ast.target: 目标对持续伤害豁免成功后，若该次豁免为自然奇数，则目标陷入迟缓（豁免终止）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon can use their psychoactive breath 2d4 times each combat but never two turns in a row. They can choose to make their targets confused (save ends) on a hit or miss with their psychoactive breath, but that uses up their breath for the rest of the battle.
ast.target: 紫龙每场战斗可使用其致幻吐息 2d4 次，但不能连续两回合使用。它可选择在致幻吐息命中或未命中时使目标陷入混乱（豁免终止），但这会耗尽其吐息，直至战斗结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like adventurer tier, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +13 to attack.
ast.target: 就像冒险者阶位一样，刃扇攻击在巨龙形态下会转化为翼击，但攻击仅有+13。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against weakened or confused they take 100 psychic damage for each failed save against the effect before they successfully passed the save.
ast.target: 目标一旦成功豁免虚弱或困惑，在成功豁免之前每次对该效果的失败豁免都会受到100点心灵伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened and stuck (save once for both effects and the ongoing damage).
ast.target: 目标同时陷入虚弱和定身（一次豁免同时对两种效果和持续伤害生效）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once the target saves against the ongoing damage if the save was a natural odd roll the target is weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 目标成功豁免持续伤害后，若豁免为天然奇数，则目标陷入虚弱（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just like the previous tiers, the bladed fan attack translates in dragon form to wing buffet but with only +17 to attack.
ast.target: 与之前的阶位一样，刃扇攻击在巨龙形态下会转化为翼击，但攻击仅有+17。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a quick action the Purple Dragon becomes invisible until they next attack. Characters attacking the Purple Dragon ‘blind’ have a 50% miss chance before rolling their attack.
ast.target: 作为快速动作，紫龙变为隐形，直到其下一次攻击。攻击“失明”状态下紫龙的角色在投掷攻击前有50%的失手几率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Purple Dragon gets one last cunning escape at epic tier, and though their plans are ruined by their defeat they’ll return one last time to exact their vengeance upon the party.
ast.target: 紫龙在史诗阶位还能进行最后一次狡诈的逃脱，尽管他们的计划因败北而破产，但他们会最后一次归来向队伍复仇。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rascal’s opportunity attacks deal 3 additional damage.
ast.target: 恶棍的借机攻击造成额外3点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the rascal rolls a natural even hit with its small tool attack, one nearby ally can roll a save against an effect that can be ended by a save.
ast.target: 当恶棍用小工具攻击掷出天然偶数命中时，附近一名盟友可以对一个可通过豁免结束的效果进行一次豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 20 ongoing thunder damage.
ast.target: 目标受到20点持续雷鸣伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a thunder attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次雷鸣攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the thunder bat is staggered, it must roll an immediate save. On a failure, it loses its ability to fly until the end of its next turn. If flying near the ground, it lands immediately. If flying far away from the ground, it lands badly and takes 25 damage.
ast.target: 当雷鸣蝙蝠进入踉跄状态时，它必须进行一次立即豁免。若失败，它失去飞行能力直到其下回合结束。若在接近地面飞行，它会立刻降落。若在远离地面的高度飞行，它会摔落并受到25点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 16+ to all damage except fire damage and melee attacks against AC, which damage it normally.
ast.target: 该生物对所有伤害具有16+伤害抗性，但火焰伤害以及针对AC的近战攻击对其造成正常伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant takes 35 or more fire damage from a single attack, it releases all grabbed creatures.
ast.target: 当树人从一次攻击中受到35点或更多火焰伤害时，它会释放所有被其抓住的生物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This creature has resist damage 18+ to all damage except fire damage and melee weapon damage, which damages it normally.
ast.target: 该生物对所有伤害具有18+伤害抗性，但火焰伤害和近战武器伤害对其造成正常伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the treant titan hits with a titanic rend attack, the target is pulled into a hollow chamber within the treant. While grabbed by the treant this way, the target can’t be the target of its allies’ powers or spells.
ast.target: 当树人泰坦以泰坦撕裂攻击命中时，目标被拉入树人体内的空腔。以这种方式被树人抓住时，目标不能成为其盟友的能力或法术的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Countless smaller branches whip through the air around the treant titan. When a creature engaged with the treant misses it with an attack, that creature takes 12 damage from the whipping branches.
ast.target: 无数更小的枝条在树人泰坦周围的空气中抽打。与树人交战的生物以攻击未命中它时，该生物会受到这些抽打枝条造成的12点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target becomes stunned until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标进入昏迷状态，直到其下回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 该牛头人造成10点未命中伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Not only does the furious charge cause damage, but on a natural even hit, the target is knocked to one side and dazed until the end of its next turn. On a natural odd hit, the target is thrown backward and dazed (save ends). The trihorn ends the round unengaged and ready to make a new furious charge attack.
ast.target: 狂暴冲锋不仅造成伤害，而且若自然偶数命中，目标被撞向一侧并恍惚至其下一回合结束。若自然奇数命中，目标被向后抛飞并恍惚（豁免结束）。三角兽以未缠斗状态结束本回合，准备再次发动狂暴冲锋攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Trogs spray scents that stink so badly that other humanoids take penalties to all attacks, defenses, and saves when engaged with a troglodyte or when nearby three or more troglodytes. Non-humanoids aren’t affected.

Humanoids affected by trog stench can make a normal save (with a penalty) at the end of each of their turns. If the save succeeds, the humanoid can ignore all trog stench for the rest of the battle. Trog stench penalties vary for different humanoid races:

Race Save Penalty
Elves, gnolls, gnomes -4
Humans, halflings, half-elves, Aasimar, tieflings, etc. -3
Half-orcs, draconics -2
Dwarves -1
Steelforged -0
ast.target:
穴居蜥蜴人会喷出恶臭气味，臭到在与穴居蜥蜴人缠斗或附近有三个及以上穴居蜥蜴人时，其他类人生物的所有攻击、防御和豁免都会受到减值。非类人生物不受影响。

受穴居蜥蜴人恶臭影响的类人生物可在其每个回合结束时进行一次正常豁免（带减值）。若豁免成功，该类人生物在本场战斗余下时间内可无视所有穴居蜥蜴人恶臭。不同类人种族的恶臭减值如下：

种族 豁免减值
精灵、豺狼人、侏儒 -4
人类、半身人、半精灵、天裔、提夫林等 -3
半兽人、龙裔 -2
矮人 -1
钢铸 -0

ast.name: description
ast.source: All nearby humanoids who saved against trog stench earlier in the battle are affected again by it.
ast.target: 所有在本场战斗中先前成功抵抗穴居蜥蜴人恶臭的附近类人生物再次受到其影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target pops free from the trog fouler and loses its next move action.
ast.target: 目标从穴居蜥蜴人恶臭者处挣脱，并失去其下一次移动动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog fouler drops to 0 hp, while a creature is nearby the fouler, it is subject to trog stench and doesn’t roll saves against the stench at the end of its turn.
ast.target: 在穴居蜥蜴人恶臭者降至0生命值之前，任何生物只要在恶臭者附近，就会受到穴居蜥蜴人恶臭影响，并且在其回合结束时不进行对抗该恶臭的豁免。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Trogs spray scents that stink so badly that other humanoids take penalties to all attacks, defenses, and saves when engaged with a troglodyte or when nearby three or more troglodytes. Non-humanoids aren’t affected.

Humanoids affected by trog stench can make a normal save (with a penalty) at the end of each of their turns. If the save succeeds, the humanoid can ignore all trog stench for the rest of the battle. Trog stench penalties vary for different humanoid races:

Race Save Penalty
Elves, gnolls, gnomes -4
Humans, halflings, half-elves, Aasimar, tieflings, etc. -3
Half-orcs, draconics -2
Dwarves -1
Steelforged -0
ast.target:
穴居蜥蜴人会喷出恶臭气味，臭到在与穴居蜥蜴人缠斗或附近有三个及以上穴居蜥蜴人时，其他类人生物的所有攻击、防御和豁免都会受到减值。非类人生物不受影响。

受穴居蜥蜴人恶臭影响的类人生物可在其每个回合结束时进行一次正常豁免（带减值）。若豁免成功，该类人生物在本场战斗余下时间内可无视所有穴居蜥蜴人恶臭。不同类人种族的恶臭减值如下：

种族 豁免减值
精灵、豺狼人、侏儒 -4
人类、半身人、半精灵、天裔、提夫林等 -3
半兽人、龙裔 -2
矮人 -1
钢铸 -0

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping the trog fouler to 0 hit points isn’t enough. The PCs need to use a magical effect of some sort—or possibly an icon relationship advantage—to end the stench after the fouler has fallen, or move the fight so that it’s no longer nearby the fouler’s corpse.
ast.target: 将穴居蜥蜴人恶臭者降到0生命值还不够。PC需要使用某种魔法效果—或可能借助图标关系优势—在恶臭者倒下后终止这股恶臭，或者将战斗移开，使其不再靠近恶臭者的尸体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is again affected by trog stench if it had saved against the effect.
ast.target: 若目标之前成功抵抗了该效果，则再次受到穴居蜥蜴人恶臭影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Until the trog shaman drops to 0 hp, the melee attacks of each trog nearby the shaman deals 6 extra damage to elves and dwarves, and 3 extra damage to half-elves.
ast.target: 在穴居蜥蜴人萨满降至0生命值之前，每个在萨满附近的穴居蜥蜴人的近战攻击对精灵和矮人额外造成6点伤害，对半精灵额外造成3点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: *Grimy spear* now re-applies trog stench on any natural odd roll (other than a natural 1, of course)
ast.target: *肮脏长矛* 现在在任何自然奇数掷骰时（当然不包括自然1）会重新施加穴居臭味

ast.name: description
ast.source: While a troll is damaged, its rubbery flesh heals 10 hit points at the start of the troll’s turn. It can regenerate five times per battle. If it heals to its maximum hit points, then that use of regeneration doesn’t count against the five-use limit.
ast.target: 当食人魔受伤时，它那富有弹性的肉体会在其回合开始时恢复10点生命值。每场战斗可再生五次。如果它恢复到最大生命值，则该次再生不计入五次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the troll is hit by an attack that deals fire or acid damage, it loses one use of its regeneration, and it can’t regenerate during its next turn.
ast.target: 当食人魔被造成火焰或酸性伤害的攻击命中时，它会失去一次再生使用次数，并且在其下个回合不能再生。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dropping a troll to 0 hp doesn’t kill it if it has any uses of regeneration left.
ast.target: 如果食人魔还剩任何再生使用次数，将其打到0生命值也不会杀死它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Increase the troll’s regeneration dice; the baseline amount a troll regenerates should run about 1/9 of its total hp, but you can go higher to be nasty.
ast.target: 提高食人魔的再生骰；食人魔再生的基线数量应约为其总生命值的1/9，但你可以更高以变得更凶残。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fire and acid don’t hurt the troll’s regeneration; lightning does instead.
ast.target: 火焰和酸不会削弱食人魔的再生；取而代之的是闪电会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If both claw attacks hit the same target, the target also takes 10 ongoing damage.
ast.target: 如果两次爪击都命中同一目标，该目标还会受到10点持续伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twisted soul can make a *weird muttering* attack as a free action.
ast.target: 扭曲之魂可以作为一个自由动作进行一次*怪异喃喃*攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t use the escalation die until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标在其下个回合结束之前不能使用升级骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard can use earsplitting roar during its first turn of a battle and when the escalation die is odd.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴可以在战斗的第一回合以及升级骰为奇数时使用震耳咆哮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The tyrant lizard’s *earsplitting roar* attack instead weakened the target until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 暴君蜥蜴的*震耳欲聋咆哮*攻击改为使目标虚弱，直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is stuck (easy save ends, 6+).
ast.target: 目标被困（容易豁免结束，6+）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each cultist counts as two monsters for the purpose of disengage checks (disengaging from one requires a disengage check of 12+, from two is 14+, three is 16+, etc.).
ast.target: 在脱离检定中，每名邪教徒按两个怪物计算（从一名脱离需要12+的脱离检定，从两名是14+，三名是16+，以此类推）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This mook has twice as many hit points as other mooks.
ast.target: 该杂兵的生命值是其他杂兵的两倍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When this mook dies, it rises immediately on full hit points but is now UNDEAD not HUMANOID.
ast.target: 该杂兵死亡时，会立即以满生命值复活，但现在为不死族而非类人。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire regenerates 1 hp per level at the start of each round indefinitely, but it turns to mist if it drops to 0 hp (see below).
ast.target: 该吸血鬼在每个回合开始时永久按等级回复1点生命值，但若降至0点生命值则化为迷雾（见下文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unless it is slain in a manner appropriate for truly killing vampires in the campaign, a vampire that drops to 0 hp drifts away to return and fight some other day.
ast.target: 除非以战役中真正杀死吸血鬼的方式将其消灭，否则降至0点生命值的吸血鬼会飘然离去，日后再战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The vampire spawn can make a fangs attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 吸血鬼眷属可对目标进行一次獠牙攻击，作为一个自由动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The venomous snake gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls with this ability against creatures with a lower initiative.
ast.target: 毒蛇使用该能力对先攻较低的生物进行攻击时，攻击检定获得+2加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action during its turn, the venomous snake can take 4 damage to end any ongoing effect on it.
ast.target: 在其回合中作为一个自由动作，毒蛇可以承受4点伤害来结束自身的任意持续效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragon regains the use of its ensorceling breath if it’s expended and can use it during its next turn.
ast.target: 如果该龙已耗尽惑心吐息，则恢复其使用次数，并可在下一回合使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void beast spawns a new void beast at full hit points. It follows the same rules for beasts formed by ensorceling breath.
ast.target: 虚空兽生成一只新的满生命值虚空兽。其遵循由惑心吐息形成的野兽的相同规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each beast appears next to the dragon, acts as it wishes, and enters the initiative order after the next two creatures have taken their turns. See void beast.
ast.target: 每只野兽出现在龙的身旁，自行行动，并在接下来两名生物完成其回合后加入先攻顺序。见虚空兽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the void dragon’s turns, roll a d6 to see if it gets an extra standard action. If the roll is equal to or less than the escalation die, the void dragon can take an extra standard action that turn. After the first success, the grace die bumps up to a d8. After the second success, it’s a d10, then a d12 after the third success, and finally a d20 after the fourth one.
ast.target: 在虚空龙每个回合开始时，掷一枚d6以判定是否获得一个额外标准动作。若掷值小于或等于激化骰，虚空龙在该回合可进行一个额外标准动作。首次成功后，恩赐骰提升为d8；第二次成功后为d10；第三次成功后为d12；第四次成功后为d20。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target is dazed (save ends). Target takes 10 negative energy damage each time it fails the save.
ast.target: 目标陷入恍惚（豁免结束）。每次豁免失败时，目标受到10点负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The void phoenix can fly amazingly well for a creature that is turning itself spiritually inside out.
ast.target: 对于一只在灵性上自我翻转的生物而言，虚空凤凰的飞行能力惊人地出色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack or negative energy attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击或负能量攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定上掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the phoenix is dealt a critical hit, it must roll an easy save (6+). If the save fails, the phoenix drops to 0 hit points; see the reborn in void ability below!
ast.target: 当凤凰受到重击时，它必须进行一次简单豁免（6+）。若豁免失败，凤凰降至0生命值；见下方“虚空重生”能力！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 5 extra damage from a wing buffet.
ast.target: 目标从翼击中额外受到5点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra damage from a claw strike.
ast.target: 目标从爪击中额外受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 ongoing fire damage instead of 5.
ast.target: 目标持续火焰伤害改为10点而非5点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a fire attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当火焰攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the target has 36 hp or fewer, it’s dazed from fear and doesn’t add the escalation die to its attacks (save ends all).
ast.target: 当目标生命值为36点或更低时，它因恐惧而恍惚，攻击不加入升级骰（豁免结束所有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 目标困惑至其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: At the start of each of the warped beast’s turns, roll a d6. The warped beast gains the corresponding ability until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在每个扭曲兽回合开始时，掷1d6。扭曲兽获得对应能力直到其下个回合开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beast has resist damage 11+ to all damage.
ast.target: 该兽对所有伤害具有11+抗性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the warped beast makes a tentacle maw attack during its turn, roll a d4. That many additional limbs or tentacles spontaneously erupt from the creature and make an additional basic attack that turn (special abilities/effects don’t trigger on those extra attacks). Each of those attacks only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当扭曲兽在其回合内进行触手巨口攻击时，掷1d4。该数量的额外肢体或触手会自发从生物身上喷涌而出，并在该回合进行一次额外基础攻击（这些额外攻击不会触发特殊能力/效果）。这些攻击每次只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the warped beast hits a creature with a tentacle maw attack, the target also takes 5 ongoing psychic damage and a -2 penalty to saves (save ends both).
ast.target: 当扭曲野兽用触手巨口攻击命中一个生物时，目标还会承受5点持续的心灵伤害，并且豁免检定受到-2惩罚（豁免成功则两者结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Roll two madness features instead of one each round (reroll similar results).
ast.target: 每轮掷两项疯狂特性而非一项（相同结果重掷）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The skull can’t hop, jump, roll, or fly. It can’t even move its jaw.
ast.target: 头骨不能跳跃、弹跳、翻滚或飞行，甚至无法移动它的下颚。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creatures that have been mystically “keyed” to the skull aren’t affected by its screech attack.
ast.target: 那些被神秘地“钥定”到头骨上的生物不会受到其尖啸攻击的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beast form only, but OK while hampered.
ast.target: 仅限野兽形态，但在受阻时也可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Humanoid form only, but OK while hampered.
ast.target: 仅限类人形态，但在受阻时也可用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Beast form only, and only when the escalation die is 3+.
ast.target: 仅限野兽形态，且仅当升级骰为3+时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a standard action, the waterhorse can change between its true hairy humanoid appearance and its black charger disguise. A successful DC 25 skill check is required to see through the shapechange. If the waterhorse loses its bridle, it cannot change shape again until it recovers it. Blame the creature’s lack of imagination for its limited forms.
ast.target: 作为一个标准动作，水马可以在它真实的多毛类人外形与其黑色战马伪装之间变换。需要一次成功的DC 25技能检定才能看穿这一变形。如果水马丢失了缰绳，它在找回之前无法再次变形。其形态有限，怪这生物缺乏想象力。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The DC for a truly wild ride is now DC 30.
ast.target: 真正疯狂的骑乘所需DC现在为DC 30。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As above, and the target is also stuck until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 同上，且目标还会被困住直到其下个回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The swarm can climb on ceilings and walls as easily as it moves on the ground.
ast.target: 虫群能像在地面上移动一样轻松地爬上天花板和墙壁。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After the attack the wendigo can teleport somewhere nearby as a free action.
ast.target: 攻击后，温迪戈可以以一个自由动作传送到附近某处。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 damage as it bites itself.
ast.target: 目标因咬自己而受到10点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target makes a basic attack against its nearest or most vulnerable ally (moving to that target if necessary).
ast.target: 目标对其最近或最脆弱的盟友进行一次基础攻击（必要时移动至该目标）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target attacks the wendigo if it can; otherwise, it does nothing.
ast.target: 目标若能则攻击温迪戈；否则什么也不做。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wendigo can walk on the wind. It is not a graceful flyer, but it moves as fast as the wind that carries it. Nearby creatures can see its feet blazing with fire as it runs.
ast.target: 温迪戈能在风上行走。它并非优雅的飞行者，但移动速度与托起它的风一样快。附近的生物能看到它奔跑时双足燃起火焰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wendigo is invisible to far away creatures. When the wendigo attacks, if its target couldn’t see it at the start of its turn, the wendigo gains a +2 attack bonus that turn.
ast.target: 温迪戈对远处的生物不可见。当温迪戈攻击时，若其目标在其回合开始时看不见它，则温迪戈在该回合获得+2攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a creature subject to wendigo’s hunger drops itself (through biting) or an ally (with a basic attack) to 0 hp or lower, that creature also begins making last gasp saves. Failing the fourth last gasp save turns the creature into a raving cannibal; it loses all its normal abilities and becomes an NPC until the PCs find a way to restore their ally (at GM’s discretion).
ast.target: 若受到温迪戈饥渴影响的生物把自己（通过咬噬）或一名盟友（用基础攻击）打到0 hp或更低，该生物也开始进行临终豁免。第四次临终豁免失败会使该生物变成狂暴的食人者；它失去所有正常能力并成为NPC，直到PC们找到恢复盟友的方法（由GM酌情决定）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werebear is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 20 hp.
ast.target: 当熊形狼人回合开始时未处于摇摇欲坠状态时，它恢复20 hp。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While the escalation die is 3+, the crit range of this attack expands by 2.
ast.target: 当升阶骰为3+时，此攻击的重击范围扩大2。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wereboar takes 8 damage or less from any source, it takes no damage instead.
ast.target: 当狼人野猪受到来自任何来源的8点或更少伤害时，改为不受伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wereboar can roll normal saves against effects that aren’t save ends (until end of turn or battle, for example).
ast.target: 狼人野猪可以对非“豁免结束”的效果进行正常豁免（例如直到回合结束或战斗结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wereboar is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 18 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人野猪在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态，它恢复18点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle, the wereboar can make a smash attack as a free action.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，狼人野猪可以以自由动作进行一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target can’t make opportunity attacks until the end of the turn (making it easier for the wererat to move away from the target).
ast.target: 目标直到回合结束前都无法进行借机攻击（使狼人鼠更容易远离目标）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While in hybrid form, when the wererat makes an opportunity attack with infected bite, it deals damage equal to its level on a miss.
ast.target: 在混合形态下，当狼人鼠用感染之咬进行借机攻击时，即使未命中也会造成等同其等级的伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the wererat is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 5 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人鼠在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态，它恢复5点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wererat takes no damage and suffers no effects from attacks that miss.
ast.target: 来自未命中攻击的伤害和效果对狼人鼠均无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Once per battle when the escalation die is 2+ and there are three or more wererats in the battle, a wererat can make a piercing shriek attack as a free action. Usually all the wererats in the battle will do this at the same time.
ast.target: 每场战斗一次，当升阶骰为2+且战场上有三只或更多狼人鼠时，一只狼人鼠可以以自由动作进行一次刺耳尖啸攻击。通常战斗中的所有狼人鼠会同时这样做。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The weretiger can make a second claws and bite attack as a free action.
ast.target: 狼人虎可以以自由动作进行第二次爪击与撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The weretiger can make a third claws and bite attack as a free action if the escalation die is 3+.
ast.target: 如果升级骰为3+，狼人虎可以以自由动作进行第三次爪击与撕咬攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the weretiger is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 24 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人虎在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态，它会恢复24点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the weretiger hits with a springing strike attack, the target pops free from it and can’t take any more actions that turn unless it succeeds on a save.
ast.target: 当狼人虎用跃击命中时，目标从其纠缠中脱离，除非成功通过一次豁免，否则该回合无法再采取任何行动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf attacks a creature that is engaged with one of its allies, the target is vulnerable to that attack.
ast.target: 当狼人攻击与其盟友之一交战的生物时，目标对该次攻击处于易伤状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf is not staggered at the start of its turn, it heals 6 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人在其回合开始时未处于踉跄状态，它会恢复6点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the werewolf hits with a ravening bite attack, it heals 4 hp.
ast.target: 当狼人用贪噬撕咬命中时，它恢复4点生命值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is confused until the end of its next turn as it sees a foe from its past.
ast.target: 目标因看见过去的敌人而陷入困惑，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: So long as the attack hits one or more targets, one ally of the prophet’s choice gains a cumulative +1 attack bonus until the end of the battle that increases that ally’s natural attack roll (so a roll of natural 15 becomes a roll of natural 16 with a +1 bonus, or a natural 17 with a +2 bonus, etc.). The ally can choose not to use the bonus.
ast.target: 只要该次攻击命中一个或多个目标，先知选择的一名盟友将在战斗结束前获得可累计的+1攻击加值，该加值提升该盟友的自然攻击掷骰（例如自然15在+1加值下变为自然16，或自然17在+2加值下，等等）。该盟友可以选择不使用该加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a free action, the prophet can try to avoid a non-critical attack that hits it. The attacker must reroll the attack roll with a -4 penalty.
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，先知可以以自由动作尝试躲避一次命中它的非暴击攻击。攻击者必须以-4罚值重掷攻击骰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Twice per battle as a move action, the prophet can teleport to anywhere it can see, or to a location it can’t see but that has the correct geometry and that it has previously prepared (a lair).
ast.target: 每场战斗两次，作为移动动作，先知可以传送到它能看见的任何地方，或传送到它看不见但地形正确且它事先准备过的位置（巢穴）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hatchling can make an ice breath attack as a free action.
ast.target: 雏龙可以用一个自由动作进行寒冰吐息攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the hatchling scores a critical hit, it prevents the escalation die from increasing at the start of the next round.
ast.target: 当雏龙造成重击时，它会阻止升级骰在下一回合开始时增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a 12+ on the attack roll or the dragon takes half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出12+，否则这条龙只受到一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The damage for all subsequent cold attacks this battle increases by 1 (to a maximum of 4 extra cold damage).
ast.target: 本场战斗中之后所有寒冷攻击的伤害提高1点（最多额外4点寒冷伤害）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All whitescale dragonics in the battle can use the escalation die. This monster’s escalating cold ability ends for this battle if it takes fire damage.
ast.target: 战斗中的所有白鳞龙裔都可以使用升级骰。如果该怪物受到火焰伤害，则其本场战斗的寒冷升级能力结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 16+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当寒冷攻击以此生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击检定中掷出自然16+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action at the start of the battle, and also once per turn as a quick action, the whitescale blighter breathes a cloud of frost that coats it or a nearby whitescale dragonic in rime. The next attack that hits the rime-covered whitescale this battle deals only half damage.
ast.target: 在战斗开始时作为一个自由动作，并且每回合一次作为快速动作，白鳞枯疫者吐出一团寒霜，覆在自身或附近一名白鳞龙裔身上。该场战斗中下一次命中被霜覆的白鳞的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dragonic deals 2d4 extra damage to a target it misses with a melee attack.
ast.target: 龙裔对其近战攻击未命中的目标造成额外2d4点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rime walker can make a *frost breath* attack against the target as a free action. This use of *frost breath* doesn’t count toward the 1/battle limit.
ast.target: 霜行者可以以自由动作对目标进行一次*霜息*攻击。此次*霜息*的使用不计入每战1次限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a free action at the start of the battle, the rime walker breathes a cloud of frost that coats it in rime. The next attack that hits it this battle deals only half damage.
ast.target: 在战斗开始时，霜行者以自由动作呼出一团寒霜云，将自身覆霜。本场战斗中下一次命中它的攻击只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a cold attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次寒冷攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中自然掷出14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Wibbles waft about. They can fly well enough to ignore most wind, but not strong gale winds.
ast.target: Wibbles飘来飘去。它们飞得足够好以无视大多数风，但无法无视强烈的狂风。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unless the wight is staggered, the attack also deals 8 ongoing negative energy damage.
ast.target: 除非尸妖处于踉跄状态，否则该攻击还会造成8点持续负能量伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dryad gains a +4 bonus to attacks against targets that have consumed natural food or water within the dryad’s domain within the last day.
ast.target: 树妖对在过去一天内在树妖领地内食用过天然食物或饮水的目标进行攻击时获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Before the start of the battle, the dryad summons 2d4 awakened trees that fight with it.
ast.target: 在战斗开始前，树妖召唤2d4棵觉醒之树与其并肩作战。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dryad can take an extra standard action during its turn when the escalation die is even.
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时，树妖在其回合内可额外进行一次标准动作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When a weapon attack targets this creature, the attacker must roll a natural 14+ on the attack roll or it only deals half damage.
ast.target: 当一次武器攻击以该生物为目标时，攻击者必须在攻击掷骰中自然掷出14+，否则只造成一半伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 10 extra damage, and if the target makes an opportunity attack against the polar bear before the start of the bear’s next turn, the bear can make a fang, claw, or tusk attack against the target as a free action.
ast.target: 目标额外受到10点伤害，并且如果目标在北极熊下回合开始前对北极熊进行一次借机攻击，北极熊可以以自由动作对目标进行一次獠牙、爪击或獠牙突刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 14 extra damage and is stuck (save ends; also ends if the walrus moves)
ast.target: 目标额外受到14点伤害并被困住（豁免结束；若海象移动也结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target takes 14 extra damage, or 28 extra damage if another winter wolf is engaged with it.
ast.target: 目标额外受到14点伤害；若另一个冬狼与其交战，则额外受到28点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The dryad gains a +4 bonus to the attack against targets that have consumed natural food or water within the dryad’s domain within the last day.
ast.target: 树精对在过去一天内于其领地中食用过天然食物或水的目标进行攻击时，获得+4加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The target is also weakened (save ends).
ast.target: 目标还会虚弱（豁免结束）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wraith heals half the damage it deals when it hits with a natural 18+ attack roll.
ast.target: 幽魂以自然掷出18+的攻击命中时，恢复其造成伤害的一半。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The wyvern can make a deadly tail stinger attack during its next turn.
ast.target: 双足飞龙在其下回合中可以进行一次致命的尾刺攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the escalation die to the wyvern’s ongoing poison damage whenever that damage is dealt.
ast.target: 每当双足飞龙的持续毒素伤害结算时，将递增骰加到该伤害上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If there is at least one intact corpse in the battle (say a star-mask cultist died), then once per battle part of the xombie egg swarm can burrow into it as a quick action, and it rises as a skull crab xombie at the start of the next round (roll initiative and give the new xombie a +10 initiative bonus for the shock of its arrival).
ast.target: 如果战斗中至少有一具完整的尸体（比如一名星面具邪教徒死亡），则每场战斗一次，部分僵尸卵群可以以快速动作钻入其中，并在下一回合开始时以骷髅蟹僵尸的形态复活（掷先攻，并因其突如其来的出现给予新僵尸+10先攻加值）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The xombie spider is under the target’s skin. The target takes 8 damage if it disengages from the spider.
ast.target: xombie 蜘蛛在目标的皮肤下。如果目标与蜘蛛脱离接触，则受到 8 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: 1/round, as a quick action. In addition, once a creature has saved against the effect, it can’t be targeted by chittering call attacks again this battle.
ast.target: 每回合 1 次，作为快速动作。此外，一旦生物对该效果成功豁免，本场战斗中就不能再次成为喋喋召唤攻击的目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 2d6 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标都受到 2d6 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When the zombie beast is first staggered, it makes a thrash attack as a free action.
ast.target: 当僵尸野兽首次陷入蹒跚时，它作为自由动作进行一次猛击攻击。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d4 damage!
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标都受到 1d4 点伤害！

ast.name: description
ast.source: A critical hit against a zombie shuffler deals triple damage instead of the normal double damage for a crit.
ast.target: 对蹒跚僵尸的重击造成三倍伤害，而不是重击通常的双倍伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both the zombie and its target take 1d6 damage.
ast.target: 僵尸及其目标都受到 1d6 点伤害。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The curse gains an attack bonus equal to the number of Silver Rose zombies in the battle.
ast.target: 诅咒获得等于战斗中银玫瑰僵尸数量的攻击加值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each round, one zombie mook in the Silver Rose mob can make a curse attack as a quick action.
ast.target: 每回合，银玫瑰群中的一名僵尸杂兵可以作为快速动作进行一次诅咒攻击。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自然偶数命中或未命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural 1-6 with its first attack roll

ast.name: name
ast.target: 锋利的爪子，更锋利的牙齿

ast.name: name
ast.source: Barrier breaker (1 target, or adjusted targets equal to the escalation die; see melee breaker ability below)
ast.target: 屏障破坏者（1个目标，或等于升级骰调整后的目标数量；见下方近战破坏者能力）

ast.name: name
ast.source: R: You ruined my special day
ast.target: R: 你毁了我的特别之日

ast.name: name
ast.source: First natural even miss each turn
ast.target: 每回合第一次自然偶数攻击未命中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 法术闪避（仅狗头人术士）

ast.name: name
ast.source: First natural even hit each turn
ast.target: 每回合第一次自然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Smite the unworthy, bless the worthy
ast.target: 惩戒不配者，祝福有德者

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural 16+ hit or miss, and a briar elf is engaged with the target:
ast.target: 自然掷出16+，命中或未命中，且一名荆棘精灵与目标交战：

ast.name: name
ast.target: 全岩（抗性：武器与负能量16+）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural even hit against a target in heavy armor
ast.target: 对穿重甲目标的自然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural odd hit against a target in light armor or no armor
ast.target: 对轻甲或无甲目标的自然奇数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: [Once per battle special effect] Natural even hit
ast.target: [每场战斗一次特殊效果] 天然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: [Once per battle] My what big teeth you have
ast.target: [每场战斗一次] 你的牙齿真大

ast.name: name
ast.source: Both attacks hit the same target
ast.target: 两次攻击命中同一目标

ast.name: name
ast.target: 一到两个以图标为中心的能力

ast.name: name
ast.source: Hit or miss, attack beats MD
ast.target: 命中或未命中，攻击胜过MD

ast.name: name
ast.source: Target is hit by a marked for death attack for the second time this battle
ast.target: 目标在本场战斗中第二次被“标记为死亡”的攻击命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Target is hit for the third time this battle
ast.target: 目标在本场战斗中第三次被命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Target is hit for the fourth time this battle
ast.target: 目标在本场战斗中第四次被命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural roll is above target's Constitution
ast.target: 自然骰点高于目标的体质

ast.name: name
ast.source: Ye called in Their name, and I came hither
ast.target: 你们以他们之名呼唤，我便至此

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural roll higher than the target’s Wisdom attribute
ast.target: 自然掷骰高于目标的感知属性

ast.name: name
ast.source: Bite—The spider makes a bite attack.
ast.target: 啃咬——蜘蛛进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Web—The spider makes a web attack.
ast.target: 蛛网——蜘蛛进行一次蛛网攻击。

ast.name: name
ast.source: With my dying breath I curse at thee
ast.target: 我以最后一口气诅咒你

ast.name: name
ast.source: The ticking clock of its own mortality
ast.target: 自身必死性的滴答时钟

ast.name: name
ast.source: C: Judgment of the Zealous Icon

ast.name: name
ast.target: 两次攻击命中不同目标

ast.name: name
ast.source: C: The awful nature of reality

ast.name: name
ast.source: Swirling snow and fog and flame

ast.name: name
ast.source: (Choose 1-3 of these and the swirling dust devil attack)
ast.target: （从以下选择1-3项以及旋转尘魔攻击）

ast.name: name
ast.source: (Choose 1-3 of these and the burning breath attack)
ast.target: （从这些以及灼热吐息攻击中选择1-3个）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Three heads are better than one

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自然掷骰高于目标的感知

ast.name: name
ast.target: 破碎的心智，破碎的躯体

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural even hit against an ally
ast.target: 对盟友的自然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 闪躲、左右摇摆并用头槌

ast.name: name
ast.target: R: 尤尼尔的神圣之拳

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural 16+ hit against a target wearing metal armor
ast.target: 掷出自然16+命中穿着金属护甲的目标

ast.name: name
ast.source: Crit against a target with metal armor and/or shield
ast.target: 对装备金属护甲和/或盾牌的目标造成重击

ast.name: name
ast.source: First natural even hit each battle
ast.target: 每场战斗首次自然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: C: “I command you to eat your own flesh”
ast.target: C：“我命令你吃掉自己的肉”

ast.name: name
ast.source: (Choose one or two of the following)
ast.target: （从以下内容中选择一或两项）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 弗莫尔变异·更凶恶特性

ast.name: name
ast.source: Both attacks are natural even rolls, hit or miss
ast.target: 两次攻击均为自然偶数掷骰，无论命中与否

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural odd hit when the escalation die is odd
ast.target: 当升级骰为奇数时自然奇数命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural even hit when the escalation die is even
ast.target: 当升级骰为偶数时自然偶数命中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 处于绝望状态时的任意命中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 对无关紧要之物的防御

ast.name: name
ast.target: 胶质古巴六面体（又称方块）

ast.name: name
ast.source: 3. The cubahedron spits an engulfed creature into the air above it and makes a shlup’n’schlorp attack against that creature with a +5 attack bonus. Then the creature is engulfed again.
ast.target: 3. 立方体怪将被吞噬的生物吐到它上方的空中，并以+5攻击加值对该生物进行一次shlup’n’schlorp攻击。随后该生物再次被吞噬。

ast.name: name
ast.target: [每场战斗一次] 不死旋律

ast.name: name
ast.source: [Once per battle] Revolving door of undeath
ast.target: [每场战斗一次] 不死轮回之门

ast.name: name
ast.target: R: 大、黑、吱呀作响的弓

ast.name: name
ast.target: 爪击 爪击 爪击

ast.name: name
ast.source: Second hit against the same target in a round
ast.target: 在一回合内对同一目标的第二次命中

ast.name: name
ast.source: (Each hallowed gargoyle has one of the following attacks)
ast.target: （每个神圣石像鬼具有以下攻击之一）

ast.name: name
ast.target: C: 怪异而美丽的吟唱

ast.name: name
ast.target: 恶魔应得的报应（姆哈哈哈哈！）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自由形式能力 - 挑衅

ast.name: name
ast.source: First natural odd hit each turn
ast.target: 每回合首次自然奇数命中

ast.name: name
ast.target: 畸变攻击 - 仅一种（见下文）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 蜂蜜恶魔，又名史莱姆恶魔

ast.name: name
ast.source: The target has MD 15 or lower

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自由形式的隐秘能力—黏滑

ast.name: name
ast.source: First natural even hit or miss each turn
ast.target: 每回合第一次自然偶数命中或失手

ast.name: name
ast.source: Second natural even hit or miss each turn
ast.target: 每回合第二次自然偶数命中或失手

ast.name: name
ast.target: 黑曜石弯刀与可怕的利爪

ast.name: name
ast.source: Natural roll is above target’s Wisdom (trapster)
ast.target: 自然掷骰高于目标的感知（陷阱师）

ast.name: name
ast.target: R: 痛苦肝脏翻转诅咒
